title.zh: 替换危险 API 并复测
title.en: Retest the Eval and Function Dynamic Code Injection remediation boundary

description.zh: 移除字符串求值，改为固定函数映射、JSON.parse 和类型化消息；删除 unsafe-eval，并使用 Trusted Types 或静态分析阻止新 sink；使用相同来源回放正常与异常值，确认安全 API 保留功能且不再产生执行路径。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the dynamic-evaluation call stack, source argument, and unique execution marker correlate, excluding cases where the browser blocks a javascript URL at navigation no longer appears.

review.rationale: eval 与 Function 动态代码注入保留为 Payload，用于审查“不可信字符串是否到达 eval、Function、setTimeout 或 setInterval 的代码参数并在页面 origin 中求值”。成立时必须满足证据要求“动态求值函数的调用栈、传入源码和唯一执行标记可关联，并排除浏览器地址栏主动阻止 javascript URL 的情况”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 可控值进入 eval、Function 构造器或字符串定时器的第一个参数，且不是仅存在危险 API 的静态代码。
prerequisites.en: A controllable value reaches the first argument of eval, the Function constructor, or a string timer rather than merely coexisting with a dangerous API in static code.

prerequisites.zh: 对动态求值 API 启用调用跟踪和参数哈希，测试代码只设置一次性内存 marker，并捕获 CSP unsafe-eval 行为。
prerequisites.en: Dynamic-evaluation APIs have call tracing and argument hashes, test code only sets a one-time in-memory marker, and CSP unsafe-eval behavior is captured.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是带可控来源标记的字符串由真实动态 sink 编译执行并设置 marker，source、sink 参数、CSP 状态和调用栈完整关联。 假阳性边界：危险函数存在但只接收常量、字符串到达 sink 前被 JSON 解析、语法错误、unsafe-eval 阻断或手工 DevTools 执行都不能证明注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a source-tagged controllable string to be compiled by the real dynamic sink and set the marker, correlating source, sink argument, CSP state, and call stack. False-positive boundary: A dangerous function receiving only constants, a string parsed as JSON before the sink, a syntax error, unsafe-eval blocking, or manual DevTools execution does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: 动态求值测试禁止访问全局敏感对象或构造系统/网络动作；出现定时器残留、异常 worker、外连或状态修改时停止。
opsecTips.en: Dynamic-evaluation testing must not access sensitive globals or construct system or network actions; stop on residual timers, unexpected workers, egress, or state modification.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销 eval/Function/timer instrumentation，取消所有测试定时器和 worker，清除 marker 状态并重新载入应用确认调用路径正常。
opsecTips.en: Remove eval, Function, and timer instrumentation, cancel all test timers and workers, clear marker state, and reload the application to confirm normal call paths.

name.zh: Location 活动方案赋值

description.zh: 验证 location、href、assign 与 replace 接收可控 javascript URL 时的导航和执行行为，区分 DOM XSS 与普通开放重定向。
description.en: Tests navigation and execution when location, href, assign, or replace receives a controllable javascript URL, distinguishing DOM XSS from an ordinary open redirect.

overview.zh: Location 活动方案赋值审查客户端源到 sink 的完整数据流。需要确认的核心行为为：应用是否把攻击者控制的字符串直接赋给 Location API，并允许 javascript 或其他活动方案在目标页面上下文执行。适用前提为：跳转逻辑缺少 URL 解析与协议、origin 允许列表，只通过前缀或字符串替换判断安全目标。DOM XSS 的证据标准是：最终 URL、导航类型和页面 origin 中的唯一标记分别记录；仅跳往外部 HTTPS 地址只能证明重定向；服务器响应不包含载荷并不能排除客户端问题。
overview.en: Location Active-Scheme Assignment checks whether an application assigns an attacker-controlled string directly to a Location API and permits javascript or another active scheme to execute in the target page context. It applies when redirect logic lacks parsed protocol and origin allowlists and relies only on prefixes or string replacement to classify safe destinations. A conclusion requires the final URL, navigation type, and unique marker in the page origin are recorded separately; navigation to external HTTPS alone proves only a redirect; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 客户端边界失效的前提为：跳转逻辑缺少 URL 解析与协议、origin 允许列表，只通过前缀或字符串替换判断安全目标。审计应围绕“应用是否把攻击者控制的字符串直接赋给 Location API，并允许 javascript 或其他活动方案在目标页面上下文执行”记录源值、解码次数、赋值 API 与执行上下文。只有取得“最终 URL、导航类型和页面 origin 中的唯一标记分别记录；仅跳往外部 HTTPS 地址只能证明重定向”，才能证明可控数据到达了可执行 sink。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when redirect logic lacks parsed protocol and origin allowlists and relies only on prefixes or string replacement to classify safe destinations, allowing whether an application assigns an attacker-controlled string directly to a Location API and permits javascript or another active scheme to execute in the target page context. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the final URL, navigation type, and unique marker in the page origin are recorded separately; navigation to external HTTPS alone proves only a redirect; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 对 href 赋值、assign 和 replace 分别使用同源 HTTPS、跨源 HTTPS 与活动方案基线，记录浏览器差异和用户手势要求。在 DevTools 中分别对真实读取点和写入点设置断点，使用一次性标记跟踪源值、规范化结果与最终 DOM；每轮只改变一个来源或 sink，避免把导航限制或 CSP 阻断误认为数据流已经修复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, compare same-origin HTTPS, cross-origin HTTPS, and active-scheme baselines across href assignment, assign, and replace while recording browser differences and gesture requirements. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 使用 URL 构造器解析目标，只允许明确的 https/http origin 与路径；不要把原始用户值传给 Location API，并在跳转前绑定服务端生成的目标 ID。回归应覆盖原客户端来源、合法业务 URL 或文本以及最小危险值，确认安全 API 保留原功能，且危险 sink 不再收到攻击者可控字符串。
mitigation.en: Remediation should parse destinations with the URL constructor, allow only explicit https/http origins and paths, never pass raw user values to Location APIs, and bind redirects to server-generated destination IDs. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 追踪“Location 活动方案赋值”的客户端来源
title.en: Scope the Location Active-Scheme Assignment data flow

description.zh: 从 URL、消息或接口值单步跟踪到实际 DOM API，核对前提“跳转逻辑缺少 URL 解析与协议、origin 允许列表，只通过前缀或字符串替换判断安全目标”及所有中间解码步骤。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that redirect logic lacks parsed protocol and origin allowlists and relies only on prefixes or string replacement to classify safe destinations, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 断点核对“DOM 导航 Sink” Sink
title.en: Establish the DOM Navigation Sink baseline

description.zh: 在读取点和写入点记录运行时值、调用栈与最终 DOM，并采用“最终 URL、导航类型和页面 origin 中的唯一标记分别记录；仅跳往外部 HTTPS 地址只能证明重定向”作为成立标准。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the final URL, navigation type, and unique marker in the page origin are recorded separately; navigation to external HTTPS alone proves only a redirect as valid evidence.

title.zh: 单变量验证“Location 活动方案赋值”
title.en: Run a single-variable Location Active-Scheme Assignment check

description.zh: 对 href 赋值、assign 和 replace 分别使用同源 HTTPS、跨源 HTTPS 与活动方案基线，记录浏览器差异和用户手势要求；保持页面状态不变，逐个来源和 sink 重放原样例，排除导航与 CSP 阻断差异。
description.en: compare same-origin HTTPS, cross-origin HTTPS, and active-scheme baselines across href assignment, assign, and replace while recording browser differences and gesture requirements; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
javascript:location='javascript:alert(1)'
javascript:location='javascript:alert(document.domain)'
javascript:location='javascript:alert(document.cookie)'
javascript:location.href='javascript:alert(1)'
javascript:location.href='javascript:alert(document.domain)'
javascript:location.href='javascript:alert(document.cookie)'
javascript:location.assign('javascript:alert(1)')
javascript:location.assign('javascript:alert(document.domain)')
javascript:location.assign('javascript:alert(document.cookie)')
javascript:location.replace('javascript:alert(1)')
javascript:location.replace('javascript:alert(document.domain)')
javascript:location.replace('javascript:alert(document.cookie)')
javascript:window.location='javascript:alert(1)'
javascript:window.location='javascript:alert(document.domain)'
javascript:window.location='javascript:alert(document.cookie)'
javascript:document.location='javascript:alert(1)'
javascript:document.location='javascript:alert(document.domain)'
javascript:document.location='javascript:alert(document.cookie)'

title.zh: 替换危险 API 并复测
title.en: Retest the Location Active-Scheme Assignment remediation boundary

description.zh: 使用 URL 构造器解析目标，只允许明确的 https/http origin 与路径；不要把原始用户值传给 Location API，并在跳转前绑定服务端生成的目标 ID；使用相同来源回放正常与异常值，确认安全 API 保留功能且不再产生执行路径。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the final URL, navigation type, and unique marker in the page origin are recorded separately; navigation to external HTTPS alone proves only a redirect no longer appears.

review.rationale: Location 活动方案赋值保留为 Payload，用于审查“应用是否把攻击者控制的字符串直接赋给 Location API，并允许 javascript 或其他活动方案在目标页面上下文执行”。成立时必须满足证据要求“最终 URL、导航类型和页面 origin 中的唯一标记分别记录；仅跳往外部 HTTPS 地址只能证明重定向”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 应用真实代码将可控值赋给 location、href、assign 或 replace，且能够区分赋值来源、目标 scheme 与浏览器导航策略。
prerequisites.en: Real application code assigns a controllable value to location, href, assign, or replace, with assignment source, destination scheme, and browser navigation policy distinguishable.

prerequisites.zh: 导航 API 已加只读跟踪，普通 HTTPS 跳转使用自有空页面，javascript 分支仅设置一次性 marker，并保护测试页面状态。
prerequisites.en: Navigation APIs have read-only tracing, ordinary HTTPS redirects use an owned empty page, javascript branches set only a one-time marker, and test-page state is protected.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是受控 javascript scheme 经应用赋值后在当前文档来源执行 marker；若只导航到 HTTPS 目标，应单独归类开放重定向。 假阳性边界：href 字符串显示、浏览器阻止活动 scheme、用户在地址栏手工执行、只发生普通跨源跳转或 CSP 告警都不是 location XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the controlled javascript scheme to execute the marker in the current document origin after application assignment; navigation only to an HTTPS target is classified separately as open redirect. False-positive boundary: Displayed href text, browser blocking of an active scheme, manual address-bar execution, ordinary cross-origin navigation, or a CSP alert is not location-based XSS.

opsecTips.zh: Location 测试启用导航拦截并限制一次；出现历史循环、页面卸载、真实业务状态丢失、下载或非测试域跳转时停止。
opsecTips.en: Location testing intercepts navigation and permits one attempt; stop on history loops, page unload, loss of real business state, downloads, or navigation to a non-test domain.

opsecTips.zh: 恢复导航 API、原始 URL、history 与路由状态，关闭自有目标页，清理 BFCache/站点数据并重新进入测试流程。
opsecTips.en: Restore navigation APIs, the original URL, history, and routing state, close the owned target page, clear BFCache and site data, and re-enter the test flow.

name.zh: JavaScript 标识符混淆变体

description.zh: 使用 String.fromCharCode、字符串拼接和 Function 构造等方式重建调用，验证只识别危险关键字的过滤策略是否可绕过。
description.en: Reconstructs calls through String.fromCharCode, concatenation, and Function construction to test filters that recognize only dangerous keywords.

overview.zh: JavaScript 标识符混淆变体评估边缘防护、源站和浏览器之间的解析差异，而不是把 WAF 放行视为成功。需要核对的行为为：运行时重建的函数名和参数是否绕过静态字符串规则，同时保持与直接调用相同的执行语义。成立前提为：攻击者已控制 JavaScript 执行上下文，而防护把风险简化为 alert、eval 等字面关键字，没有消除代码注入 sink。最终必须取得以下证据：混淆表达式的运行时值、实际调用目标与唯一执行标记可在调试器中还原，不能仅凭 WAF 放行认定漏洞。
overview.en: JavaScript Identifier Obfuscation Variants checks whether runtime reconstruction of function names and arguments bypasses static string rules while retaining the semantics of a direct call. It applies when the attacker already controls a JavaScript execution context while defenses reduce risk to literal tokens such as alert or eval instead of removing the code-injection sink. A conclusion requires the runtime value, actual call target, and unique execution marker can be reconstructed in the debugger; WAF acceptance alone is not a vulnerability; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 多层处理出现风险的前提为：攻击者已控制 JavaScript 执行上下文，而防护把风险简化为 alert、eval 等字面关键字，没有消除代码注入 sink。审计应使用同一请求标识关联边缘动作、源站接收字节、应用输出与浏览器结果，并据此判断“运行时重建的函数名和参数是否绕过静态字符串规则，同时保持与直接调用相同的执行语义”。只有 200 响应、告警缺失或规则未命中均不足以证明 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the attacker already controls a JavaScript execution context while defenses reduce risk to literal tokens such as alert or eval instead of removing the code-injection sink, allowing whether runtime reconstruction of function names and arguments bypasses static string rules while retaining the semantics of a direct call. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the runtime value, actual call target, and unique execution marker can be reconstructed in the debugger; WAF acceptance alone is not a vulnerability; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在确认可执行的 sink 中先测试直接调用，再逐个替换字符编码、属性拼接和 Function 构造，定位是哪一种词法规则产生差异。固定 WAF 规则集、源站版本与浏览器版本，先重放未编码基线，再逐类测试大小写、实体、空白或结构变化；命中后缩减为单一变换，并按“混淆表达式的运行时值、实际调用目标与唯一执行标记可在调试器中还原，不能仅凭 WAF 放行认定漏洞”完成确认。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, in a confirmed executable sink, test a direct call first and then substitute character encoding, property concatenation, and Function construction one at a time to locate the differing rule. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 从根本上移除用户可控代码上下文，采用固定调用映射和数据序列化；服务端与前端都不要依赖危险函数名黑名单。修复同时覆盖边缘规则和最终应用 sink，再使用相同请求标识重放正常与异常样例，确认 WAF 动作、源站规范化和浏览器 DOM 三层结果一致。
mitigation.en: Remediation should remove user-controlled code contexts, use fixed call maps and data serialization, and avoid dangerous-function-name blacklists on both server and client. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 固定“JavaScript 标识符混淆变体”处理链版本
title.en: Scope the JavaScript Identifier Obfuscation Variants data flow

description.zh: 记录边缘规则、文本转换顺序、源站框架与浏览器版本，并界定前提“攻击者已控制 JavaScript 执行上下文，而防护把风险简化为 alert、eval 等字面关键字，没有消除代码注入 sink”的实际范围。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the attacker already controls a JavaScript execution context while defenses reduce risk to literal tokens such as alert or eval instead of removing the code-injection sink, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 关联“JavaScript 词法混淆”多层基线
title.en: Establish the JavaScript Lexical Obfuscation baseline

description.zh: 使用请求 ID 关联 WAF 动作、源站接收值和响应 DOM，并以“混淆表达式的运行时值、实际调用目标与唯一执行标记可在调试器中还原，不能仅凭 WAF 放行认定漏洞”作为最终证据要求。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the runtime value, actual call target, and unique execution marker can be reconstructed in the debugger; WAF acceptance alone is not a vulnerability as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐变换验证“JavaScript 标识符混淆变体”
title.en: Run a single-variable JavaScript Identifier Obfuscation Variants check

description.zh: 在确认可执行的 sink 中先测试直接调用，再逐个替换字符编码、属性拼接和 Function 构造，定位是哪一种词法规则产生差异；每轮只改变一种编码或语法形式，并将命中项缩减到可解释的最小差异。
description.en: in a confirmed executable sink, test a direct call first and then substitute character encoding, property concatenation, and Function construction one at a time to locate the differing rule; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归
title.en: Retest the JavaScript Identifier Obfuscation Variants remediation boundary

description.zh: 从根本上移除用户可控代码上下文，采用固定调用映射和数据序列化；服务端与前端都不要依赖危险函数名黑名单；重放相同请求集，确认边缘、源站和浏览器对输入形成一致且安全的结果。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the runtime value, actual call target, and unique execution marker can be reconstructed in the debugger; WAF acceptance alone is not a vulnerability no longer appears.

review.rationale: JavaScript 标识符混淆变体保留为 Payload，用于审查“运行时重建的函数名和参数是否绕过静态字符串规则，同时保持与直接调用相同的执行语义”。成立时必须满足证据要求“混淆表达式的运行时值、实际调用目标与唯一执行标记可在调试器中还原，不能仅凭 WAF 放行认定漏洞”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 目标防护主要依赖危险标识符黑名单，可控表达式在过滤后仍进入可执行 JavaScript 上下文或动态求值 sink。
prerequisites.en: The target defense relies mainly on dangerous-identifier blacklisting, and the controlled expression still reaches executable JavaScript or a dynamic-evaluation sink after filtering.

prerequisites.zh: 已记录 String.fromCharCode、字符串拼接或 Function 构造前后的源码值，marker 仅修改隔离页面中的固定布尔标志。
prerequisites.en: Source values before and after String.fromCharCode, string concatenation, or Function construction are recorded, and the marker only changes a fixed Boolean in the isolated page.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是混淆表达式通过目标过滤，运行时重建危险调用并执行 marker，且反混淆值、执行 sink 与来源能连续关联。 假阳性边界：过滤器未告警、字符串成功拼接、反混淆工具得到 alert 文本、CSP 阻断或表达式只作为数据显示均不是执行证据。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the obfuscated expression to pass the target filter, reconstruct the dangerous call at runtime, and execute the marker, continuously correlating deobfuscated value, execution sink, and source. False-positive boundary: No filter alert, successful string concatenation, an alert string produced by a deobfuscator, CSP blocking, or display as data is not execution evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 标识符混淆验证不得重建 cookie、storage、网络或系统 API；发现动态导入、外连、全局原型修改或循环执行时停止。
opsecTips.en: Identifier-obfuscation validation must not reconstruct cookie, storage, network, or system APIs; stop on dynamic imports, egress, global prototype changes, or execution loops.

opsecTips.zh: 删除混淆脚本和 marker 变量，恢复全局对象/原型，清理脚本缓存并重载页面后用普通 JavaScript 业务路径回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete obfuscated scripts and marker variables, restore global objects and prototypes, clear script caches, reload, and regress normal JavaScript business paths.

name.zh: Awesome-WAF XSS 字典命令集

description.zh: 该记录是从 Awesome-WAF 汇总的多种编码和解析差异字典，适合作为 XSS 工具的自定义 Payload 输入，而非独立漏洞类型。
description.en: This record is a multi-encoding and parser-differential dictionary collected from Awesome-WAF and belongs as custom payload input for XSS tools rather than a separate vulnerability type.

overview.zh: Awesome-WAF XSS 字典命令集是来源型 XSS 字典，不代表独立漏洞数据流。维护重点为：字典条目如何按编码、空白、空字节和标签解析特征去重并供 Dalfox、XSStrike 等工具按上下文选择。它的适用边界为：该内容本身不描述可触发的应用数据流，只有在具体输入点、输出上下文与浏览器执行证据同时存在时才可能证明 XSS。任何具体漏洞都必须补充以下证据：迁移后保留原始命令字节和来源引用，并以工具运行记录关联具体目标上下文，不能用字典命中数替代漏洞证据。
overview.en: Awesome-WAF XSS Dictionary Command Set checks how dictionary entries are deduplicated by encoding, whitespace, null-byte, and tag-parsing traits for context-aware use by tools such as Dalfox or XSStrike. It applies when the content does not describe an application data flow; XSS is proven only when a concrete input, output context, and browser execution evidence exist together. A conclusion requires the migration preserves original command bytes and provenance while tool runs link each match to a concrete target context; dictionary hit counts are not vulnerability evidence; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 字典本身不是漏洞。只有满足“该内容本身不描述可触发的应用数据流，只有在具体输入点、输出上下文与浏览器执行证据同时存在时才可能证明 XSS”时，样例才可用于审查“字典条目如何按编码、空白、空字节和标签解析特征去重并供 Dalfox、XSStrike 等工具按上下文选择”。工具命中、字符串反射或上游仓库收录都只是候选信号；缺少“迁移后保留原始命令字节和来源引用，并以工具运行记录关联具体目标上下文，不能用字典命中数替代漏洞证据”时不能形成 XSS 结论。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the content does not describe an application data flow; XSS is proven only when a concrete input, output context, and browser execution evidence exist together, allowing how dictionary entries are deduplicated by encoding, whitespace, null-byte, and tag-parsing traits for context-aware use by tools such as Dalfox or XSStrike. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the migration preserves original command bytes and provenance while tool runs link each match to a concrete target context; dictionary hit counts are not vulnerability evidence; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 把原集合按行导入 XSS 工具命令区，先去除完全重复项，再为每个候选记录 HTML、属性、URL 或 JavaScript 上下文和最小复现结果。迁移时保持原始字节和来源引用，按 HTML、属性、URL、JavaScript 及浏览器兼容性标注每行；工具扫描只负责发现候选，最终结果必须在隔离浏览器中缩减为可解释的最小复现。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, import the original set line by line into the XSS tool command area, remove exact duplicates, and record HTML, attribute, URL, or JavaScript context plus a minimized reproduction for every candidate. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 从 Payload 导航移除该来源字典并合并到 xss-tools，保留版本与引用；应用修复仍必须按最终 sink 编码、消毒和限制危险 DOM API。工具区保存版本、适用上下文和失效标记，应用侧仍按最终 sink 实施编码、消毒与策略控制；回归分别确认字典可复制、导航不重复且正常页面功能不受影响。
mitigation.en: Remediation should remove this source dictionary from payload navigation and merge it into xss-tools with version and provenance, while application fixes still require sink-specific encoding, sanitization, and dangerous-DOM-API controls. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 核对“Awesome-WAF XSS 字典命令集”来源与版本
title.en: Verify Awesome-WAF XSS Dictionary Command Set provenance

description.zh: 确认上游仓库、浏览器适用范围和许可，并围绕“字典条目如何按编码、空白、空字节和标签解析特征去重并供 Dalfox、XSStrike 等工具按上下文选择”建立维护标签。
description.en: Confirm the upstream repository, sample provenance, and supported browsers, documenting how dictionary entries are deduplicated by encoding, whitespace, null-byte, and tag-parsing traits for context-aware use by tools such as Dalfox or XSStrike without treating upstream inclusion as vulnerability proof.

title.zh: 标注“XSS 工具字典”适用上下文
title.en: Tag XSS Tool Dictionary contexts

description.zh: 按元素、属性、URL、JavaScript 和交互条件标记每行；适用边界为“该内容本身不描述可触发的应用数据流，只有在具体输入点、输出上下文与浏览器执行证据同时存在时才可能证明 XSS”。
description.en: Tag each line by HTML, attribute, URL, JavaScript, event, and compatibility context; test a target only when the content does not describe an application data flow; XSS is proven only when a concrete input, output context, and browser execution evidence exist together.

title.zh: 迁移“Awesome-WAF XSS 字典命令集”原始命令
title.en: Migrate the original Awesome-WAF XSS Dictionary Command Set bytes

description.zh: 把原集合完整移入 xss-tools，保留引用并精确去重；具体命中仍须满足“迁移后保留原始命令字节和来源引用，并以工具运行记录关联具体目标上下文，不能用字典命中数替代漏洞证据”。
description.en: Move the complete original command set into xss-tools, preserve provenance, and deduplicate exact bytes; every concrete hit still requires the migration preserves original command bytes and provenance while tool runs link each match to a concrete target context; dictionary hit counts are not vulnerability evidence.

attackChain.payload: %E2%88%80%E3%B8%80%E3%B0%80script%E3%B8%80alert(1)%E3%B0%80/script%E3%B8%80 alert(1); alert(1); confirm(0); pwn3d

title.zh: 建立“Awesome-WAF XSS 字典命令集”工具回归
title.en: Create Awesome-WAF XSS Dictionary Command Set tool regression

description.zh: 从 Payload 导航移除该来源字典并合并到 xss-tools，保留版本与引用；应用修复仍必须按最终 sink 编码、消毒和限制危险 DOM API；确认工具入口可复制原命令、失效项有标记，且 Payload 导航不再重复展示来源字典。
description.en: Validate retained samples against fixed isolated pages, mark obsolete entries, remove duplicate payload navigation, and confirm the tool entry still copies the original command.

review.rationale: Awesome-WAF XSS 字典命令集是来源型 XSS 字典，不描述独立应用数据流。其维护目标是“字典条目如何按编码、空白、空字节和标签解析特征去重并供 Dalfox、XSStrike 等工具按上下文选择”，因此由现有 xss-tools 保存原始命令、版本、适用上下文和出处。

prerequisites.zh: Awesome-WAF 来源、许可和原始字节已记录，目标 XSS 工具支持按 HTML/属性/URL/脚本上下文标记，而非把整表当一个漏洞。
prerequisites.en: Awesome-WAF provenance, license, and original bytes are recorded, and the destination XSS tool supports HTML, attribute, URL, and script context tags rather than treating the corpus as one vulnerability.

prerequisites.zh: 可在离线 parser harness 与明确浏览器矩阵中逐行解码，记录有效、失效、仅签名和版本限定状态。
prerequisites.en: Each line can be decoded in an offline parser harness and explicit browser matrix, with valid, invalid, signature-only, and version-limited states recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是字典迁移后原字节与来源完整、上下文标签准确，某候选在隔离目标 sink 中用 marker 独立验证；迁移成功不等于目标存在 XSS。 假阳性边界：字典含危险字符串、WAF 放行某行、离线 parser 识别标签或公共 payload 在其他网站有效，都不能证明当前应用漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive evidence means migrated bytes and provenance remain intact, context tags are accurate, and a candidate is independently validated with a marker in an isolated target sink; successful migration does not mean a target has XSS. False-positive boundary: Dangerous strings in the corpus, WAF allowance, an offline parser recognizing a tag, or a public payload working elsewhere does not prove a vulnerability in the current application.

opsecTips.zh: Awesome-WAF 字典默认只离线整理，禁止整表对站点批量发送；出现真实扫描流量、公共目标或非 marker 副作用时停止。
opsecTips.en: The Awesome-WAF corpus is organized offline by default and never bulk-sent to a site; stop on real scan traffic, public targets, or effects beyond a marker.

opsecTips.zh: 删除临时解码文件、浏览器 profile 和执行结果，合并重复项但保留来源哈希，并确认目标工具没有未标记的失效行。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary decoded files, browser profiles, and execution results, merge duplicates while retaining source hashes, and confirm the destination tool has no untagged invalid line.

name.zh: AWS WAF/CloudFront XSS 规范化差异
name.en: AWS WAF and CloudFront XSS Normalization Differential

description.zh: 以 CRLF、引号闭合和 URL 编码 SVG 等小型样例验证 CloudFront 前置 AWS WAF 与源站、浏览器之间的规范化差异。
description.en: Uses compact CRLF, quote-closure, and URL-encoded SVG samples to compare normalization across CloudFront, AWS WAF, the origin, and the browser.

overview.zh: AWS WAF/CloudFront XSS 规范化差异评估边缘防护、源站和浏览器之间的解析差异，而不是把 WAF 放行视为成功。需要核对的行为为：CloudFront、AWS WAF 文本转换、源站框架和浏览器对 CRLF、URL 编码与属性闭合是否得到不同字节序列。成立前提为：Web ACL 的转换顺序或匹配范围与源站解码链不一致，且应用最终把参数放入可执行 HTML 上下文。最终必须取得以下证据：同一请求的边缘动作日志、源站接收值、响应 DOM 与唯一执行标记可以通过请求 ID 关联。
overview.en: AWS WAF and CloudFront XSS Normalization Differential checks whether CloudFront, AWS WAF text transformations, the origin framework, and the browser derive different byte sequences from CRLF, URL encoding, and attribute closure. It applies when Web ACL transformation order or match scope differs from the origin decoding chain and the application finally places the parameter in an executable HTML context. A conclusion requires edge action logs, the origin-received value, response DOM, and unique execution marker for one request correlate through a request identifier; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 多层处理出现风险的前提为：Web ACL 的转换顺序或匹配范围与源站解码链不一致，且应用最终把参数放入可执行 HTML 上下文。审计应使用同一请求标识关联边缘动作、源站接收字节、应用输出与浏览器结果，并据此判断“CloudFront、AWS WAF 文本转换、源站框架和浏览器对 CRLF、URL 编码与属性闭合是否得到不同字节序列”。只有 200 响应、告警缺失或规则未命中均不足以证明 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when Web ACL transformation order or match scope differs from the origin decoding chain and the application finally places the parameter in an executable HTML context, allowing whether CloudFront, AWS WAF text transformations, the origin framework, and the browser derive different byte sequences from CRLF, URL encoding, and attribute closure. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and edge action logs, the origin-received value, response DOM, and unique execution marker for one request correlate through a request identifier; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在测试 Web ACL 中逐项记录 URL_DECODE、HTML_ENTITY_DECODE 等转换顺序，分别提交原始和单层编码样例，并对比源站日志与浏览器 DOM。固定 WAF 规则集、源站版本与浏览器版本，先重放未编码基线，再逐类测试大小写、实体、空白或结构变化；命中后缩减为单一变换，并按“同一请求的边缘动作日志、源站接收值、响应 DOM 与唯一执行标记可以通过请求 ID 关联”完成确认。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, record the order of URL_DECODE, HTML_ENTITY_DECODE, and related transformations in a test Web ACL, submit raw and single-encoded samples, and compare origin logs with browser DOM. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 让边缘与源站采用一致的单次规范化模型，使用 AWS 托管规则与精确作用域，并在应用最终 HTML sink 执行上下文编码和消毒。修复同时覆盖边缘规则和最终应用 sink，再使用相同请求标识重放正常与异常样例，确认 WAF 动作、源站规范化和浏览器 DOM 三层结果一致。
mitigation.en: Remediation should align edge and origin on a single canonicalization model, use scoped AWS managed rules, and apply context encoding and sanitization at the final application HTML sink. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 固定“AWS WAF/CloudFront XSS 规范化差异”处理链版本
title.en: Scope the AWS WAF and CloudFront XSS Normalization Differential data flow

description.zh: 记录边缘规则、文本转换顺序、源站框架与浏览器版本，并界定前提“Web ACL 的转换顺序或匹配范围与源站解码链不一致，且应用最终把参数放入可执行 HTML 上下文”的实际范围。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that Web ACL transformation order or match scope differs from the origin decoding chain and the application finally places the parameter in an executable HTML context, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 关联“AWS WAF 差异测试”多层基线
title.en: Establish the AWS WAF Differential Testing baseline

description.zh: 使用请求 ID 关联 WAF 动作、源站接收值和响应 DOM，并以“同一请求的边缘动作日志、源站接收值、响应 DOM 与唯一执行标记可以通过请求 ID 关联”作为最终证据要求。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only edge action logs, the origin-received value, response DOM, and unique execution marker for one request correlate through a request identifier as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐变换验证“AWS WAF/CloudFront XSS 规范化差异”
title.en: Run a single-variable AWS WAF and CloudFront XSS Normalization Differential check

description.zh: 在测试 Web ACL 中逐项记录 URL_DECODE、HTML_ENTITY_DECODE 等转换顺序，分别提交原始和单层编码样例，并对比源站日志与浏览器 DOM；每轮只改变一种编码或语法形式，并将命中项缩减到可解释的最小差异。
description.en: record the order of URL_DECODE, HTML_ENTITY_DECODE, and related transformations in a test Web ACL, submit raw and single-encoded samples, and compare origin logs with browser DOM; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload: ">%0D%0A%0D%0A ">'> 6'%22()%26%25%22%3E%3Csvg/onload=prompt(1)%3E/ ">

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归
title.en: Retest the AWS WAF and CloudFront XSS Normalization Differential remediation boundary

description.zh: 让边缘与源站采用一致的单次规范化模型，使用 AWS 托管规则与精确作用域，并在应用最终 HTML sink 执行上下文编码和消毒；重放相同请求集，确认边缘、源站和浏览器对输入形成一致且安全的结果。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while edge action logs, the origin-received value, response DOM, and unique execution marker for one request correlate through a request identifier no longer appears.

review.rationale: AWS WAF/CloudFront XSS 规范化差异保留为 Payload，用于审查“CloudFront、AWS WAF 文本转换、源站框架和浏览器对 CRLF、URL 编码与属性闭合是否得到不同字节序列”。成立时必须满足证据要求“同一请求的边缘动作日志、源站接收值、响应 DOM 与唯一执行标记可以通过请求 ID 关联”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 请求通过目标 CloudFront distribution 与 AWS WAF Web ACL 到达自有源站，规则组、转换和缓存键配置均可核验。
prerequisites.en: Requests traverse the target CloudFront distribution and AWS WAF web ACL to an owned origin, with rule groups, transformations, and cache-key configuration verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 边缘日志、源站原始值/规范值、响应字节和浏览器 DOM 使用同一请求 ID，并有被阻断危险基线与普通输入基线。
prerequisites.en: Edge logs, origin raw and canonical values, response bytes, and browser DOM share one request identifier, with a blocked-dangerous baseline and benign-input baseline.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是某规范化变体穿过实际 AWS WAF/CloudFront 路径，源站将其输出为活动上下文，浏览器随后执行 marker；三层证据缺一不可。 假阳性边界：边缘返回 200、只绕过单条规则、直接源站请求、缓存旧响应、源站编码输入或浏览器不执行均不是完整 XSS 绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a normalization variant to pass the real AWS WAF and CloudFront path, be emitted by the origin into an active context, and execute the browser marker; evidence from all three layers is required. False-positive boundary: An edge HTTP 200, bypass of one rule only, direct-origin access, a cached old response, origin encoding, or no browser execution is not a complete XSS bypass.

opsecTips.zh: AWS WAF 差异验证只在专用路径和低速率进行；发现生产缓存命中、真实用户请求、规则自动更新或源站压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: AWS WAF differential validation uses a dedicated path at low rate; stop on production cache hits, real-user requests, automatic rule updates, or origin pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销测试规则/日志增强，失效专用 CloudFront 缓存对象，删除源站测试记录和浏览器 marker，并重放边缘基线。
opsecTips.en: Revert test rules and enhanced logging, invalidate dedicated CloudFront cache objects, delete origin test records and browser markers, and replay edge baselines.

name.zh: Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS 字典

description.zh: 该条目是外部项目收集的事件属性、SVG 与模板字面量变体，应迁入 XSS 工具字典并按上下文索引，而不是占用一个漏洞 Payload 节点。
description.en: This entry is an external collection of event-attribute, SVG, and template-literal variants that belongs in a context-indexed XSS tool dictionary rather than a vulnerability payload node.

overview.zh: Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS 字典是来源型 XSS 字典，不代表独立漏洞数据流。维护重点为：外部样例如何保留来源并按属性闭合、自动事件、交互事件和 JavaScript 语法分类，避免与基础集合重复。它的适用边界为：字典中的任意字符串只有在目标应用提供匹配的输出上下文和危险 sink 时才有意义，脱离数据流不能称为攻击链。任何具体漏洞都必须补充以下证据：工具卡中保存原集合、上游仓库引用与上下文标签，具体漏洞报告仍需提供最小请求、最终 DOM 和执行标记。
overview.en: Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS Dictionary checks how external samples retain provenance and are classified by attribute closure, automatic events, interaction events, and JavaScript syntax without duplicating the basic set. It applies when a dictionary string matters only when the target exposes a matching output context and dangerous sink; without a data flow it is not an attack chain. A conclusion requires the tool card preserves the original set, upstream repository reference, and context tags, while any vulnerability report still provides a minimal request, final DOM, and execution marker; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 字典本身不是漏洞。只有满足“字典中的任意字符串只有在目标应用提供匹配的输出上下文和危险 sink 时才有意义，脱离数据流不能称为攻击链”时，样例才可用于审查“外部样例如何保留来源并按属性闭合、自动事件、交互事件和 JavaScript 语法分类，避免与基础集合重复”。工具命中、字符串反射或上游仓库收录都只是候选信号；缺少“工具卡中保存原集合、上游仓库引用与上下文标签，具体漏洞报告仍需提供最小请求、最终 DOM 和执行标记”时不能形成 XSS 结论。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a dictionary string matters only when the target exposes a matching output context and dangerous sink; without a data flow it is not an attack chain, allowing how external samples retain provenance and are classified by attribute closure, automatic events, interaction events, and JavaScript syntax without duplicating the basic set. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the tool card preserves the original set, upstream repository reference, and context tags, while any vulnerability report still provides a minimal request, final DOM, and execution marker; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 导入 xss-tools 后对完全相同和语义等价的行去重，为保留项增加自动触发或交互触发标签，再通过 Dalfox 或手工浏览器对照具体 sink。迁移时保持原始字节和来源引用，按 HTML、属性、URL、JavaScript 及浏览器兼容性标注每行；工具扫描只负责发现候选，最终结果必须在隔离浏览器中缩减为可解释的最小复现。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, after import into xss-tools, deduplicate exact and semantic equivalents, tag retained lines as automatic or interaction-triggered, and validate them against a concrete sink with Dalfox or a manual browser. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 从 Payload 树移除来源型字典，统一在工具区维护版本与上下文标签；应用侧继续采用输出编码、HTML 消毒和严格 CSP。工具区保存版本、适用上下文和失效标记，应用侧仍按最终 sink 实施编码、消毒与策略控制；回归分别确认字典可复制、导航不重复且正常页面功能不受影响。
mitigation.en: Remediation should remove the source dictionary from the payload tree, maintain versions and context tags in the tool area, and keep application controls based on output encoding, HTML sanitization, and strict CSP. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 核对“Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS 字典”来源与版本
title.en: Verify Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS Dictionary provenance

description.zh: 确认上游仓库、浏览器适用范围和许可，并围绕“外部样例如何保留来源并按属性闭合、自动事件、交互事件和 JavaScript 语法分类，避免与基础集合重复”建立维护标签。
description.en: Confirm the upstream repository, sample provenance, and supported browsers, documenting how external samples retain provenance and are classified by attribute closure, automatic events, interaction events, and JavaScript syntax without duplicating the basic set without treating upstream inclusion as vulnerability proof.

title.zh: 标注“外部 XSS 字典”适用上下文
title.en: Tag External XSS Dictionary contexts

description.zh: 按元素、属性、URL、JavaScript 和交互条件标记每行；适用边界为“字典中的任意字符串只有在目标应用提供匹配的输出上下文和危险 sink 时才有意义，脱离数据流不能称为攻击链”。
description.en: Tag each line by HTML, attribute, URL, JavaScript, event, and compatibility context; test a target only when a dictionary string matters only when the target exposes a matching output context and dangerous sink; without a data flow it is not an attack chain.

title.zh: 迁移“Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS 字典”原始命令
title.en: Migrate the original Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS Dictionary bytes

description.zh: 把原集合完整移入 xss-tools，保留引用并精确去重；具体命中仍须满足“工具卡中保存原集合、上游仓库引用与上下文标签，具体漏洞报告仍需提供最小请求、最终 DOM 和执行标记”。
description.en: Move the complete original command set into xss-tools, preserve provenance, and deduplicate exact bytes; every concrete hit still requires the tool card preserves the original set, upstream repository reference, and context tags, while any vulnerability report still provides a minimal request, final DOM, and execution marker.

title.zh: 建立“Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS 字典”工具回归
title.en: Create Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS Dictionary tool regression

description.zh: 从 Payload 树移除来源型字典，统一在工具区维护版本与上下文标签；应用侧继续采用输出编码、HTML 消毒和严格 CSP；确认工具入口可复制原命令、失效项有标记，且 Payload 导航不再重复展示来源字典。
description.en: Validate retained samples against fixed isolated pages, mark obsolete entries, remove duplicate payload navigation, and confirm the tool entry still copies the original command.

review.rationale: Tricks-Web-Pentest XSS 字典是来源型 XSS 字典，不描述独立应用数据流。其维护目标是“外部样例如何保留来源并按属性闭合、自动事件、交互事件和 JavaScript 语法分类，避免与基础集合重复”，因此由现有 xss-tools 保存原始命令、版本、适用上下文和出处。

prerequisites.zh: 外部 Tricks-Web-Pentest 条目的来源和许可可追溯，目标工具能够按事件属性、SVG 与模板字面量等上下文索引。
prerequisites.en: The external Tricks-Web-Pentest entries have traceable provenance and licensing, and the destination tool indexes event attributes, SVG, and template literals by context.

prerequisites.zh: 使用离线 HTML parser 和最小浏览器 fixture 逐行标记支持范围、触发事件、版本与无害 marker 行为。
prerequisites.en: An offline HTML parser and minimal browser fixture tag support scope, trigger event, version, and harmless marker behavior for each line.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是迁移条目保持原字节和来源、被放入正确上下文，并在对应 fixture 中由预期事件执行 marker；这只是工具质量验证。 假阳性边界：外部项目收录、字符串含 on*、浏览器 parser 接受标签、WAF 告警或其他目标上的历史成功都不能证明当前应用 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires migrated entries to retain bytes and provenance, be placed in the correct context, and execute a marker through the expected event in the matching fixture; this validates tool quality only. False-positive boundary: Inclusion in an external project, an on* substring, browser parser acceptance, a WAF alert, or historical success on another target does not prove XSS in the current application.

opsecTips.zh: Tricks-Web-Pentest 字典只在离线/fixture 中运行，禁止批量投递到真实站点；出现弹窗之外副作用、外连或用户交互时停止。
opsecTips.en: The Tricks-Web-Pentest corpus runs only offline or in fixtures and is never bulk-delivered to a real site; stop on effects beyond the marker, egress, or user interaction.

opsecTips.zh: 销毁 fixture 和临时 browser profile，删除解析结果，按来源哈希去重并确认工具导航只保留上下文化字典项。
opsecTips.en: Destroy fixtures and temporary browser profiles, delete parse results, deduplicate by provenance hash, and confirm tool navigation retains only contextualized dictionary entries.

name.zh: Advanced-XSS 浏览器特性字典

description.zh: 该来源集合混合媒体事件、dialog、blob/data 模块和新式元素语法，适合作为 XSS 工具的浏览器兼容性字典维护。
description.en: This source collection mixes media events, dialog, blob or data modules, and modern element syntax and is best maintained as a browser-compatibility dictionary for XSS tooling.

subCategory.zh: 高级 XSS 工具字典

overview.zh: Advanced-XSS 浏览器特性字典是来源型 XSS 字典，不代表独立漏洞数据流。维护重点为：各样例依赖的浏览器特性、用户手势、MIME、模块策略和 CSP 条件如何标注，以避免把已废弃语法当作通用 Payload。它的适用边界为：只有目标浏览器支持对应元素或事件、应用输出位置匹配且策略允许活动内容时，字典条目才可能形成执行。任何具体漏洞都必须补充以下证据：每个保留样例记录浏览器版本、最终 DOM、控制台策略结果和唯一执行标记，上游列表本身不构成有效性证明。
overview.en: Advanced-XSS Browser Feature Dictionary checks how browser features, user gestures, MIME handling, module policy, and CSP prerequisites are tagged so obsolete syntax is not presented as a universal payload. It applies when a dictionary entry can execute only when the target browser supports the element or event, the output context matches, and policy permits the active content. A conclusion requires every retained sample records browser version, final DOM, policy diagnostics, and a unique execution marker; inclusion upstream is not proof of validity; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 字典本身不是漏洞。只有满足“只有目标浏览器支持对应元素或事件、应用输出位置匹配且策略允许活动内容时，字典条目才可能形成执行”时，样例才可用于审查“各样例依赖的浏览器特性、用户手势、MIME、模块策略和 CSP 条件如何标注，以避免把已废弃语法当作通用 Payload”。工具命中、字符串反射或上游仓库收录都只是候选信号；缺少“每个保留样例记录浏览器版本、最终 DOM、控制台策略结果和唯一执行标记，上游列表本身不构成有效性证明”时不能形成 XSS 结论。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a dictionary entry can execute only when the target browser supports the element or event, the output context matches, and policy permits the active content, allowing how browser features, user gestures, MIME handling, module policy, and CSP prerequisites are tagged so obsolete syntax is not presented as a universal payload. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and every retained sample records browser version, final DOM, policy diagnostics, and a unique execution marker; inclusion upstream is not proof of validity; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 迁入 xss-tools 后按媒体、对话框、模块和 blob/data 文档分组，在支持矩阵中逐条验证，并将已废弃或无效项标记而非静默删除。迁移时保持原始字节和来源引用，按 HTML、属性、URL、JavaScript 及浏览器兼容性标注每行；工具扫描只负责发现候选，最终结果必须在隔离浏览器中缩减为可解释的最小复现。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, after migration to xss-tools, group samples by media, dialog, module, and blob or data document, validate them against a support matrix, and mark obsolete or invalid entries rather than silently deleting them. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 工具区保留来源和兼容性说明，Payload 树只展示已确认的数据流技术；应用修复应限制活动元素、外部资源、模块加载与危险 DOM sink。工具区保存版本、适用上下文和失效标记，应用侧仍按最终 sink 实施编码、消毒与策略控制；回归分别确认字典可复制、导航不重复且正常页面功能不受影响。
mitigation.en: Remediation should keep provenance and compatibility notes in tools while payload navigation presents confirmed data-flow techniques; applications should restrict active elements, external resources, module loading, and dangerous DOM sinks. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 核对“Advanced-XSS 浏览器特性字典”来源与版本
title.en: Verify Advanced-XSS Browser Feature Dictionary provenance

description.zh: 确认上游仓库、浏览器适用范围和许可，并围绕“各样例依赖的浏览器特性、用户手势、MIME、模块策略和 CSP 条件如何标注，以避免把已废弃语法当作通用 Payload”建立维护标签。
description.en: Confirm the upstream repository, sample provenance, and supported browsers, documenting how browser features, user gestures, MIME handling, module policy, and CSP prerequisites are tagged so obsolete syntax is not presented as a universal payload without treating upstream inclusion as vulnerability proof.

title.en: Tag Advanced XSS Tool Dictionary contexts

description.en: Tag each line by HTML, attribute, URL, JavaScript, event, and compatibility context; test a target only when a dictionary entry can execute only when the target browser supports the element or event, the output context matches, and policy permits the active content.

title.en: Migrate the original Advanced-XSS Browser Feature Dictionary bytes

description.en: Move the complete original command set into xss-tools, preserve provenance, and deduplicate exact bytes; every concrete hit still requires every retained sample records browser version, final DOM, policy diagnostics, and a unique execution marker; inclusion upstream is not proof of validity.

title.zh: 建立“Advanced-XSS 浏览器特性字典”工具回归
title.en: Create Advanced-XSS Browser Feature Dictionary tool regression

description.zh: 工具区保留来源和兼容性说明，Payload 树只展示已确认的数据流技术；应用修复应限制活动元素、外部资源、模块加载与危险 DOM sink；确认工具入口可复制原命令、失效项有标记，且 Payload 导航不再重复展示来源字典。
description.en: Validate retained samples against fixed isolated pages, mark obsolete entries, remove duplicate payload navigation, and confirm the tool entry still copies the original command.

review.rationale: Advanced-XSS 浏览器特性字典是来源型 XSS 字典，不描述独立应用数据流。其维护目标是“各样例依赖的浏览器特性、用户手势、MIME、模块策略和 CSP 条件如何标注，以避免把已废弃语法当作通用 Payload”，因此由现有 xss-tools 保存原始命令、版本、适用上下文和出处。

prerequisites.zh: Advanced-XSS 来源集合的许可、浏览器版本和特性依赖已记录，条目按媒体事件、dialog、blob/data module 等能力分组。
prerequisites.en: Licensing, browser versions, and feature dependencies for the Advanced-XSS source are recorded, with entries grouped by media events, dialog, blob or data modules, and related capabilities.

prerequisites.zh: 每个候选只在支持该特性的隔离浏览器 fixture 中使用固定 marker，资源和 module URL 均指向本地测试端点。
prerequisites.en: Each candidate uses a fixed marker only in an isolated browser fixture supporting the feature, with resources and module URLs pointing to local test endpoints.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是工具项的特性标签和版本前提正确，目标 fixture 触发预期事件或模块处理并执行 marker；结果不自动映射到任意应用。 假阳性边界：现代浏览器已移除特性、parser 仅创建惰性节点、资源请求没有事件、字符串可复制或旧 PoC 文档存在均不是有效执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires correct feature tags and version prerequisites, with the target fixture triggering the expected event or module processing and executing the marker; results do not automatically transfer to an application. False-positive boundary: A feature removed by modern browsers, an inert parser node, a resource request without its event, a copyable string, or old proof-of-concept documentation is not valid execution.

opsecTips.zh: 高级浏览器特性字典不得创建真实 blob 下载、外部 module 或持续媒体；出现权限提示、下载、摄像头/麦克风请求或外连时停止。
opsecTips.en: The advanced browser-feature corpus must not create real blob downloads, external modules, or persistent media; stop on permission prompts, downloads, camera or microphone access, or egress.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销 blob/object URL，停止媒体和 module worker，删除 fixture/profile 与缓存，并给不再支持的行保留明确失效标签。
opsecTips.en: Revoke blob and object URLs, stop media and module workers, delete fixtures, profiles, and caches, and retain explicit invalid labels for unsupported lines.

name.zh: 结构闭合型 XSS Polyglot 集合

description.zh: 聚焦 title、style、textarea、script、属性和 MathML/SVG 等嵌套结构闭合，验证复杂输出位置中的 HTML tokenizer 状态转换。
description.en: Focuses on closing title, style, textarea, script, attribute, MathML, and SVG structures to test HTML tokenizer state transitions in complex output locations.

overview.zh: 结构闭合型 XSS Polyglot 集合用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：组合闭合序列是否把 tokenizer 从 RCDATA、RAWTEXT、属性值或外来内容状态切换到可创建事件节点的状态。测试成立的前提为：不可信值落在不透明的嵌套模板中，应用只对常规 HTML 文本编码，或中间组件对编码结果再次解码和拼接。证据要求为：解析器状态对应的最小闭合前缀、生成节点和执行事件均可从最终 DOM 解释，避免保留无法说明原因的超长字符串。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: Structural-Breakout XSS Polyglot Set checks whether a compound breakout moves the tokenizer from RCDATA, RAWTEXT, attribute-value, or foreign-content states into one that creates an event-capable node. It applies when untrusted data lands in an opaque nested template where only ordinary HTML-text encoding is applied or an intermediate component decodes and concatenates the value again. A conclusion requires the minimal state-specific breakout prefix, generated node, and execution event can all be explained from the final DOM rather than retaining an unexplained long string; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：不可信值落在不透明的嵌套模板中，应用只对常规 HTML 文本编码，或中间组件对编码结果再次解码和拼接。审查时必须确认“组合闭合序列是否把 tokenizer 从 RCDATA、RAWTEXT、属性值或外来内容状态切换到可创建事件节点的状态”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“解析器状态对应的最小闭合前缀、生成节点和执行事件均可从最终 DOM 解释，避免保留无法说明原因的超长字符串”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when untrusted data lands in an opaque nested template where only ordinary HTML-text encoding is applied or an intermediate component decodes and concatenates the value again, allowing whether a compound breakout moves the tokenizer from RCDATA, RAWTEXT, attribute-value, or foreign-content states into one that creates an event-capable node. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the minimal state-specific breakout prefix, generated node, and execution event can all be explained from the final DOM rather than retaining an unexplained long string; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 先确认当前元素和属性状态，再提交原 Polyglot；对命中项逐段删除前缀和后缀，直到得到能解释 tokenizer 转换的最小样例。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, identify the current element and attribute state before submitting the original polyglot, then delete prefixes and suffixes from a hit until the tokenizer transition has a minimal explainable sample. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 由模板引擎在最终上下文自动转义，禁止组件重复解码，并对富 HTML 采用命名空间感知消毒器与 Trusted Types。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should use template auto-escaping at the final context, prohibit repeated decoding by components, and protect rich HTML with a namespace-aware sanitizer and Trusted Types. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“结构闭合型 XSS Polyglot 集合”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the Structural-Breakout XSS Polyglot Set data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“不可信值落在不透明的嵌套模板中，应用只对常规 HTML 文本编码，或中间组件对编码结果再次解码和拼接”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that untrusted data lands in an opaque nested template where only ordinary HTML-text encoding is applied or an intermediate component decodes and concatenates the value again, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“HTML Tokenizer 状态突破”解析基线
title.en: Establish the HTML Tokenizer State Breakout baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“解析器状态对应的最小闭合前缀、生成节点和执行事件均可从最终 DOM 解释，避免保留无法说明原因的超长字符串”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the minimal state-specific breakout prefix, generated node, and execution event can all be explained from the final DOM rather than retaining an unexplained long string as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“结构闭合型 XSS Polyglot 集合”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable Structural-Breakout XSS Polyglot Set check

description.zh: 先确认当前元素和属性状态，再提交原 Polyglot；对命中项逐段删除前缀和后缀，直到得到能解释 tokenizer 转换的最小样例；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: identify the current element and attribute state before submitting the original polyglot, then delete prefixes and suffixes from a hit until the tokenizer transition has a minimal explainable sample; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.
